source_note: Bilingual claim cards merged via kb-merge. Auto-ingested cards remain verified=false pending external review.

cards.title: TIR targets — most adults with T1D/T2D
cards.claim_zh: 对多数 1 型或 2 型糖尿病成人:目标范围内时间(TIR,70–180 mg/dL / 3.9–10.0 mmol/L)目标 >70%;低于范围时间(TBR <70 mg/dL)<4%,<54 mg/dL <1%;高于范围时间(TAR >180 mg/dL)<25%,>250 mg/dL <5%。
cards.claim_en: For most adults with type 1 or type 2 diabetes: Time in Range (TIR, 70–180 mg/dL / 3.9–10.0 mmol/L) target >70%; Time Below Range (TBR <70 mg/dL) <4% and <54 mg/dL <1%; Time Above Range (TAR >180 mg/dL) <25% and >250 mg/dL <5%.

source.doc: Battelino T, et al. Clinical targets for continuous glucose monitoring data interpretation: recommendations from the international consensus on time in range.

cards.title: TIR targets — older / high-risk adults
cards.claim_zh: 对老年或高危糖尿病成人(以避免低血糖为优先):目标范围内时间(TIR,70–180 mg/dL)目标 >50%;低于范围时间(TBR <70 mg/dL)<1%;减少高于范围时间。该人群放宽 TIR 目标以降低低血糖风险。
cards.claim_en: For older or high-risk adults (hypoglycemia avoidance prioritized): TIR (70–180 mg/dL) target >50%; Time Below Range (TBR <70 mg/dL) <1%; reduce time above range. TIR target is relaxed for this group to lower hypoglycemia risk.

source.doc: Battelino T, et al. International consensus on time in range.

cards.title: TIR targets — pregnancy with type 1 diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 妊娠合并 1 型糖尿病:目标范围采用 63–140 mg/dL(3.5–7.8 mmol/L),TIR 目标 >70%;低于范围时间(TBR <63 mg/dL)<4%,<54 mg/dL <1%;高于范围时间(TAR >140 mg/dL)<25%。妊娠目标范围与目标值不同于非妊娠成人。
cards.claim_en: Pregnancy with type 1 diabetes: target range is 63–140 mg/dL (3.5–7.8 mmol/L) with TIR target >70%; Time Below Range (TBR <63 mg/dL) <4% and <54 mg/dL <1%; Time Above Range (TAR >140 mg/dL) <25%. Pregnancy uses a different target range and goals than non-pregnant adults.

source.doc: Battelino T, et al. International consensus on time in range.

cards.title: Glycemic variability (%CV) and GMI metrics
cards.claim_zh: 血糖变异性以变异系数(%CV)衡量,目标 ≤36%(更低更稳定)。GMI(血糖管理指标)由平均血糖推算,用于估计糖化血红蛋白水平。标准 CGM 报告建议至少 14 天、且佩戴时间 ≥70% 的数据。
cards.claim_en: Glycemic variability is measured by coefficient of variation (%CV), target ≤36% (lower is more stable). GMI (Glucose Management Indicator) is derived from mean glucose to estimate an A1C-equivalent. A standard CGM report uses at least 14 days of data with ≥70% wear time.

source.doc: Battelino T, et al. International consensus on time in range.

cards.title: Hypoglycemia levels and the 15-15 rule
cards.claim_zh: 低血糖分级:1 级 54–70 mg/dL(3.0–3.9 mmol/L);2 级 <54 mg/dL(<3.0 mmol/L),具有临床意义需紧急处理;3 级为严重低血糖,伴意识/躯体状态改变、需他人协助。清醒的 1 级低血糖常用“15-15 法则”:进食约 15 克速效碳水,15 分钟后复测;若仍低则重复。意识丧失者禁止经口喂食,应使用胰高血糖素并就医。
cards.claim_en: Hypoglycemia levels: Level 1 is 54–70 mg/dL (3.0–3.9 mmol/L); Level 2 is <54 mg/dL (<3.0 mmol/L), clinically significant and needs prompt action; Level 3 is severe hypoglycemia with altered mental/physical status requiring assistance. For conscious Level 1, the '15-15 rule' is common: take ~15 g fast-acting carbohydrate, recheck in 15 minutes, repeat if still low. Do NOT give oral intake to an unconscious person — use glucagon and seek emergency care.

source.doc: American Diabetes Association. Standards of Care in Diabetes — 2025 (glycemic goals / hypoglycemia).

cards.title: Compression low (pressure-induced false low)
cards.claim_zh: 压迫性低值(compression low)是传感器受压(如睡眠时压住佩戴部位)导致的短暂假性低血糖读数,并非真实低血糖。特征:夜间突然下降并在解除压迫后回升。怀疑时应以指尖血糖(BGM)确认,不要仅凭此调整治疗。属数据质量/判读问题。
cards.claim_en: A compression low (pressure-induced false low) is a transient artifactual low reading caused by pressure on the sensor (e.g., lying on the wear site during sleep) — it is not true hypoglycemia. Typical signature: an abrupt nocturnal drop that recovers once pressure is relieved. When suspected, confirm with a fingerstick (BGM) and do not adjust therapy on the artifact alone. This is a data-quality / interpretation issue.

source.doc: CGM data interpretation — sensor artifact (compression low). Pending mapping to a specific guideline page during P3b verification.

cards.title: TIR target for general T1/T2 diabetes: >70% of readings
cards.claim_zh: 成人1型或2型糖尿病患者，目标范围内时间（TIR，70–180 mg/dL）目标为>70%的读数，即每天>16小时48分钟。
cards.claim_en: For adults with Type 1 or Type 2 Diabetes, Time in Range (TIR) target is >70% of readings in the range 70–180 mg/dL, equivalent to >16 hours 48 minutes per day.

cards.title: TIR target for older/high-risk T1/T2 diabetes: >50% of readings
cards.claim_zh: 老年或高危1型/2型糖尿病患者，目标范围内时间（TIR，70–180 mg/dL）目标为>50%的读数，即每天>12小时。
cards.claim_en: For older or high-risk individuals with Type 1 or Type 2 Diabetes, Time in Range (TIR) target is >50% of readings in the range 70–180 mg/dL, equivalent to >12 hours per day.

cards.title: Level 1 hypoglycemia TBR for general T1/T2: <4%
cards.claim_zh: 成人1型或2型糖尿病患者，1级低血糖（<70 mg/dL）目标为<4%的读数，即每天<1小时。
cards.claim_en: For adults with Type 1 or Type 2 Diabetes, Level 1 Hypoglycemia (<70 mg/dL) target is <4% of readings, equivalent to <1 hour per day.

cards.title: Level 1 hypoglycemia TBR for older/high-risk: <1%
cards.claim_zh: 老年或高危1型/2型糖尿病患者，1级低血糖（<70 mg/dL）目标为<1%的读数，即每天<15分钟。
cards.claim_en: For older or high-risk individuals with Type 1 or Type 2 Diabetes, Level 1 Hypoglycemia (<70 mg/dL) target is <1% of readings, equivalent to <15 minutes per day.

cards.title: Level 2 hypoglycemia TBR for general T1/T2: <1%
cards.claim_zh: 成人1型或2型糖尿病患者，2级低血糖（<54 mg/dL）目标为<1%的读数，即每天<15分钟。
cards.claim_en: For adults with Type 1 or Type 2 Diabetes, Level 2 Hypoglycemia (<54 mg/dL) target is <1% of readings, equivalent to <15 minutes per day.

cards.title: Level 2 hypoglycemia TBR for older/high-risk: 0%
cards.claim_zh: 老年或高危1型/2型糖尿病患者，2级低血糖（<54 mg/dL）目标为0%的读数，即每天0分钟。
cards.claim_en: For older or high-risk individuals with Type 1 or Type 2 Diabetes, Level 2 Hypoglycemia (<54 mg/dL) target is 0% of readings, equivalent to 0 minutes per day.

cards.title: Level 1 hyperglycemia TAR for general T1/T2: <25%
cards.claim_zh: 成人1型或2型糖尿病患者，1级高血糖（>180 mg/dL）目标为<25%的读数，即每天<6小时。
cards.claim_en: For adults with Type 1 or Type 2 Diabetes, Level 1 Hyperglycemia (>180 mg/dL) target is <25% of readings, equivalent to <6 hours per day.

cards.title: Level 1 hyperglycemia TAR for older/high-risk: <50%
cards.claim_zh: 老年或高危1型/2型糖尿病患者，1级高血糖（>180 mg/dL）目标为<50%的读数，即每天<12小时。
cards.claim_en: For older or high-risk individuals with Type 1 or Type 2 Diabetes, Level 1 Hyperglycemia (>180 mg/dL) target is <50% of readings, equivalent to <12 hours per day.

cards.title: Level 2 hyperglycemia TAR for general T1/T2: <5%
cards.claim_zh: 成人1型或2型糖尿病患者，2级高血糖（>250 mg/dL）目标为<5%的读数，即每天<1小时12分钟。
cards.claim_en: For adults with Type 1 or Type 2 Diabetes, Level 2 Hyperglycemia (>250 mg/dL) target is <5% of readings, equivalent to <1 hour 12 minutes per day.

cards.title: Level 2 hyperglycemia TAR for older/high-risk: <10%
cards.claim_zh: 老年或高危1型/2型糖尿病患者，2级高血糖（>250 mg/dL）目标为<10%的读数，即每天<2小时24分钟。
cards.claim_en: For older or high-risk individuals with Type 1 or Type 2 Diabetes, Level 2 Hyperglycemia (>250 mg/dL) target is <10% of readings, equivalent to <2 hours 24 minutes per day.

cards.title: Diabetes diagnosis: A1C threshold
cards.claim_zh: 非妊娠个体糖尿病诊断标准：A1C ≥ 6.5%（≥ 48 mmol/mol）。通常需要同一检测两次异常结果或两项不同检测各一次异常方可诊断。
cards.claim_en: Diabetes diagnosis in nonpregnant individuals: A1C ≥ 6.5% (≥ 48 mmol/mol). Diagnosis usually requires two abnormal results from the same test at two different times, or two different tests.

cards.title: Diabetes diagnosis: fasting plasma glucose threshold
cards.claim_zh: 非妊娠个体糖尿病诊断标准：空腹血浆葡萄糖（FPG）≥ 126 mg/dL（≥ 7.0 mmol/L），空腹定义为 ≥ 8 小时无热量摄入。
cards.claim_en: Diabetes diagnosis in nonpregnant individuals: fasting plasma glucose (FPG) ≥ 126 mg/dL (≥ 7.0 mmol/L), with fasting defined as ≥ 8 hours with no caloric intake.

cards.title: Diabetes diagnosis: 2-hour OGTT threshold
cards.claim_zh: 非妊娠个体糖尿病诊断标准：口服葡萄糖耐量试验（OGTT，75g无水葡萄糖负荷）2小时血浆葡萄糖 ≥ 200 mg/dL（≥ 11.1 mmol/L）。
cards.claim_en: Diabetes diagnosis in nonpregnant individuals: 2-hour plasma glucose ≥ 200 mg/dL (≥ 11.1 mmol/L) during OGTT with 75g anhydrous glucose load.

cards.title: Diabetes diagnosis: random plasma glucose in symptomatic persons
cards.claim_zh: 非妊娠个体糖尿病诊断标准：经典高血糖症状或高血糖危象 + 随机血浆葡萄糖 ≥ 200 mg/dL（≥ 11.1 mmol/L）。此为2025年新增标准。
cards.claim_en: Diabetes diagnosis in nonpregnant individuals: classic symptoms of hyperglycemia or hyperglycemic crisis PLUS random plasma glucose ≥ 200 mg/dL (≥ 11.1 mmol/L). This is a NEW addition for 2025.

cards.title: PAD screening in diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 对有外周动脉疾病（PAD）风险的无症状人群或糖尿病病程 > 10 年且心血管风险高的患者，使用踝肱指数筛查PAD。
cards.claim_en: Screen for peripheral artery disease (PAD) using ankle-brachial index testing in asymptomatic persons at risk for PAD, or any person with diabetes mellitus > 10 years duration and high cardiovascular risk.

cards.title: Teplizumab for delaying Type 1 diabetes onset
cards.claim_zh: Teplizumab-mzwv输注可用于延缓 ≥ 8 岁2期1型糖尿病患者的1型糖尿病发病。新增强调：对有家族史或遗传风险升高者进行基于抗体的1型糖尿病症状前筛查。
cards.claim_en: Teplizumab-mzwv infusion is available to delay onset of Type 1 diabetes in persons ≥ 8 years of age with stage 2 Type 1 diabetes. NEW emphasis on antibody-based screening for pre-symptomatic Type 1 in persons with family history or elevated genetic risk.

cards.title: Pioglitazone/GLP-1 RA combination for MASH
cards.claim_zh: 对经活检证实的MASH（代谢功能障碍相关脂肪性肝炎）成人患者或纤维化高风险者，使用吡格列酮/GLP-1受体激动剂联合治疗。
cards.claim_en: Use combination pioglitazone/GLP-1 receptor agonist in adults with biopsy-proven MASH (metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis) or at higher risk of fibrosis.

cards.title: Universal screening starting age 35
cards.claim_zh: 所有成年人应从35岁开始筛查糖尿病。
cards.claim_en: All adults should be screened for diabetes starting at age 35.

cards.title: Screening for overweight/obese with risk factors
cards.claim_zh: 所有超重/肥胖成人（BMI > 25 kg/m²）伴有危险因素（家族史、高风险种族、ASCVD、高血压、高脂血症、PCOS、缺乏运动）应进行筛查。
cards.claim_en: All overweight/obese adults (BMI > 25 kg/m²) with risk factors (family history, high-risk race, ASCVD, HTN, HLD, PCOS, inactivity) should be screened.

cards.title: Rescreening interval when normal results
cards.claim_zh: 若筛查结果正常，每3年重新筛查。
cards.claim_en: If screening results are normal, rescreen every 3 years.

cards.title: Annual retesting for pre-diabetes range
cards.claim_zh: 若处于糖尿病前期水平（A1C 5.7–6.4%），每年复查。
cards.claim_en: If pre-diabetes level (A1C 5.7–6.4%), re-test yearly.

cards.title: Youth screening criteria
cards.claim_zh: 筛查所有超重且伴有1个或以上额外危险因素的青少年。
cards.claim_en: Screen all overweight youth with 1 or more additional risk factors for diabetes.

cards.title: Screening for medication-induced hyperglycemia risk
cards.claim_zh: 对使用具有高血糖风险药物的人群进行筛查：糖皮质激素、他汀类、噻嗪类、HIV药物（基线及每3-6个月）、第二代抗精神病药（基线及12-16周后）。
cards.claim_en: Screen people on medications with hyperglycemia risks: glucocorticoids, statins, thiazides, HIV meds (baseline and every 3–6 months), 2nd generation anti-psychotics (baseline and 12–16 weeks later).

cards.title: NEW: Sleep as central component of diabetes prevention
cards.claim_zh: 睡眠被强调为糖尿病预防管理的核心组成部分（与饮食模式和体力活动同等重要）。
cards.claim_en: Sleep is highlighted as a central component (equal to eating patterns and physical activity) for diabetes prevention management.

cards.title: Weight loss goal for pre-diabetes prevention
cards.claim_zh: 护理目标包括减轻体重3–7%或防止体重增加，并关注心血管风险。
cards.claim_en: Care goals include 3–7% weight loss or prevention of weight gain with attention to cardiovascular risk.

cards.title: Intensive lifestyle goals for high-risk pre-diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 若BMI > 35 kg/m²、A1C > 6%或有GDM病史，推荐强化目标。
cards.claim_en: INTENSIVE goals are recommended if BMI > 35 kg/m², A1C > 6%, or history of GDM.

cards.title: NEW: Vitamin D for Type 2 DM prevention
cards.claim_zh: 讨论使用维生素D预防2型糖尿病（由美国内分泌学会倡导）。剂量尚不明确，需更多研究。
cards.claim_en: Discussion on the use of Vitamin D to prevent Type 2 DM (advocated by the US Endocrine Society). Dose is not clear and more research is needed.

cards.title: Metformin for pre-diabetes drug therapy
cards.claim_zh: 考虑对25-59岁、BMI ≥ 35 kg/m²、空腹血糖 > 110 mg/dL、A1C > 6%或有GDM病史的女性使用二甲双胍。
cards.claim_en: Consider Metformin in patients 25–59 years with BMI ≥ 35 kg/m², fasting plasma glucose > 110 mg/dL, A1C > 6%, or women with history of GDM.

cards.title: Pioglitazone for stroke/MI risk reduction in pre-diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 推荐吡格列酮降低有卒中病史且处于糖尿病前期人群的卒中/心梗风险，需权衡体重增加、水肿和骨折风险（使用较低剂量）。
cards.claim_en: Recommend Pioglitazone to reduce risk of stroke/MI in people with stroke history and pre-diabetes, balancing the risk of weight gain, edema, and fractures (use lower dose).

cards.title: Immunization updates for diabetes patients
cards.claim_zh: 表4.3包括考虑接种：COVID-19、乙型肝炎、流感、肺炎球菌、RSV、Tdap、带状疱疹疫苗。
cards.claim_en: Table 4.3 includes consideration for: COVID-19, Hepatitis B, Influenza, Pneumococcal, RSV, Tdap, Zoster.

cards.title: Bone Mineral Density testing recommendations
cards.claim_zh: 初始骨密度检测：所有老年人（≥65岁）及有多个危险因素的较年轻人群。每2-3年复查。
cards.claim_en: Initial BMD testing: all older adults (≥65 years) and younger persons with multiple risk factors. Repeat every 2–3 years.

cards.title: Calcium and Vitamin D intake for bone health
cards.claim_zh: 推荐钙摄入量1000-1200 mg/天，同时补充维生素D，用于有骨病风险的糖尿病患者。
cards.claim_en: Recommended Calcium intake 1000–1200 mg/day with Vitamin D for diabetes patients at bone risk.

cards.title: High fracture risk thresholds for antiresorptive therapy
cards.claim_zh: 高骨折风险定义为：FRAX风险评估工具评分≥3%（髋部）或≥20%（骨质疏松性骨折）、骨密度T值≤2、或有骨折史（髋/骨盆、椎体、前臂）。
cards.claim_en: High fracture risk defined as: FRAX Risk Assessment Tool score ≥3% for hip or ≥20% for osteoporotic fracture, BMD T-score ≤ 2, or history of fracture (hip/pelvis, vertebral, forearm).

cards.title: NEW: Annual dental exam for diabetes patients
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病患者每年至少进行一次牙科检查。
cards.claim_en: Dental exam at least once per year for diabetes patients.

cards.title: NEW: NAFLD renamed to MASLD
cards.claim_zh: 非酒精性脂肪肝病（NAFLD）现更名为代谢功能障碍相关脂肪性肝病（MASLD）。
cards.claim_en: Nonalcoholic fatty liver disease (NAFLD) is now renamed to metabolic dysfunction–associated steatotic liver disease (MASLD).

cards.title: NEW: NASH renamed to MASH
cards.claim_zh: 非酒精性脂肪性肝炎（NASH）现更名为代谢功能障碍相关脂肪性肝炎（MASH）。
cards.claim_en: Nonalcoholic steatohepatitis (NASH) is now renamed to metabolic dysfunction–associated steatohepatitis (MASH).

cards.title: Liver risk stratification with FIB-4 threshold
cards.claim_zh: 使用纤维化-4指数(FIB-4)评估肝脏风险；FIB-4 > 1.3时转诊至消化科或肝病专家。
cards.claim_en: Use Fibrosis-4 Index (FIB-4) to assess liver risk; if FIB-4 > 1.3, refer to GI or hepatologist.

cards.title: MASLD treatment algorithm medications
cards.claim_zh: 新增MASLD治疗算法：通过减重和有循证证据的药物管理，包括GLP-1受体激动剂、双重GLP/GIP激动剂和吡格列酮。
cards.claim_en: NEW MASLD Treatment Algorithm: manage with weight loss and medications with evidence including GLP1-RA, dual GLP/GIP agonists, and Pioglitazone.

cards.title: Resmetirom for MASLD with liver fibrosis
cards.claim_zh: 新增：甲状腺激素受体β激动剂(Resmetirom)用于合并糖尿病前期、2型糖尿病和中度或重度肝纤维化的MASLD成人患者。该药物需由专科医生剂量调整和监测。
cards.claim_en: NEW: treatment with a thyroid hormone receptor beta agonist (resmetirom) in adults with prediabetes, type 2 diabetes and MASLD with moderate or advanced liver fibrosis. Medication to be dosed and monitored by specialty.
cards.population: adults with prediabetes or T2DM and MASLD with moderate/advanced fibrosis
synonyms: 甲状腺激素受体β激动剂

cards.title: DSMES at 5 critical times
cards.claim_zh: 2024更新：所有糖尿病患者应在至少5个关键时间点接受糖尿病自我管理教育与支持(DSMES)：诊断时、每年、未达标/出现并发症时、生活和照护过渡期。
cards.claim_en: UPDATED 2024: DSMES should be provided to ALL persons with diabetes at least 5 critical times: at diagnosis, annually, when not meeting targets/complication factors arise, during transitions of life and care.
synonyms: 糖尿病自我管理教育与支持

cards.title: Weight loss goal for glycemic improvement
cards.claim_zh: 减重目标：基于营养、体力活动和行为治疗，减重3-7%。
cards.claim_en: Weight loss goal: 3-7% based on nutrition, physical activity, and behavior therapy.

cards.title: Weight loss up to 15% for diabetes remission
cards.claim_zh: 减重达15%可能支持糖尿病缓解(REMISSION)。
cards.claim_en: Up to 15% weight loss may support possible REMISSION of diabetes.

cards.title: Sarcopenia prevention during weight loss
cards.claim_zh: 新增建议：指导正在减重的患者加入肌肉强化运动以预防肌少症。
cards.claim_en: NEW recommendation: counsel patients who are losing weight to include muscle-strengthening exercise in order to avoid sarcopenia.
cards.population: adults with diabetes undergoing weight loss

cards.title: Non-nutritive sweeteners short-term use only
cards.claim_zh: 非营养性甜味剂：有条件推荐——仍优于含糖产品，但仅建议短期适度使用。
cards.claim_en: Non-nutritive sweeteners: conditional recommendation — still recommended over sugar-sweetened products, but in moderation for SHORT TERM only.

cards.title: Water preferred over sweetened beverages
cards.claim_zh: 水优于营养性和非营养性甜味饮料(包括无糖/DIET饮料)。
cards.claim_en: WATER is preferred over nutritive and non-nutritive sweetened beverages (DIET).

cards.title: Religious fasting risk stratification before fasting
cards.claim_zh: 新增：宗教斋戒前建议进行风险分层，依据糖尿病与斋戒国际联盟指南。
cards.claim_en: NEW: Risk Stratification is recommended BEFORE religious fasting, per guidance from Diabetes and Ramadan International Alliance.
cards.population: persons with diabetes who observe religious fasting

cards.title: Avoid cannabis in diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 新增：建议避免使用大麻，因其有大麻剧吐综合征风险及可能诱发糖尿病酮症酸中毒(DKA)。
cards.claim_en: NEW: recommendation to AVOID cannabis due to risk of cannabis hyperemesis syndrome and potential diabetic ketoacidosis (DKA).

cards.title: DKA and HHS outpatient prevention subsection
cards.claim_zh: 新增关于DKA和HHS流行病学、诊断标准及门诊预防的子章节，包含危险因素和临床表现的新表格。
cards.claim_en: NEW subsection on epidemiology, diagnostic criteria, and outpatient prevention of DKA and HHS, including new tables on risk factors and clinical presentation.

cards.title: Deintensifying medications when harms outweigh benefits
cards.claim_zh: 新增A1C个体化目标图：支持在治疗危害(低血糖)可能大于获益时降级药物治疗，尤其适用于预期寿命缩短或合并症较多的患者。
cards.claim_en: NEW graphic for individualization of A1C goals: supports DEINTENSIFYING medications when the harms of treatment (hypoglycemia) may be greater than the benefits, particularly in patients with decreased life expectancy or co-morbidities.
cards.population: older adults with diabetes, patients with comorbidities

cards.title: A1C <6.5% for healthy adults with low treatment burden
cards.claim_zh: A1C目标<6.5%适用于健康状况良好、功能正常、治疗风险和负担低的成人。
cards.claim_en: A1C target <6.5% is recommended for adults with good health and function, low treatment risks and burdens.
cards.population: adults with good health and low treatment burden

cards.title: A1C <7.0% for most adults
cards.claim_zh: A1C目标<7.0%适用于大多数成人糖尿病患者。
cards.claim_en: A1C target <7.0% is recommended for most adults with diabetes.

cards.title: A1C <7.5% for healthy older adults
cards.claim_zh: A1C目标<7.5%适用于健康的老年人。
cards.claim_en: A1C target <7.5% is recommended for healthy older adults.

cards.title: A1C <8.0% for older adults with complex/intermediate health
cards.claim_zh: A1C目标<8.0%适用于健康状况复杂或中等的老年人。
cards.claim_en: A1C target <8.0% is recommended for older adults with complex or intermediate health.

cards.title: No A1C goal for very complex/poor health or limited life expectancy
cards.claim_zh: 对于健康状况极差/非常复杂的老年人或预期寿命有限的成人，不设定A1C目标。
cards.claim_en: No A1C goal is set for older adults with very complex/poor health or any adults with limited life expectancy.
cards.population: older adults with very complex/poor health; adults with limited life expectancy

cards.title: Weight monitoring every 3 months during active weight loss
cards.claim_zh: 在积极减重期间，至少每3个月监测一次人体测量指标。
cards.claim_en: Monitor anthropometric measurements at least every 3 months during active weight loss.
cards.population: adults with type 2 diabetes and obesity

cards.title: >90% of persons with T2D are obese
cards.claim_zh: 超过90%的2型糖尿病患者合并肥胖。
cards.claim_en: More than 90% of persons with type 2 diabetes are obese.

cards.title: Decreased oral contraceptive efficacy with GLP-1 RA or GIP drugs
cards.claim_zh: 使用GLP-1受体激动剂或GIP类药物时，口服避孕药的疗效降低。
cards.claim_en: Decreased efficacy of oral contraception when using GLP-1 receptor agonist or GIP drugs.
cards.population: persons of childbearing potential using GLP-1 RA or GIP

cards.title: Metformin preferred for chemo-induced insulin resistance
cards.claim_zh: 对于化疗引起的糖尿病（特定化疗药物增加胰岛素抵抗），二甲双胍是首选治疗，其次是吡格列酮或SGLT2抑制剂。
cards.claim_en: For persons with diabetes secondary to chemotherapy where specific chemo agents increase insulin resistance, metformin is the treatment of choice, followed by pioglitazone or SGLT2 inhibitor.
cards.population: persons with diabetes secondary to chemotherapy

cards.title: GLP-1RA recommended for HFpEF with obesity irrespective of A1C
cards.claim_zh: 对于合并症状性射血分数保留型心力衰竭(HFpEF)且肥胖的糖尿病患者，无论A1C水平如何，推荐使用GLP-1RA。
cards.claim_en: GLP-1RA recommended for people with diabetes and symptomatic heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF) and obesity, irrespective of A1C.

cards.title: AVOID DPP-4 inhibitors with GLP-1RA
cards.claim_zh: 避免将DPP-4抑制剂与GLP-1RA联用（无额外获益）。
cards.claim_en: AVOID using DPP-4 inhibitors with GLP-1RA (lack of benefit).

cards.title: ASCVD/high risk: GLP-1RA or SGLT2i independent of A1C
cards.claim_zh: 对于ASCVD或心血管高风险患者（无论A1C水平）：使用GLP-1RA（度拉糖肽/利拉鲁肽/司美格鲁肽）或SGLT2抑制剂（达格列净/恩格列净/卡格列净），或联合使用。
cards.claim_en: For ASCVD or high cardiovascular risk independent of A1C: GLP-1RAs (dulaglutide/liraglutide/semaglutide) or SGLT2 inhibitors (canagliflozin/dapagliflozin/empagliflozin), or combination.
synonyms: 动脉粥样硬化性心血管疾病

cards.title: Heart failure: SGLT2i first-line; GLP-1RA (sema) for symptomatic HFpEF with obesity
cards.claim_zh: 对于心力衰竭患者：首选SGLT2抑制剂（卡格列净/达格列净/恩格列净/艾托格列净）。若为症状性HFpEF且肥胖，加用GLP-1RA（司美格鲁肽）。
cards.claim_en: For heart failure: SGLT2 inhibitors (canagliflozin/dapagliflozin/empagliflozin/ertugliflozin). GLP-1RA (semaglutide) if symptomatic and HFpEF with obesity.

cards.title: CKD eGFR 20-60: GLP-1RA or SGLT2i (or combo) as first-line
cards.claim_zh: 对于CKD患者（eGFR 20–60 ml/min/1.73m²和/或白蛋白尿ACR>30，已使用最大耐受剂量ACEi或ARB）：首选GLP-1RA（司美格鲁肽>利拉鲁肽>度拉糖肽）或SGLT2抑制剂（eGFR>20时可用），或联合使用。
cards.claim_en: For CKD with eGFR 20–60 ml/min/1.73m² and/or albuminuria (ACR > 30) on max tolerated ACEi or ARB: EITHER GLP-1RA (semaglutide > liraglutide > dulaglutide) OR SGLT2 inhibitor (canagliflozin/dapagliflozin/empagliflozin) with eGFR > 20, or combination.

cards.title: MASLD/MASH: GLP-1RA or GIP/GLP-1RA (esp if obese); pioglitazone (NOT if obese)
cards.claim_zh: 对于MASLD或MASH患者：使用GLP-1RA或GIP/GLP-1RA（尤其合并肥胖时）。吡格列酮（肥胖者不适用）。或GLP-1RA/吡格列酮联合。
cards.claim_en: For MASLD or MASH: GLP-1RA or GIP/GLP-1RA (especially if obese). Pioglitazone (NOT if obese). Or combination of GLP-1RA/pioglitazone.

cards.title: SGLT2i for CKD progression; reduced glycemic benefit at eGFR < 45
cards.claim_zh: 推荐使用SGLT2抑制剂预防CKD进展，但在eGFR < 45 ml/min/1.73m²时降糖获益减少。
cards.claim_en: SGLT2 inhibitor is recommended to prevent CKD progression, although glycemic benefit is reduced at eGFR < 45 ml/min/1.73m².

cards.title: CKD eGFR < 30: GLP-1RA preferred
cards.claim_zh: 若eGFR < 30 ml/min/1.73m²，优先选择GLP-1RA。
cards.claim_en: If eGFR < 30 ml/min/1.73m², GLP-1RA is preferred.

cards.title: GLP-1RA/GLP/GIP preferred over insulin when no insulin deficiency
cards.claim_zh: 在无胰岛素缺乏证据时，GLP-1RA或GLP/GIP双激动剂优先于胰岛素。
cards.claim_en: GLP-1RA or GLP/GIP dual agonist is PREFERRED to insulin when there is NO evidence of insulin deficiency.

cards.title: Insulin indicated for A1C > 10% or symptomatic hyperglycemia
cards.claim_zh: 当A1C > 10%或出现高血糖症状（多尿/多饮、体重减轻、高甘油三酯血症、酮症）时推荐使用胰岛素。
cards.claim_en: INSULIN is recommended for A1C > 10% or symptomatic hyperglycemia (polyuria/polydipsia, weight loss, hypertriglyceridemia, ketosis).

cards.title: If insulin used, combine with GLP-1RA or GLP/GIP
cards.claim_zh: 若使用胰岛素，推荐与GLP-1RA或GLP/GIP联合使用。
cards.claim_en: If insulin IS used, combination with GLP-1RA or GLP/GIP is recommended.

cards.title: Switching basal insulins: unit-to-unit, cut 10-20% if high hypo risk
cards.claim_zh: 基础胰岛素换药时：通常按等单位转换。对于血糖管理严格或低血糖高风险者，换药时减量10-20%。
cards.claim_en: When switching between basal insulins: usually unit-to-unit. In persons on tight management or high risk of hypoglycemia, cut dose 10–20% when switching.

cards.title: Over-basalization: >0.5 U/kg/day threshold REMOVED; assess by glucose patterns
cards.claim_zh: 评估基础胰岛素过量时，已移除基础剂量 > 0.5 U/kg/day的标准。改为通过以下指标评估：睡前至晨起血糖显著差异、餐前至餐后差异(> 50 mg/dL)、低血糖发生及高血糖变异性。
cards.claim_en: When assessing for over-basalization, the basal dose > 0.5 U/kg/day threshold has been REMOVED. Instead, assess by: significant bedtime-to-morning differences, pre-to-postprandial differences (> 50 mg/dL), hypoglycemia occurrence, and high glycemic variability.

cards.title: Initiating insulin: CONTINUE metformin/SGLT2i/GLP-1RA; STOP SFU/meglitinides/DPP-4i
cards.claim_zh: 启用胰岛素时：继续使用二甲双胍、SGLT2抑制剂和GLP-1RA。停用磺脲类、格列奈类和DPP-4抑制剂——这些药物对心血管/肾脏/体重/肝脏无额外获益，且增加低血糖和体重增加风险。
cards.claim_en: When initiating insulin: CONTINUE metformin, SGLT2 inhibitor, and GLP-1RA. STOP sulfonylureas, meglitinides, and DPP-4 inhibitors — they have no additional beneficial effects on CV/kidney/weight/liver and increase risk of hypoglycemia and weight gain.

cards.title: CV risk reduction: include glycemic, BP, lipid management plus CV/kidney-protective agents
cards.claim_zh: 为减少心血管并发症，需包含全部4项：(a)血糖管理，(b)血压管理，(c)血脂管理，(d)使用具有心血管和肾脏获益的药物（GLP-1RA和SGLT2抑制剂）。经ACC和AHA认可。
cards.claim_en: To reduce cardiovascular complications, include all 4: (a) Glycemic Management, (b) BP Management, (c) Lipid Management, (d) Use agents with CV and kidney benefit (GLP-1RA and SGLT2 inhibitors). Endorsed by ACC and AHA.

cards.title: Hypertension diagnosis criteria in diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 血压升高定义为收缩压>130 mmHg或舒张压>80 mmHg，或单次血压读数>180/110 mmHg
cards.claim_en: Elevated BP is defined as >130 mmHg systolic OR >80 mmHg diastolic, or a single BP reading >180/110 mmHg

cards.title: Blood pressure goal in diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 血压目标为<130/80 mmHg（如果可以安全达到）
cards.claim_en: BP goal is <130/80 mmHg if it can be done safely

cards.title: Lifestyle interventions for elevated BP
cards.claim_zh: 如果血压>120/80 mmHg，启动生活方式干预
cards.claim_en: Initiate lifestyle interventions if BP >120/80 mmHg

cards.title: ACE-I/ARB as first-line for CAD or albuminuria
cards.claim_zh: 如果有冠心病或UACR>30 mg/g，ACE-I或ARB是一线选择
cards.claim_en: ACE-I or ARB is FIRST LINE if CAD or UACR >30 mg/g

cards.title: Monitor SCr and potassium with ACE-I/ARB
cards.claim_zh: 使用ACE-I或ARB时需监测血清肌酐和钾
cards.claim_en: MONITOR SCr and Potassium when using ACE-I or ARB

cards.title: Avoid ACE-I/ARB in pregnancy without contraception
cards.claim_zh: 如果有生育能力且未避孕，避免使用ACE-I、ARB、MRA、脑啡肽酶抑制剂
cards.claim_en: AVOID ACE-I, ARB, MRAs, neprilysin inhibitors if childbearing potential without contraception

cards.title: Monitor with diuretics initiation
cards.claim_zh: 利尿剂：启动后7-14天监测血清肌酐/钾
cards.claim_en: DIURETICS: monitor Scr/potassium 7-14 days after initiation

cards.title: MRA for resistant hypertension
cards.claim_zh: MRA（螺内酯/依普利酮）– 用于顽固性高血压（如果已在使用3种推荐药物类别，且排除继发性原因）
cards.claim_en: MRA (spironolactone/eplerenone) – use for resistant HTN (if already on 3 recommended classes, and secondary causes ruled out)

cards.title: Beta-blocker indications
cards.claim_zh: β受体阻滞剂 – 仅用于既往心肌梗死、活动性心绞痛或射血分数降低的心力衰竭
cards.claim_en: Beta-blockers – only if prior MI, active angina, or HFrEF

cards.title: BP threshold for pregnancy treatment
cards.claim_zh: 妊娠期：如果血压>140/90 mmHg，启动治疗
cards.claim_en: In Pregnancy: Initiate therapy if BP >140/90 mmHg

cards.title: Safe antihypertensives in pregnancy
cards.claim_zh: 妊娠期被认为有效且安全的药物：甲基多巴、拉贝洛尔、缓释硝苯地平
cards.claim_en: Drugs considered effective and safe in pregnancy: methyldopa, labetalol, nifedipine ER

cards.title: Statin contraindication in pregnancy
cards.claim_zh: 新 – 避免在有生育能力且未使用可靠避孕措施的人群中使用他汀类药物
cards.claim_en: NEW – avoid statins in childbearing potential persons not using reliable contraception

cards.title: Hypertriglyceridemia Fasting Threshold
cards.claim_zh: 高甘油三酯血症定义为空腹甘油三酯 >150 mg/dL 或非空腹甘油三酯 >175 mg/dL。
cards.claim_en: Hypertriglyceridemia is defined as fasting triglycerides >150 mg/dL or non-fasting triglycerides >175 mg/dL.

cards.title: Hypertriglyceridemia Pancreatitis Risk
cards.claim_zh: 空腹甘油三酯 >500 mg/dL：评估继发性病因，考虑使用贝特类或鱼油以降低胰腺炎风险。
cards.claim_en: Fasting triglycerides >500 mg/dL: evaluate for secondary causes and consider fibrates or fish oil to reduce pancreatitis risk.

cards.title: Icosapent Ethyl for ASCVD with Elevated TG
cards.claim_zh: 对于合并ASCVD的患者，若甘油三酯为150-499 mg/dL，可考虑加用二十碳五烯酸乙酯（icosapent ethyl）。
cards.claim_en: In patients with ASCVD, addition of icosapent ethyl can be considered if triglycerides are 150–499 mg/dL.

cards.title: Secondary ASCVD Prevention LDL Goal
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病ASCVD二级预防：使用生活方式干预+高强度他汀治疗，将LDL-C从基线降低≥50%，目标<55 mg/dL（<1.4 mmol/L）。未达标者加用依折麦布或PCSK9靶向治疗。
cards.claim_en: For secondary prevention of ASCVD in diabetes: use lifestyle and high-intensity statin therapy to reduce LDL cholesterol by ≥50% from baseline to a goal of <55 mg/dL (<1.4 mmol/L). If not met, add ezetimibe or PCSK9-directed therapy.

cards.title: Statin Intolerance Alternative Lipid-Lowering
cards.claim_zh: 对他汀不耐受的糖尿病ASCVD患者，使用替代降脂治疗：PCSK9抑制剂单克隆抗体、贝培多酸（bempedoic acid）或PCSK9抑制剂siRNA英克司兰（inclisiran）。
cards.claim_en: For statin-intolerant patients with diabetes and ASCVD, use alternative lipid-lowering treatment: PCSK9 inhibitor monoclonal antibody, bempedoic acid, or PCSK9 inhibitor siRNA inclisiran.

cards.title: Heart Failure Prevention in Diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 降低糖尿病患者有症状性心衰风险：对高血压、近期MI/ACS或LVEF≤40%者使用ACEi/ARB+β受体阻滞剂。高心血管风险或已确诊CVD者加用SGLT2抑制剂。合并CKD者使用SGLT2或SGLT1/2抑制剂+非奈利酮（finerenone）。
cards.claim_en: To reduce risk of symptomatic heart failure in diabetes: use ACEi or ARB and β-blocker for hypertension, recent MI/ACS, or reduced LVEF ≤40%. If high risk for or established CVD, add SGLT2 inhibitor. If CKD, use SGLT2 or SGLT1/2 inhibitor and finerenone.

cards.title: SGLT2i DKA Education
cards.claim_zh: 对所有使用SGLT2抑制剂并采用生酮饮食的患者，教育其糖尿病酮症酸中毒（DKA）的症状和管理方法，包括生病时停药。
cards.claim_en: Educate all patients on SGLT2 inhibitors and ketogenic diets about DKA signs/symptoms and management, including holding the medication when ill.

cards.title: DKD Diagnosis Criteria
cards.claim_zh: 通过同时测量eGFR和白蛋白尿对糖尿病肾病（DKD）患者进行分类。需要3次尿白蛋白/肌酐比值（UACR）中2次异常才能确诊。
cards.claim_en: Categorize patients with diabetic kidney disease (DKD) by measuring BOTH eGFR and albuminuria. Require 2 of 3 urine albumin-to-creatinine ratio (UACR) results abnormal to confirm diagnosis.

cards.title: Albuminuria Reduction Goal in CKD
cards.claim_zh: 对于CKD且尿白蛋白>300 mg/天的患者，目标是将白蛋白尿降低≥30%并减缓CKD进展。
cards.claim_en: In patients with CKD and >300 mg/day urine albumin, the goal is to reduce albuminuria by ≥30% and to slow progression of CKD.

cards.title: ACE-I/ARB for Albuminuria in CKD
cards.claim_zh: CKD合并白蛋白尿（UACR >30 mg/g）患者应使用ACE-I或ARB。血压正常、UACR正常且eGFR正常者无需使用ACEI或ARB。
cards.claim_en: ACE-I or ARB is indicated for CKD patients with albuminuria (UACR >30 mg/g). There is NO NEED for ACEI or ARB in people with normal blood pressure, normal UACR, and normal eGFR.

cards.title: Finerenone Addition for CKD with eGFR >25
cards.claim_zh: 若已使用最大耐受剂量ACEI或ARB，且eGFR >25 ml/min，加用非奈利酮（finerenone，NSMRA）以改善心血管结局并减缓CKD进展。
cards.claim_en: If already on maximum tolerated ACEI or ARB, add finerenone (NSMRA) if eGFR >25 ml/min to improve cardiovascular outcomes and reduce progression of CKD.

cards.title: Monitor SCr and Potassium on RAAS/NSMRA
cards.claim_zh: 使用ACE-I、ARB或NSMRA（非奈利酮）的患者：监测血清肌酐（SCr）和血钾。
cards.claim_en: For patients on ACE-I or ARB or NSMRA (finerenone): monitor serum creatinine (SCr) and potassium.

cards.title: SGLT2i for CKD with eGFR and UACR Criteria
cards.claim_zh: 推荐eGFR <60 ml/min且UACR ≥200 mg/g（或任何白蛋白尿水平）的患者使用SGLT2抑制剂。eGFR <20 ml/min时禁止启用。
cards.claim_en: SGLT2 inhibitor is recommended for patients with eGFR <60 ml/min and UACR ≥200 mg/g (or any albuminuria level). Do NOT initiate if eGFR <20 ml/min.

cards.title: GLP-1 RA for Glycemia in CKD
cards.claim_zh: CKD患者的血糖管理应使用经证实有效的GLP-1受体激动剂（目前为司美格鲁肽/semaglutide）。
cards.claim_en: A GLP-1 receptor agonist with demonstrated benefit (semaglutide at this time) should be used for glycemia management in patients with CKD.
synonyms: GLP-1 RA for diabetic kidney disease

cards.title: Nephrology Referral Criteria in CKD
cards.claim_zh: 以下情况转诊肾内科：尿白蛋白持续升高或eGFR持续下降，或eGFR <30 ml/min。
cards.claim_en: Refer to nephrology if there is continuous increase in urinary albumin or decrease in eGFR, or if eGFR <30 ml/min.

cards.title: Retinopathy screening interval
cards.claim_zh: 诊断时进行首次散瞳全面眼科检查，若无视网膜病变证据且血糖达标，则每1至2年复查一次。
cards.claim_en: Initial dilated and comprehensive eye exam at diagnosis, then every 1 to 2 years if no evidence of retinopathy and glycemia is within goal range.

cards.title: Autonomic neuropathy screening criteria
cards.claim_zh: 建议增加自主神经病变筛查标准：询问直立性头晕、晕厥、早饱、勃起功能障碍、出汗模式改变、四肢皮肤干裂、静息心动过速；通过足部筛查评估外周动脉疾病。
cards.claim_en: Additional screening criteria for autonomic neuropathy recommended: ask about orthostatic dizziness, syncope, early satiety, ED, changes in sweating patterns, dry cracked skin in extremities, resting tachycardia; assess for PAD via foot screening.

cards.title: Neuropathy pharmacotherapy — avoid opioids
cards.claim_zh: 神经病变治疗药物包括加巴喷丁类、SNRIs、三环类抗抑郁药、钠通道阻滞剂。新建议：避免使用阿片类药物。
cards.claim_en: Neuropathy treatment medications include gabapentinoids, SNRIs, TCA, and sodium channel blockers. NEW recommendation: AVOID opioids.

cards.title: Annual neuropathy foot assessment — inspect every visit if sensory loss
cards.claim_zh: 每年进行远端对称性多发性神经病变评估：单丝试验、振动觉和血管评估。若存在任何感觉缺失，建议每次就诊时检查足部。
cards.claim_en: Annual distal symmetric polyneuropathy assessment with monofilament, vibration, and vascular assessment. If ANY sensory loss, recommend feet inspection at EVERY VISIT.

cards.title: Smoking cessation for PAD prevention re-enforced
cards.claim_zh: 再次强调：戒烟对预防外周动脉疾病的重要性。
cards.claim_en: Re-enforced: The importance of smoking cessation for PAD prevention.

cards.title: Older adults glycemic targets — A1C and TIR
cards.claim_zh: 健康状况良好且合并症少的老年人可采用成人血糖目标：A1C < 7-7.5%，TIR ~ 70%。使用4Ms框架进行个体化管理。
cards.claim_en: Older adults who are otherwise healthy with few coexisting chronic conditions can have adult glycemic goals of A1C < 7-7.5% and TIR ~ 70%. Individualize using the 4Ms framework.

cards.title: 4Ms framework for older adults with diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 对老年糖尿病患者采用老年友好健康系统的4Ms框架：认知（Mentation）、用药（Medications）、活动能力（Mobility）、最重要的事（what Matters Most）。
cards.claim_en: Use the 4Ms Framework of Age-Friendly Health Systems for older adults with diabetes: Mentation, Medications, Mobility, and what Matters Most.

cards.title: CKD + diabetes holistic drug therapy — SGLT2i and metformin first-line for T2D
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病合并CKD的一线药物治疗包括SGLT2抑制剂和二甲双胍（仅T2D）、RAS抑制剂、中高强度他汀。每3-6个月定期重新评估危险因素。
cards.claim_en: First-line drug therapy for people with diabetes and CKD includes SGLT2 inhibitor and metformin (T2D only), RAS inhibitor, and moderate- or high-intensity statin. Regular risk factor reassessment every 3-6 months.

cards.title: CKD + diabetes risk-based escalation therapy
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病合并CKD的基于风险的附加治疗包括GLP-1 RA（仅T2D）、非甾体MRA（仅T2D）、二氢吡啶类CCB、抗血栓/抗血小板药物、依折麦布/PCSK9i。
cards.claim_en: Additional risk-based therapy for diabetes and CKD includes GLP-1 RA (T2D only), nonsteroidal MRA (T2D only), dihydropyridine CCB, antithrombotic/antiplatelet agents, and ezetimibe/PCSK9i.

cards.title: A1C goal for children and adolescents
cards.claim_zh: 大多数儿童和青少年糖尿病患者的A1C目标 < 6.5%（新增）。
cards.claim_en: A1C goal < 6.5% for most children and adolescents with diabetes (NEW).

cards.title: Deintensification A1C targets to reduce hypoglycemia
cards.claim_zh: 减量目标：将A1C目标提高至 < 7.5% 或 < 8% 以降低低血糖风险。避免使用导致低血糖的药物，改用低风险药物。
cards.claim_en: Deintensification goals: increase A1C target to < 7.5% or < 8% to reduce risk of hypoglycemia. AVOID hypoglycemia-causing medications; switch to those with lower risks.

cards.title: New-onset youth T2D with A1C < 8.5%: start metformin
cards.claim_zh: 对于超重/肥胖青少年新发糖尿病疑诊T2D：若A1C < 8.5%（无酸中毒/酮症），开始二甲双胍治疗，滴定至2,000 mg/天。
cards.claim_en: For new-onset diabetes in youth with overweight/obesity and clinical suspicion of type 2 diabetes: if A1C < 8.5% (no acidosis/ketosis), start metformin titrating up to 2,000 mg/day.

cards.title: New-onset youth T2D with A1C >= 8.5%: metformin + basal insulin
cards.claim_zh: 对于超重/肥胖青少年新发糖尿病，A1C >= 8.5%（无酸中毒/酮症）：开始二甲双胍（最高2,000 mg/天）联合长效胰岛素0.5单位/kg/天，每2-3天根据血糖监测结果滴定。
cards.claim_en: For new-onset diabetes in youth with overweight/obesity and A1C >= 8.5% (no acidosis/ketosis): start metformin (up to 2,000 mg/day) AND long-acting insulin at 0.5 units/kg/day, titrate every 2-3 days based on BGM.

cards.title: Pancreatic autoantibody testing to distinguish T1D vs T2D
cards.claim_zh: 所有疑诊T2D的青少年新发糖尿病患者均应检测胰岛自身抗体。若阳性，按T1D治疗（多针注射或胰岛素泵），停用二甲双胍。
cards.claim_en: For all new-onset youth with suspected type 2 diabetes, test pancreatic autoantibodies. If positive, treat as type 1 diabetes (MDI or pump) and discontinue metformin.

cards.title: Escalated total daily insulin can exceed 1 unit/kg/day
cards.claim_zh: 若仅使用长效胰岛素且A1C目标未达标，可加用餐时胰岛素；每日总胰岛素量可超过1单位/kg/天。
cards.claim_en: If using long-acting insulin only and A1C goals are not met, add prandial insulin if needed; total daily insulin may exceed 1 unit/kg/day.

cards.title: LDL goal for youth with diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 儿童和青少年糖尿病患者LDL目标 < 100 mg/dL。使用年龄批准的他汀类药物（> 6岁可用瑞舒伐他汀）联合生活方式干预。
cards.claim_en: For children and adolescents with diabetes, LDL goal is < 100 mg/dL. Use age-approved statins (rosuvastatin for patients > 6 years old) with lifestyle changes.

cards.title: GLP-1 RAs for adolescents >= 12 years old
cards.claim_zh: GLP-1受体激动剂批准用于> 12岁青少年（联合二甲双胍）：利拉鲁肽（诺和力）、艾塞那肽（百达达）、司美格鲁肽（诺和盈）。
cards.claim_en: GLP-1 receptor agonists approved for adolescents > 12 years old (in addition to metformin): liraglutide (Victoza), exenatide (Bydureon), and semaglutide (Wegovy).

cards.title: Dulaglutide approved for adolescents >= 10 years old
cards.claim_zh: 度拉糖肽（度易达）批准用于> 10岁青少年，作为二甲双胍的联合用药。
cards.claim_en: Dulaglutide (Trulicity) is approved for adolescents > 10 years old as add-on to metformin.

cards.title: SGLT2 inhibitor empagliflozin for adolescents >= 10 years
cards.claim_zh: SGLT2抑制剂恩格列净（欧唐静）可用于>= 10岁青少年。在强化胰岛素治疗前优先考虑非胰岛素药物（GLP-1 RA或SGLT2i）以减少体重增加。
cards.claim_en: SGLT2 inhibitor empagliflozin (Jardiance) is available for youth >= 10 years old. Consider non-insulin agents (GLP-1 RAs or SGLT2i) before intensifying insulin to minimize weight gain.

cards.title: Avoid vaping and cannabis in youth with diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 新增建议：儿童和青少年糖尿病患者应避免电子烟和大麻。
cards.claim_en: NEW recommendation: children and adolescents with diabetes should avoid vaping and avoid cannabis.

cards.title: Pregnancy glycemic goal: fasting glucose
cards.claim_zh: 所有合并糖尿病的孕妇（1型、2型、GDM），空腹血糖目标 <95 mg/dL（范围 70–95 mg/dL）。
cards.claim_en: For all pregnant persons with diabetes (T1, T2, GDM), fasting glucose goal is <95 mg/dL (range 70–95 mg/dL).

cards.title: Pregnancy glycemic goal: 1-hour postprandial glucose
cards.claim_zh: 所有合并糖尿病的孕妇，餐后1小时血糖目标 <140 mg/dL（范围 110–140 mg/dL）。
cards.claim_en: For all pregnant persons with diabetes, 1-hour postprandial glucose goal is <140 mg/dL (range 110–140 mg/dL).
synonyms: 孕期餐后1小时血糖目标

cards.title: Pregnancy glycemic goal: 2-hour postprandial glucose
cards.claim_zh: 所有合并糖尿病的孕妇，餐后2小时血糖目标 <120 mg/dL（范围 100–120 mg/dL）。
cards.claim_en: For all pregnant persons with diabetes, 2-hour postprandial glucose goal is <120 mg/dL (range 100–120 mg/dL).
synonyms: 孕期餐后2小时血糖目标

cards.title: Pregnancy CGM target range
cards.claim_zh: 使用CGM的糖尿病孕妇，目标葡萄糖范围为 63–140 mg/dL。
cards.claim_en: For pregnant persons with diabetes using CGM, the target glucose range is 63–140 mg/dL.

cards.title: Pregnancy CGM time below range
cards.claim_zh: 使用CGM的糖尿病孕妇，低于范围时间目标 <4%，其中低于54 mg/dL的时间 <1%。
cards.claim_en: For pregnant persons with diabetes using CGM, time below range goal is <4%, with <1% below 54 mg/dL.

cards.title: Pregnancy CGM time above range
cards.claim_zh: 使用CGM的糖尿病孕妇，高于范围时间目标 <25%。
cards.claim_en: For pregnant persons with diabetes using CGM, time above range goal is <25%.

cards.title: Pregnancy A1C goal
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病孕妇A1C目标 <6%，因红细胞更新加快导致A1C偏低。
cards.claim_en: For pregnant persons with diabetes, A1C goal is <6% due to increased RBC turnover lowering A1C.
synonyms: 孕期糖化血红蛋白目标

cards.title: Pregnancy blood pressure goal
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病孕妇血压目标 110–135/85 mmHg。
cards.claim_en: For pregnant persons with diabetes, blood pressure goal is 110–135/85 mmHg.

cards.title: Pregnancy blood pressure treatment threshold
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病孕妇血压 >140/90 mmHg 时需启动治疗。
cards.claim_en: For pregnant persons with diabetes, treat blood pressure if >140/90 mmHg.

cards.title: Metformin/glyburide not first-line in pregnancy
cards.claim_zh: 妊娠期高血糖不应将二甲双胍和格列本脲作为一线治疗；推荐生活方式干预和胰岛素。
cards.claim_en: Hyperglycemia in pregnancy should NOT be treated with metformin and glyburide as first-line agents; lifestyle intervention and insulin are recommended.

cards.title: Stop metformin for PCOS after first trimester
cards.claim_zh: 因PCOS服用二甲双胍的孕妇，应在妊娠第一孕期后停用二甲双胍。
cards.claim_en: For pregnant persons with PCOS on metformin, metformin should be stopped after the 1st trimester.

cards.title: Pregnancy folic acid supplementation
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病孕妇推荐补充叶酸 400–800 mcg/天。
cards.claim_en: Folic acid supplementation of 400–800 mcg/day is recommended for pregnant persons with diabetes.

cards.title: Hospital glucose treatment threshold
cards.claim_zh: 住院糖尿病患者，血糖 >180 mg/dL 时应启动治疗。
cards.claim_en: In hospitalized patients with diabetes, treatment should start at a glucose threshold of >180 mg/dL.

cards.title: Critically ill hospital glucose target
cards.claim_zh: 危重症住院糖尿病患者血糖目标范围 140–180 mg/dL，推荐持续静脉胰岛素输注。
cards.claim_en: For critically ill hospitalized patients with diabetes, the glucose target range is 140–180 mg/dL, with continuous IV insulin infusion recommended.

cards.title: Non-critically ill hospital glucose target
cards.claim_zh: 非危重症住院糖尿病患者血糖目标范围 100–180 mg/dL。首选方案为基础胰岛素+餐时胰岛素+校正剂量。
cards.claim_en: For non-critically ill hospitalized patients with diabetes, the glucose target range is 100–180 mg/dL. Preferred regimen is basal, prandial, with correction insulin doses.
synonyms: 非危重症住院血糖目标

cards.title: Number of Days CGM Worn
cards.claim_zh: 佩戴CGM天数是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的标准化CGM指标之一。
cards.claim_en: Number of Days CGM Worn is a standardized CGM metric defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Percentage of Time CGM Active
cards.claim_zh: CGM活跃时间百分比是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的标准化CGM指标之一。
cards.claim_en: Percentage of time CGM is active is a standardized CGM metric defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Mean Glucose
cards.claim_zh: 平均血糖是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的标准化CGM指标之一。
cards.claim_en: Mean Glucose is a standardized CGM metric defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Estimated A1c (eA1C)
cards.claim_zh: 估算糖化血红蛋白(eA1C)是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的标准化CGM指标之一。
cards.claim_en: Estimated A1c (eA1C) is a standardized CGM metric defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Glycemic Variability (%CV or SD)
cards.claim_zh: 血糖变异度（%CV或SD）是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的标准化CGM指标之一。
cards.claim_en: Glycemic Variability measured as %CV or SD is a standardized CGM metric defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Time >250 mg/dL (>13.9 mmol/L)
cards.claim_zh: 时间>250 mg/dL（>13.9 mmol/L）是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的重度高血糖标准化CGM指标。
cards.claim_en: Time >250 mg/dL (>13.9 mmol/L) is a standardized CGM metric for severe hyperglycemia defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Time >180 mg/dL (>10.0 mmol/L)
cards.claim_zh: 时间>180 mg/dL（>10.0 mmol/L）是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的高血糖时间（TAR）标准化指标。
cards.claim_en: Time >180 mg/dL (>10.0 mmol/L) is a standardized CGM metric for hyperglycemia (Time Above Range, TAR) defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Time in Range (TIR) 70-180 mg/dL
cards.claim_zh: 时间70-180 mg/dL（3.9-10.0 mmol/L）即目标范围内时间（TIR），是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的标准化指标。
cards.claim_en: Time 70-180 mg/dL (3.9-10.0 mmol/L) is a standardized CGM metric for Time in Range (TIR) defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Time <70 mg/dL (<3.9 mmol/L)
cards.claim_zh: 时间<70 mg/dL（<3.9 mmol/L）是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的低血糖时间（TBR 1级）标准化指标。
cards.claim_en: Time <70 mg/dL (<3.9 mmol/L) is a standardized CGM metric for hypoglycemia (Time Below Range, TBR level 1) defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Time <54 mg/dL (<3.0 mmol/L)
cards.claim_zh: 时间<54 mg/dL（<3.0 mmol/L）是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的临床显著低血糖时间（TBR 2级）标准化指标。
cards.claim_en: Time <54 mg/dL (<3.0 mmol/L) is a standardized CGM metric for clinically significant hypoglycemia (TBR level 2) defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: LBGI & HBGI Risk Indices
cards.claim_zh: 低血糖指数（LBGI）和高血糖指数（HBGI）是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的标准化风险指数。
cards.claim_en: Low Blood Glucose Index (LBGI) and High Blood Glucose Index (HBGI) are standardized CGM risk indices defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Hypoglycemia and Hyperglycemia Episodes (15 min)
cards.claim_zh: 低血糖和高血糖发作次数（以15分钟为阈值）是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的标准化CGM指标。
cards.claim_en: Episodes of hypoglycemia and hyperglycemia (using a 15 min threshold) are standardized CGM metrics defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Area Under the Curve (AUC)
cards.claim_zh: 曲线下面积（AUC）是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的标准化CGM指标之一。
cards.claim_en: Area under the curve (AUC) is a standardized CGM metric defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Time Blocks (24-h, day, night)
cards.claim_zh: 时间段（24小时、白天、夜间）是2017年CGM指标国际共识定义的标准化CGM指标之一。
cards.claim_en: Time Blocks (24-hour, day, night) are standardized CGM metrics defined by the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Ambulatory Glucose Profile (AGP) for CGM Reporting
cards.claim_zh: 动态血糖谱（AGP）被推荐作为CGM报告的可视化工具，为2017年CGM指标国际共识的一部分。
cards.claim_en: The Ambulatory Glucose Profile (AGP) is recommended for CGM report visualization as part of the 2017 International Consensus on CGM Metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Three Requirements for Effective CGM Data Use
cards.claim_zh: 有效利用CGM数据以优化临床结局需要：1）评估CGM血糖状态的共同指标；2）血糖数据和CGM每日图谱的图形化可视化；3）明确的循证临床目标。
cards.claim_en: Effective use of CGM data to optimize clinical outcomes requires: 1) common metrics for assessment of CGM glycemic status; 2) graphical visualization of the glucose data and CGM daily profile; and 3) clear evidence-based clinical targets.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: ATTD 2017 International Panel on CGM Metrics
cards.claim_zh: 2017年2月，糖尿病先进技术与治疗大会（ATTD）召集了国际专家临床医生和研究人员小组，定义了评估CGM数据的核心指标。
cards.claim_en: In February 2017, the Advanced Technologies and Treatments for Diabetes (ATTD) Congress convened an international panel of expert clinicians and researchers to define core metrics for assessing CGM data.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: CGM Minimum Wear Duration
cards.claim_zh: 为确保血糖数据解读的准确性，建议连续佩戴CGM至少14天。
cards.claim_en: A minimum of 14 days of CGM wear is recommended for accurate glucose data interpretation.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: CGM Active Data Threshold
cards.claim_zh: CGM在14天佩戴期间应至少有70%的时间处于活跃状态，以确保数据可靠性。
cards.claim_en: CGM should be active for at least 70% of the 14-day wear period to ensure data reliability.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Glycemic Variability Target %CV
cards.claim_zh: 血糖变异性目标为%CV ≤36%。部分研究表明，对于使用胰岛素或磺脲类药物的患者，更低的目标（<33%）可提供额外的低血糖保护。
cards.claim_en: Glycemic variability target is %CV ≤36%. Some studies suggest lower targets (<33%) provide additional protection against hypoglycemia for those receiving insulin or sulfonylureas.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TAR Level 2: >250 mg/dL
cards.claim_zh: 高于范围时间2级定义为血糖读数及时间 >250 mg/dL（>13.9 mmol/L）的百分比。
cards.claim_en: Time Above Range Level 2 is defined as percentage of readings and time >250 mg/dL (>13.9 mmol/L).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TAR Level 1: 181-250 mg/dL
cards.claim_zh: 高于范围时间1级定义为血糖读数及时间 181-250 mg/dL（10.1-13.9 mmol/L）的百分比。
cards.claim_en: Time Above Range Level 1 is defined as percentage of readings and time 181-250 mg/dL (10.1-13.9 mmol/L).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Time In Range (TIR): 70-180 mg/dL
cards.claim_zh: 目标范围内时间（TIR）定义为血糖读数及时间 70-180 mg/dL（3.9-10.0 mmol/L）的百分比。
cards.claim_en: Time In Range (TIR) is defined as percentage of readings and time 70-180 mg/dL (3.9-10.0 mmol/L).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR Level 1: 54-69 mg/dL
cards.claim_zh: 低于范围时间1级定义为血糖读数及时间 54-69 mg/dL（3.0-3.8 mmol/L）的百分比。
cards.claim_en: Time Below Range Level 1 is defined as percentage of readings and time 54-69 mg/dL (3.0-3.8 mmol/L).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR Level 2: <54 mg/dL
cards.claim_zh: 低于范围时间2级定义为血糖读数及时间 <54 mg/dL（<3.0 mmol/L）的百分比。
cards.claim_en: Time Below Range Level 2 is defined as percentage of readings and time <54 mg/dL (<3.0 mmol/L).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: 70% CGM Use Correlates with 3-Month Metrics
cards.claim_zh: 近14天内CGM使用率>70%与3个月的平均血糖、范围内时间和高血糖指标强相关。
cards.claim_en: >70% use of CGM over the recent 14 days correlates strongly with 3 months of mean glucose, time in ranges, and hyperglycemia metrics.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Type 1 Diabetes Weaker Hypoglycemia Correlations
cards.claim_zh: 在1型糖尿病患者中，14天CGM数据与3个月结局在低血糖和血糖变异性方面的相关性较弱；更长的采样周期并未显示能提高这些相关性。
cards.claim_en: In individuals with type 1 diabetes, correlations between 14-day CGM data and 3-month outcomes are weaker for hypoglycemia and glycemic variability; longer sampling periods have not been shown to increase these correlations.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Variable Glycemic Control Needs Longer CGM Period
cards.claim_zh: 对于血糖控制变异性较大的个体，可能需要更长的CGM数据采集周期（如4周）以评估低血糖暴露。
cards.claim_en: Longer CGM data collection periods (e.g., 4 weeks) may be required for individuals with more variable glycemic control to investigate hypoglycemia exposure.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR target for Type 1 / Type 2 diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型/2型糖尿病，推荐的葡萄糖目标范围内时间（TIR）目标为>70%的读数（>16小时48分钟/天），目标血糖范围为70–180 mg/dL（3.9–10.0 mmol/L）。
cards.claim_en: For Type 1 / Type 2 diabetes, the recommended time in range (TIR) target is >70% of readings (>16 hr 48 min/day), with a target glucose range of 70–180 mg/dL (3.9–10.0 mmol/L).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR <70 mg/dL target for Type 1 / Type 2
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型/2型糖尿病，血糖<70 mg/dL（<3.9 mmol/L）的低于目标范围时间（TBR）应<4%（<1小时/天）。
cards.claim_en: For Type 1 / Type 2 diabetes, time below range (TBR) for glucose <70 mg/dL (<3.9 mmol/L) should be <4% (<1 hr/day).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR <54 mg/dL (clinically significant hypoglycemia) target for Type 1 / Type 2
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型/2型糖尿病，血糖<54 mg/dL（<3.0 mmol/L）的低于目标范围时间（TBR）应<1%（<15分钟/天）。
cards.claim_en: For Type 1 / Type 2 diabetes, time below range (TBR) for glucose <54 mg/dL (<3.0 mmol/L) should be <1% (<15 min/day).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TAR >180 mg/dL target for Type 1 / Type 2
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型/2型糖尿病，血糖>180 mg/dL（>10.0 mmol/L）的高于目标范围时间（TAR）应<25%（<6小时/天）。
cards.claim_en: For Type 1 / Type 2 diabetes, time above range (TAR) for glucose >180 mg/dL (>10.0 mmol/L) should be <25% (<6 hr/day).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TAR >250 mg/dL target for Type 1 / Type 2
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型/2型糖尿病，血糖>250 mg/dL（>13.9 mmol/L）的高于目标范围时间（TAR）应<5%（<1小时12分钟/天）。
cards.claim_en: For Type 1 / Type 2 diabetes, time above range (TAR) for glucose >250 mg/dL (>13.9 mmol/L) should be <5% (<1 hr 12 min/day).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR target for older/high-risk Type 1 / Type 2
cards.claim_zh: 对于老年/高风险1型/2型糖尿病患者，推荐的TIR目标为>50%的读数（>12小时/天），目标血糖范围为70–180 mg/dL（3.9–10.0 mmol/L）。
cards.claim_en: For older/high-risk Type 1 / Type 2 individuals, the recommended TIR target is >50% of readings (>12 hr/day), with a target glucose range of 70–180 mg/dL (3.9–10.0 mmol/L).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR <70 mg/dL target for older/high-risk
cards.claim_zh: 对于老年/高风险1型/2型糖尿病患者，血糖<70 mg/dL（<3.9 mmol/L）的TBR应<1%（<15分钟/天）。
cards.claim_en: For older/high-risk Type 1 / Type 2 individuals, TBR for glucose <70 mg/dL (<3.9 mmol/L) should be <1% (<15 min/day).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TAR >250 mg/dL target for older/high-risk
cards.claim_zh: 对于老年/高风险1型/2型糖尿病患者，血糖>250 mg/dL（>13.9 mmol/L）的TAR应<10%（<2小时24分钟/天）。
cards.claim_en: For older/high-risk Type 1 / Type 2 individuals, TAR for glucose >250 mg/dL (>13.9 mmol/L) should be <10% (<2 hr 24 min/day).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Clinically significant benefit per 5% TIR increase (Type 1/Type 2)
cards.claim_zh: TIR每增加5个百分点，与1型/2型糖尿病的临床显著获益相关。
cards.claim_en: Each incremental 5% increase in TIR is associated with clinically significant benefits for Type 1 / Type 2 diabetes.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR target for pregnancy Type 1
cards.claim_zh: 对于妊娠期1型糖尿病，推荐的TIR目标为>70%（>16小时48分钟/天），目标血糖范围为63–140 mg/dL（3.5–7.8 mmol/L）。妊娠期间血糖水平生理性降低。
cards.claim_en: For pregnancy Type 1 diabetes, the recommended TIR target is >70% (>16 hr 48 min/day), with a target glucose range of 63–140 mg/dL (3.5–7.8 mmol/L). Glucose levels are physiologically lower during pregnancy.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR <63 mg/dL target for pregnancy Type 1
cards.claim_zh: 对于妊娠期1型糖尿病，血糖<63 mg/dL（<3.5 mmol/L）的TBR应<4%（<1小时/天）。妊娠期间血糖水平生理性降低。
cards.claim_en: For pregnancy Type 1 diabetes, TBR for glucose <63 mg/dL (<3.5 mmol/L) should be <4% (<1 hr/day). Glucose levels are physiologically lower during pregnancy.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR <54 mg/dL (clinically significant) target for pregnancy Type 1
cards.claim_zh: 对于妊娠期1型糖尿病，血糖<54 mg/dL（<3.0 mmol/L）的TBR应<1%（<15分钟/天）。
cards.claim_en: For pregnancy Type 1 diabetes, TBR for glucose <54 mg/dL (<3.0 mmol/L) should be <1% (<15 min/day).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TAR >140 mg/dL target for pregnancy Type 1
cards.claim_zh: 对于妊娠期1型糖尿病，血糖>140 mg/dL（>7.8 mmol/L）的TAR应<25%（<6小时/天）。
cards.claim_en: For pregnancy Type 1 diabetes, TAR for glucose >140 mg/dL (>7.8 mmol/L) should be <25% (<6 hr/day).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR target for pregnancy Type 2 / GDM
cards.claim_zh: 对于妊娠期2型/GDM，目标血糖范围为63–140 mg/dL（3.5–7.8 mmol/L）。具体的TIR/TBR/TAR百分比参考妊娠章节。目标范围内时间百分比基于有限证据。
cards.claim_en: For pregnancy Type 2 / GDM, the target glucose range is 63–140 mg/dL (3.5–7.8 mmol/L). Specific TIR/TBR/TAR percentages are referenced to the Pregnancy section. Percentages of time in range are based on limited evidence.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Clinically significant benefit per 5% TIR increase (pregnancy Type 1)
cards.claim_zh: TIR每增加5个百分点，与妊娠期1型糖尿病的临床显著获益相关。
cards.claim_en: Each incremental 5% increase in TIR is associated with clinically significant benefits for Pregnancy Type 1.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Type 2 diabetes has less glycemic variability and hypoglycemia than type 1
cards.claim_zh: 2型糖尿病患者的血糖变异性通常低于1型糖尿病(46)。因此，2型糖尿病患者通常可以在减少低血糖的同时获得更多目标范围内时间(4)。
cards.claim_en: In type 2 diabetes, there is generally less glycemic variability and hypoglycemia than in type 1 diabetes (46). Thus, people with type 2 diabetes can often achieve more time in target range while minimizing hypoglycemia (4).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: CGM use in type 2 diabetes: TIR improved 10.3% (Beck et al.)
cards.claim_zh: Beck等人研究显示，2型糖尿病患者在使用CGM 24周后，TIR提高了10.3%（从55.6%升至61.3%），同时TBR略有下降(4)。
cards.claim_en: As demonstrated by Beck et al., individuals with type 2 diabetes increased their TIR by 10.3% (from 55.6% to 61.3%) after 24 weeks of CGM use with slight reductions in TBR (4).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Type 1 and type 2 diabetes targets combined into one set
cards.claim_zh: 1型和2型糖尿病的目标值足够接近，因此合并为一组目标（妊娠期除外）。
cards.claim_en: Targets for type 1 diabetes and type 2 diabetes were close enough to combine them into one set of targets, outside of pregnancy.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Type 1 targets informed by hybrid closed-loop therapy capability
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型糖尿病患者，其目标值的设定参考了混合闭环疗法达到这些目标的能力(11)，首个商业化混合闭环系统已经上市。
cards.claim_en: For people with type 1 diabetes, the targets are informed by the ability to reach the targets with hybrid closed-loop therapy (11), the first example of which is now commercially available.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: CGM with MDI can reach TIR targets in type 1 diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 近期研究表明，使用多次每日注射(MDI)的个体也有可能通过CGM达到这些目标(6)。
cards.claim_en: Recent studies have shown the potential of reaching these targets with CGM in individuals using multiple daily injections (MDI) (6).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: SGLT-2 agents help type 1 diabetes increase TIR
cards.claim_zh: 新型药物如钠-葡萄糖协同转运蛋白2(SGLT-2)抑制剂的有益效果已帮助1型糖尿病患者提高TIR(49-51)。
cards.claim_en: The beneficial effects of new medications, such as sodium glucose cotransporter-2 (SGLT-2) agents have helped individuals with type 1 diabetes increase TIR (49-51).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR target: T1/T2 diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型和2型糖尿病成人患者，推荐的目标范围内时间（TIR）为70-180 mg/dL（3.9-10.0 mmol/L）范围内的时间>70%。
cards.claim_en: For adults with Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes, the recommended time in range (TIR) is >70% of time spent within 70-180 mg/dL (3.9-10.0 mmol/L).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR target: T1/T2 diabetes (<70 mg/dL)
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型和2型糖尿病成人患者，低于70 mg/dL（<3.9 mmol/L）的低血糖时间（TBR）应<4%。
cards.claim_en: For adults with Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes, time below range (TBR) at <70 mg/dL (<3.9 mmol/L) should be <4%.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR target: older/high-risk T1/T2
cards.claim_zh: 对于老年和/或高风险的1型或2型糖尿病患者，推荐的目标范围内时间（TIR）为70-180 mg/dL（3.9-10.0 mmol/L）范围内的时间>50%。
cards.claim_en: For older and/or high-risk individuals with Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes, the recommended time in range (TIR) at 70-180 mg/dL (3.9-10.0 mmol/L) is >50%.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR target: older/high-risk T1/T2 (<70 mg/dL)
cards.claim_zh: 对于老年和/或高风险的1型或2型糖尿病患者，低于70 mg/dL（<3.9 mmol/L）的低血糖时间（TBR）应<1%，更强调减少低血糖发生。
cards.claim_en: For older and/or high-risk individuals with Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes, time below range (TBR) at <70 mg/dL (<3.9 mmol/L) should be <1%, placing greater emphasis on reducing hypoglycemia.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR pregnancy target: GDM/T2 (tight range)
cards.claim_zh: 对于妊娠期糖尿病或2型糖尿病妊娠期患者，目标范围内时间（TIR）目标为>70%，范围为更严格的63-140 mg/dL（3.5-7.8 mmol/L）。
cards.claim_en: For pregnancy with gestational diabetes or Type 2 diabetes, the time in range (TIR) target is >70% within a tighter range of 63-140 mg/dL (3.5-7.8 mmol/L).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR correlates with diabetes complications
cards.claim_zh: 近期研究表明，TIR（70-180 mg/dL [3.9-10.0 mmol/L]）与糖尿病并发症存在相关性，且TIR与A1C之间也存在关联。
cards.claim_en: Recent studies have shown correlations of TIR (70-180 mg/dL [3.9-10.0 mmol/L]) with diabetes complications, as well as a relationship between TIR and A1C.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR reduction and diabetic retinopathy progression hazard
cards.claim_zh: 基于DCCT数据集（7点血糖谱），TIR每降低10%，糖尿病视网膜病变进展的风险比增加64%（Beck等）。
cards.claim_en: The hazard rate for diabetic retinopathy progression increased by 64% for each 10% reduction in TIR, based on the DCCT data set with 7-point blood glucose profiles (Beck et al.).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR reduction and microalbuminuria development hazard
cards.claim_zh: 基于DCCT数据集，TIR每降低10%，微量白蛋白尿发生的风险比增加40%（Beck等）。
cards.claim_en: The hazard rate for microalbuminuria development increased by 40% for each 10% reduction in TIR, based on the DCCT data set (Beck et al.).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Glucose thresholds linked to severe hypoglycemia risk
cards.claim_zh: 对DCCT数据集的事后分析显示，血糖水平<70 mg/dL（<3.9 mmol/L）和<54 mg/dL（<3.0 mmol/L）与严重低血糖风险增加相关。
cards.claim_en: A post-hoc analysis of the DCCT data set showed a link between glucose levels of <70 mg/dL (<3.9 mmol/L) and <54 mg/dL (<3.0 mmol/L) and an increased risk for severe hypoglycemia.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: DR prevalence decreases with increasing TIR in type 2 diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 在一项针对3,262名2型糖尿病患者的研究中，视网膜病变程度越严重的患者（VTDR、中度NPDR、轻度NPDR）在目标血糖范围70-180 mg/dL（3.9-10.0 mmol/L）内的时间显著更短，DR患病率随TIR升高而降低（Lu等）。
cards.claim_en: In a study of 3,262 individuals with type 2 diabetes, individuals with more advanced diabetic retinopathy (VTDR, moderate NPDR, mild NPDR) spent significantly less time within the target glucose range of 70-180 mg/dL (3.9-10.0 mmol/L), and prevalence of DR decreased with increasing TIR (Lu et al.).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR 70% corresponds to A1C approximately 7%
cards.claim_zh: 在一项涵盖545名1型糖尿病成人的四项随机试验分析中，TIR（70-180 mg/dL [3.9-10.0 mmol/L]）70%与A1C约7%（53 mmol/mol）强相关。
cards.claim_en: In an analysis of four randomized trials encompassing 545 adults with type 1 diabetes, a TIR (70-180 mg/dL [3.9-10.0 mmol/L]) of 70% strongly corresponded with an A1C of approximately 7% (53 mmol/mol).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR 50% corresponds to A1C approximately 8%
cards.claim_zh: 在同一项四项随机试验分析中（545名1型糖尿病成人），TIR 50%与A1C约8%（64 mmol/mol）强相关。
cards.claim_en: In the same analysis of four randomized trials (545 adults with type 1 diabetes), a TIR of 50% strongly corresponded with an A1C of approximately 8% (64 mmol/mol).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: 10% TIR increase corresponds to 0.5% A1C decrease
cards.claim_zh: TIR每增加10%（每天2.4小时），A1C约降低0.5%（5.0 mmol/mol），基于四项1型糖尿病随机试验数据。
cards.claim_en: An increase in TIR of 10% (2.4 hours per day) corresponded to a decrease in A1C of approximately 0.5% (5.0 mmol/mol), based on data from four randomized trials in type 1 diabetes.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR-A1C association confirmed across 18 RCTs
cards.claim_zh: Vigersky等对18项随机对照试验（纳入超过2,500名1型和2型糖尿病患者，覆盖广泛年龄和A1C水平）的分析显示了相似的TIR-A1C关联。
cards.claim_en: Similar TIR-A1C associations were seen in an analysis of 18 RCTs by Vigersky et al. that included over 2,500 individuals with type 1 diabetes and type 2 diabetes over a wide range of ages and A1C levels.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR-A1C linear relationship in type 1 diabetes (Beck et al.)
cards.claim_zh: 在1型糖尿病患者中（n=545），TIR（70-180 mg/dL）每增加10%，A1C约降低0.5%（5.5 mmol/mol）。TIR 50%时A1C约7.9%（63 mmol/mol）；TIR 70%时A1C约7.0%（53 mmol/mol）；TIR 80%时A1C约6.5%（48 mmol/mol）。
cards.claim_en: In type 1 diabetes (n=545), every 10% increase in TIR (70-180 mg/dL) corresponds to approximately 0.5% (5.5 mmol/mol) reduction in A1C. At 50% TIR, estimated A1C is 7.9% (63 mmol/mol); at 70% TIR, A1C is 7.0% (53 mmol/mol); at 80% TIR, A1C is 6.5% (48 mmol/mol).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR-A1C linear relationship in type 1 and type 2 diabetes (Vigersky et al.)
cards.claim_zh: 在1型和2型糖尿病患者中（n=1,137），TIR（70-180 mg/dL）每增加10%，A1C约降低0.8%（8.7 mmol/mol）。TIR 50%时A1C约8.3%（67 mmol/mol）；TIR 70%时A1C约6.7%（50 mmol/mol）；TIR 80%时A1C约5.9%（42 mmol/mol）。
cards.claim_en: In type 1 and type 2 diabetes combined (n=1,137), every 10% increase in TIR (70-180 mg/dL) corresponds to approximately 0.8% (8.7 mmol/mol) reduction in A1C. At 50% TIR, estimated A1C is 8.3% (67 mmol/mol); at 70% TIR, A1C is 6.7% (50 mmol/mol); at 80% TIR, A1C is 5.9% (42 mmol/mol).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR 70% corresponds to A1C ~7.0% in type 1 diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 在1型糖尿病中，TIR 70%（70-180 mg/dL）对应的A1C约为7.0%（53 mmol/mol）（95% CI: 5.6-8.3%）。
cards.claim_en: A TIR of 70% (70-180 mg/dL) corresponds to an estimated A1C of 7.0% (53 mmol/mol) in type 1 diabetes (95% CI: 5.6-8.3%).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR 80% corresponds to A1C ~6.5% in type 1 diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 在1型糖尿病中，TIR 80%（70-180 mg/dL）对应的A1C约为6.5%（48 mmol/mol）（95% CI: 5.2-7.8%）。
cards.claim_en: A TIR of 80% (70-180 mg/dL) corresponds to an estimated A1C of 6.5% (48 mmol/mol) in type 1 diabetes (95% CI: 5.2-7.8%).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Pregnancy TIR 70-140 mg/dL: first trimester ~50%, third trimester ~60%
cards.claim_zh: 在1型糖尿病孕妇中（瑞典/CONCEPTT数据），TIR（63-140 mg/dL / 3.5-7.8 mmol/L）在妊娠早期约为50%，在妊娠晚期改善至约60%（现代产前护理条件下）。
cards.claim_en: In pregnant women with type 1 diabetes (Sweden/CONCEPTT data), TIR (63-140 mg/dL / 3.5-7.8 mmol/L) is approximately 50% in the first trimester, improving to approximately 60% in the third trimester with contemporary antenatal care.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Pregnancy TBR <63 mg/dL target <4% is safely achievable
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型糖尿病孕妇，TBR <63 mg/dL（<3.5 mmol/L）<4%的目标是安全可达到的，尤其是在妊娠早期之后。
cards.claim_en: For pregnant women with type 1 diabetes, the TBR <63 mg/dL (<3.5 mmol/L) recommendation of <4% is safely achievable, especially after the first trimester.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Pregnancy: 33% of women achieved 70% TIR 63-140 mg/dL in final weeks
cards.claim_zh: 33%的1型糖尿病孕妇在妊娠最后（>34周）达到了推荐的70% TIR（63-140 mg/dL / 3.5-7.8 mmol/L）。
cards.claim_en: 33% of pregnant women with type 1 diabetes achieved the recommendation of 70% TIR 63-140 mg/dL (3.5-7.8 mmol/L) in the final (>34) weeks of pregnancy.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Pregnancy: first longitudinal CGM data showed 13-percentage point TIR increase
cards.claim_zh: 妊娠期首个纵向CGM数据显示TIR增加了13个百分点（TIR 70-140 mg/dL / 3.9-7.8 mmol/L从43%升至56%）。TBR <50 mg/dL从6%降至4%，但使用旧一代传感器时TBR <70 mg/dL仍较高（13-15%）。
cards.claim_en: The first longitudinal CGM data in pregnancy demonstrated a 13-percentage point increase in TIR (43% to 56% TIR 70-140 mg/dL [3.9-7.8 mmol/L]). TBR <50 mg/dL reduced from 6% to 4%, though TBR <70 mg/dL remained high (13-15%) with older generation sensors.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TIR improvement 5-7% reduces LGA risk in pregnancy
cards.claim_zh: 第二和第三孕期TIR提高5-7%与LGA及新生儿不良结局风险降低相关，包括巨大儿、肩难产、新生儿低血糖和NICU入院。
cards.claim_en: A 5-7% higher TIR during the second and third trimesters is associated with decreased risk of LGA and neonatal outcomes, including macrosomia, shoulder dystocia, neonatal hypoglycemia and NICU admissions.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Type 2 diabetes pregnancy achieves TIR 90%
cards.claim_zh: 妊娠期2型糖尿病女性TIR可达90%，高血糖时间比1型糖尿病女性少三分之一。
cards.claim_en: Women with type 2 diabetes in pregnancy achieve TIR of 90%, spending one third less time hyperglycemic than women with type 1 diabetes.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Older/high-risk individuals: reduce time below 70 mg/dL
cards.claim_zh: 对于老年和/或高风险糖尿病患者，血糖目标应个体化且保守，重点关注减少低于70 mg/dL（<3.9 mmol/L）的时间比例并防止过度高血糖。
cards.claim_en: For older and/or high-risk individuals with diabetes, glycemic targets should be individualized and conservative, with a strong focus on reducing the percentage of time spent <70 mg/dL (<3.9 mmol/L) and preventing excessive hyperglycemia.
cards.population: older and/or high-risk individuals with diabetes

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR <70 mg/dL target: less than 1 hour per day
cards.claim_zh: 将血糖<70 mg/dL（<3.9 mmol/L）的时间减少到每天少于1小时。
cards.claim_en: Reduce time spent <70 mg/dL (<3.9 mmol/L) to less than one hour per day.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: TBR <54 mg/dL target: less than 15 minutes per day
cards.claim_zh: 将血糖<54 mg/dL（<3.0 mmol/L）的时间减少到每天少于15分钟。
cards.claim_en: Reduce time spent <54 mg/dL (<3.0 mmol/L) to less than 15 minutes per day.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: ISPAD A1C target for pediatric and young adults ≤25 years
cards.claim_zh: 对于有综合医疗条件的儿童、青少年和≤25岁成人，A1C目标为7.0%（53 mmol/mol）（ISPAD推荐）。
cards.claim_en: An A1C target of 7.0% (53 mmol/mol) can be used in children, adolescents and adults ≤25 years who have access to comprehensive care (ISPAD).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Higher A1C goal <7.5% for high-risk pediatric/young adult situations
cards.claim_zh: 在以下情况下，更高的A1C目标（如<7.5%[<58 mmol/mol]）可能更合适：无法表达低血糖症状、低血糖感知缺失、严重低血糖病史、无法获得类似物胰岛素和/或先进胰岛素输送技术、无法定期检测血糖。
cards.claim_en: A higher A1C goal (e.g., <7.5% [<58 mmol/mol]) may be more appropriate in the following situations: inability to articulate hypoglycemia symptoms; hypoglycemia unawareness; history of severe hypoglycemia; lack of access to analog insulins and/or advanced insulin delivery technology; inability to regularly check glucose.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: A1C <7.5% equates to ~60% TIR
cards.claim_zh: A1C目标<7.5%（<58 mmol/mol）对应TIR目标约60%（表4）。
cards.claim_en: An A1C goal of <7.5% (<58 mmol/mol) equates to a TIR target of ~60% (Table 4).

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Incremental 5% TIR improvement is clinically significant
cards.claim_zh: 即使是小的、渐进性的改善也能产生显著的血糖获益。TIR提高5%在改善血糖控制方面具有临床意义。
cards.claim_en: Even small, incremental improvements yield significant glycemic benefits. A 5% increase in TIR is clinically significant in improving glycemic control.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: AGP retrospective analysis supports collaborative goal setting
cards.claim_zh: 利用标准化数据管理工具（如AGP）对CGM数据进行回顾性分析，使临床医生和糖尿病患者能够协作识别问题领域并设定可实现的目标。
cards.claim_en: Retrospective analysis of CGM data utilizing standardized data management tools such as the AGP enables clinicians and people with diabetes to work collaboratively in identifying problem areas and then set achievable goals.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Time in ranges as clinical targets complementary to A1C
cards.claim_zh: 时间在范围内（目标范围内、低于范围、高于范围）作为临床目标和结局测量指标是适当且有用的，可补充A1C用于广泛的糖尿病人群。
cards.claim_en: Time in ranges (within target range, below range, above range) are both appropriate and useful as clinical targets and outcome measurements that complement A1C for a wide range of people with diabetes.

source.doc: International consensus on time in range

cards.title: Diabetes prevalence in Chinese elderly aged 60-69
cards.claim_zh: 依据2018年美国糖尿病学会诊断标准，60~69岁糖尿病患病率为28.8%，糖尿病前期患病率为47.8%。
cards.claim_en: In the 60-69 year age group, diabetes prevalence was 28.8% and prediabetes prevalence was 47.8%, based on 2018 ADA diagnostic criteria (2020 cross-sectional study).

cards.title: Diabetes prevalence in Chinese elderly aged ≥70
cards.claim_zh: 在≥70岁的人群中糖尿病患病率为31.8%，糖尿病前期的患病率为47.6%。
cards.claim_en: In the ≥70 year age group, diabetes prevalence was 31.8% and prediabetes prevalence was 47.6%, based on 2018 ADA diagnostic criteria (2020 cross-sectional study).

cards.title: Elderly Chinese diabetes patient count from 2019 IDF data
cards.claim_zh: 2019年国际糖尿病联盟数据显示，中国≥65岁的老年糖尿病患者数量约为3550万，居世界首位，占全球老年糖尿病患者的1/4，且呈现上升趋势。
cards.claim_en: According to 2019 IDF data, approximately 35.5 million Chinese elderly (≥65 years) had diabetes, ranking first globally and accounting for 1/4 of all elderly diabetes patients worldwide, with an upward trend.
synonyms: 中国老年糖尿病患者数

cards.title: Comorbidity rate of hypertension and/or dyslipidemia in elderly T2DM
cards.claim_zh: 老年T2DM患者合并高血压和/或血脂异常的比例高达79%。
cards.claim_en: Elderly type 2 diabetes mellitus (T2DM) patients have a comorbidity rate of hypertension and/or dyslipidemia as high as 79%.
synonyms: 老年T2DM合并高血压血脂异常比例

cards.title: Elderly diabetes sex difference in prevalence
cards.claim_zh: 老年女性糖尿病患病率高于男性。
cards.claim_en: Among the elderly, diabetes prevalence is higher in women than in men.

cards.title: Diabetes diagnostic criteria recommendation for elderly
cards.claim_zh: 采用世界卫生组织(1999年)糖尿病诊断标准。(A)
cards.claim_en: Adopt the World Health Organization (1999) diabetes diagnostic criteria for elderly patients. Evidence grade A.

cards.title: Classification of geriatric diabetes types
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病分为1型糖尿病(T1DM)、T2DM和特殊类型糖尿病。(A)
cards.claim_en: Geriatric diabetes is classified as type 1 diabetes mellitus (T1DM), type 2 diabetes mellitus (T2DM), and specific types of diabetes. Evidence grade A.

cards.title: Characteristics of geriatric diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病具有其自身特点，包括症状不典型、并发症和/或合并症多等。(B)
cards.claim_en: Geriatric diabetes has its own characteristics including atypical symptoms, and multiple complications and/or comorbidities. Evidence grade B.

cards.title: Tumor screening recommendation for newly diagnosed elderly diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 建议对初诊的老年糖尿病患者进行肿瘤相关筛查。(C)
cards.claim_en: Recommend tumor-related screening for newly diagnosed geriatric diabetes patients. Evidence grade C.
synonyms: 初诊老年糖尿病肿瘤筛查

cards.title: Elderly diabetes prevalence exceeds other age groups
cards.claim_zh: 与其他年龄段相比，60岁以上年龄段的糖尿病患病率及糖尿病前期患病率均最高。
cards.claim_en: Compared with other age groups, the ≥60 year age group has the highest diabetes prevalence and prediabetes prevalence.
synonyms: 老年人群糖尿病患病率最高

cards.title: Diabetes diagnosis - fasting plasma glucose threshold
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病的诊断标准：典型糖尿病症状（烦渴多饮、多尿、多食、不明原因体质量下降）加上空腹静脉血浆葡萄糖≥7.0 mmol/L；无典型症状者需另一次检测确认。
cards.claim_en: Diabetes is diagnosed when fasting venous plasma glucose is ≥7.0 mmol/L, in the presence of typical symptoms (polydipsia, polyuria, polyphagia, unexplained weight loss). Without typical symptoms, a confirmatory test on another day is required.

cards.title: Diagnosis - random plasma glucose threshold
cards.claim_zh: 典型糖尿病症状加上随机静脉血浆葡萄糖≥11.1 mmol/L可诊断糖尿病。随机血糖指不考虑上次用餐时间、一天中任意时间的血糖，不能用于诊断空腹血糖受损或糖耐量减低。
cards.claim_en: Diabetes is diagnosed when random venous plasma glucose is ≥11.1 mmol/L, in the presence of typical diabetes symptoms (polydipsia, polyuria, polyphagia, unexplained weight loss). Random glucose is measured at any time of day regardless of last meal, but cannot be used to diagnose impaired fasting glucose or impaired glucose tolerance.

cards.title: Diagnosis - 2h post-OGTT glucose threshold
cards.claim_zh: 典型糖尿病症状加上葡萄糖负荷后（75g OGTT）2h静脉血浆葡萄糖≥11.1 mmol/L可诊断糖尿病。
cards.claim_en: Diabetes is diagnosed when 2-hour plasma glucose after a 75g oral glucose tolerance test (OGTT) is ≥11.1 mmol/L, in the presence of typical diabetes symptoms. Without typical symptoms, a confirmatory test on another day is required.

cards.title: Diagnosis - HbA1c threshold
cards.claim_zh: 2011 WHO建议在条件具备的国家和地区采用HbA1c≥6.5%作为糖尿病诊断切点。国内采用标准化检测方法且有严格质量控制实验室检测的HbA1c也可作为诊断指标。但镰状细胞病、葡萄糖-6-磷酸脱氢酶缺乏症、血液透析、近期失血或输血、促红细胞生成素治疗等情况下只能根据静脉血浆葡萄糖诊断。
cards.claim_en: HbA1c ≥6.5% can be used as a diagnostic criterion for diabetes, per the 2011 WHO recommendation. This requires standardized measurement methods and strict laboratory quality control. HbA1c cannot be used in conditions such as sickle cell disease, glucose-6-phosphate dehydrogenase deficiency, hemodialysis, recent blood loss or transfusion, or erythropoietin therapy — in these cases only venous plasma glucose should be used.

cards.title: Fasting state definition for diabetes diagnosis
cards.claim_zh: 空腹状态指至少8小时没有摄入能量。
cards.claim_en: Fasting state is defined as at least 8 hours without energy intake.

cards.title: Definition and predominant type of elderly diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病是指年龄≥65岁（包括65岁以前诊断和65岁以后诊断的糖尿病患者）。以T2DM为主，也包含T1DM和其他类型糖尿病。老年人中新发T1DM少见，多为隐匿性自身免疫性糖尿病（LADA）。
cards.claim_en: Elderly diabetes is defined as diabetes in people aged ≥65 years, including those diagnosed before 65 who remain diabetic into old age. T2DM is the predominant type; T1DM in the elderly is uncommon and most often presents as latent autoimmune diabetes in adults (LADA). New-onset T1DM in the elderly is rare.

cards.title: Pancreatic cancer association with dysglycemia
cards.claim_zh: 68%的胰腺癌患者存在血糖升高、糖耐量减低或糖尿病。建议对初诊的老年糖尿病患者进行肿瘤筛查。
cards.claim_en: Approximately 68% of pancreatic cancer patients have elevated blood glucose, impaired glucose tolerance, or diabetes. Tumor screening is recommended for newly diagnosed elderly diabetes patients.

cards.title: Primary prevention - statin glucose monitoring
cards.claim_zh: 对于使用他汀类药物的老年患者应定期进行血糖监测（一级预防心血管危险因素管理）。
cards.claim_en: For elderly patients using statins, regular blood glucose monitoring is recommended as part of cardiovascular risk management in diabetes primary prevention.

cards.title: Multidisciplinary comprehensive geriatric assessment for elderly diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 依托多学科团队（临床医师、营养师、康复治疗师和护士）对老年糖尿病患者进行老年综合评估。证据等级A。
cards.claim_en: Elderly patients with diabetes should undergo comprehensive geriatric assessment by a multidisciplinary team (clinical physician, dietitian, rehabilitation therapist, nurse). Evidence level A.

cards.title: Health status classification into 3 groups based on functional assessment
cards.claim_zh: 根据评估结果，把老年糖尿病患者的健康状态分为良好（Group 1）、中等（Group 2）、差（Group 3）3个等级。证据等级A。
cards.claim_en: Based on comprehensive geriatric assessment, elderly diabetes patients are classified into 3 health status levels: Good (Group 1), Intermediate (Group 2), and Poor (Group 3). Evidence level A.

cards.title: Individualized treatment strategy based on health status grouping
cards.claim_zh: 依据健康状态分层制定个体化的综合治疗、护理及康复策略。证据等级A。
cards.claim_en: Individualized comprehensive treatment, care, and rehabilitation strategies should be formulated based on health status stratification. Evidence level A.

cards.title: Group 1 (Good health) criteria: ≤2 comorbidities, no ADL impairment, ≤1 IADL impairment
cards.claim_zh: 良好（Group 1）：患者无共病或合并≤2种除糖尿病外的慢性疾病（包括卒中、高血压、1-3期慢性肾脏病、骨关节炎等），无ADL损伤，IADL损伤数量≤1。
cards.claim_en: Group 1 (Good health): Patient has ≤2 chronic diseases besides diabetes (including stroke, hypertension, CKD stages 1-3, osteoarthritis) AND no ADL impairment AND ≤1 IADL impairment.

cards.title: Group 2 (Intermediate health) criteria: ≥3 comorbidities and/or cognitive/IADL impairment
cards.claim_zh: 中等（Group 2）：患者合并≥3种除糖尿病外的慢性疾病（包括卒中、高血压、1-3期慢性肾脏病、骨关节炎等）和/或患者满足以下任意一项：(1)轻度认知障碍或早期痴呆；(2)IADL损伤数量≥2。
