cards.claim_en: Group 2 (Intermediate health): Patient has ≥3 chronic diseases besides diabetes AND/OR (1) mild cognitive impairment or early dementia; (2) IADL impairment ≥2.

cards.title: Group 3 (Poor health) criteria: treatment-limited disease, moderate/severe dementia, ADL impairment, or long-term care
cards.claim_zh: 差（Group 3）：患者满足以下任意一项：(1)合并≥1种治疗受限的慢性疾病且预期寿命较短（转移性恶性肿瘤、需氧疗的肺部疾病、需透析的终末期肾病、晚期心力衰竭）；(2)中、重度痴呆；(3)ADL损伤数量≥2；(4)需长期护理。
cards.claim_en: Group 3 (Poor health): Patient meets any one of: (1) ≥1 treatment-limited chronic disease with short life expectancy (metastatic malignancy, lung disease requiring oxygen therapy, end-stage renal disease requiring dialysis, advanced heart failure); (2) moderate or severe dementia; (3) ADL impairment ≥2; (4) requiring long-term care.

cards.title: Individualized health education based on patient characteristics
cards.claim_zh: 结合每位患者的特点（受教育程度、经济状况、既往治疗状况、血糖水平、合并症、认知功能及有无看护者等）进行个体化健康教育。证据等级A。
cards.claim_en: Individualized health education should be provided based on each patient's characteristics (education level, economic status, prior treatment, blood glucose level, comorbidities, cognitive function, presence of caregivers). Evidence level A.

cards.title: HbA1c and point glucose as assessment indicators
cards.claim_zh: 以HbA1c和点血糖值作为老年糖尿病患者血糖控制的评估指标。
cards.claim_en: HbA1c and point blood glucose values are used as assessment indicators for glycemic control in older diabetes patients.

cards.title: HbA1c target for Group 1 older adults not using high-risk drugs
cards.claim_zh: 未使用低血糖风险较高的药物、健康状态良好（Group 1）的老年糖尿病患者，HbA1c目标为<7.5%。
cards.claim_en: For older diabetes patients with good health status (Group 1) not using drugs with higher hypoglycemia risk, HbA1c target is <7.5%.
cards.population: older diabetes patients (Group 1, good health, no high-risk drugs)

cards.title: Fasting and bedtime glucose targets for Group 1 older adults not using high-risk drugs
cards.claim_zh: 未使用低血糖风险较高的药物、健康状态良好（Group 1）的老年糖尿病患者，空腹或餐前血糖目标为5.0～7.2 mmol/L，睡前血糖目标为5.0～8.3 mmol/L。
cards.claim_en: For older diabetes patients with good health status (Group 1) not using high-risk drugs, fasting/preprandial glucose target is 5.0–7.2 mmol/L and bedtime glucose target is 5.0–8.3 mmol/L.
cards.population: older diabetes patients (Group 1, good health, no high-risk drugs)

cards.title: HbA1c target for Group 2 older adults not using high-risk drugs
cards.claim_zh: 未使用低血糖风险较高的药物、健康状态中等（Group 2）的老年糖尿病患者，HbA1c目标为<8.0%。
cards.claim_en: For older diabetes patients with moderate health status (Group 2) not using drugs with higher hypoglycemia risk, HbA1c target is <8.0%.
cards.population: older diabetes patients (Group 2, moderate health, no high-risk drugs)

cards.title: Fasting and bedtime glucose targets for Group 2 older adults not using high-risk drugs
cards.claim_zh: 未使用低血糖风险较高的药物、健康状态中等（Group 2）的老年糖尿病患者，空腹或餐前血糖目标为5.0～8.3 mmol/L，睡前血糖目标为5.6～10.0 mmol/L。
cards.claim_en: For older diabetes patients with moderate health status (Group 2) not using high-risk drugs, fasting/preprandial glucose target is 5.0–8.3 mmol/L and bedtime glucose target is 5.6–10.0 mmol/L.
cards.population: older diabetes patients (Group 2, moderate health, no high-risk drugs)

cards.title: HbA1c target for Group 3 older adults not using high-risk drugs
cards.claim_zh: 未使用低血糖风险较高的药物、健康状态差（Group 3）的老年糖尿病患者，HbA1c目标为<8.5%。
cards.claim_en: For older diabetes patients with poor health status (Group 3) not using drugs with higher hypoglycemia risk, HbA1c target is <8.5%.
cards.population: older diabetes patients (Group 3, poor health, no high-risk drugs)

cards.title: Fasting and bedtime glucose targets for Group 3 older adults not using high-risk drugs
cards.claim_zh: 未使用低血糖风险较高的药物、健康状态差（Group 3）的老年糖尿病患者，空腹或餐前血糖目标为5.6～10.0 mmol/L，睡前血糖目标为6.1～11.1 mmol/L。
cards.claim_en: For older diabetes patients with poor health status (Group 3) not using high-risk drugs, fasting/preprandial glucose target is 5.6–10.0 mmol/L and bedtime glucose target is 6.1–11.1 mmol/L.
cards.population: older diabetes patients (Group 3, poor health, no high-risk drugs)

cards.title: HbA1c target for Group 1 older adults using high-risk drugs
cards.claim_zh: 使用低血糖风险较高的药物、健康状态良好（Group 1）的老年糖尿病患者，HbA1c目标为7.0～7.5%。
cards.claim_en: For older diabetes patients with good health status (Group 1) using drugs with higher hypoglycemia risk, HbA1c target is 7.0–7.5%.
cards.population: older diabetes patients (Group 1, good health, high-risk drugs)

cards.title: Fasting and bedtime glucose targets for Group 1 older adults using high-risk drugs
cards.claim_zh: 使用低血糖风险较高的药物、健康状态良好（Group 1）的老年糖尿病患者，空腹或餐前血糖目标为5.0～8.3 mmol/L，睡前血糖目标为5.6～10.0 mmol/L。
cards.claim_en: For older diabetes patients with good health status (Group 1) using high-risk drugs, fasting/preprandial glucose target is 5.0–8.3 mmol/L and bedtime glucose target is 5.6–10.0 mmol/L.
cards.population: older diabetes patients (Group 1, good health, high-risk drugs)

cards.title: HbA1c target for Group 2 older adults using high-risk drugs
cards.claim_zh: 使用低血糖风险较高的药物、健康状态中等（Group 2）的老年糖尿病患者，HbA1c目标为7.5～8.0%。
cards.claim_en: For older diabetes patients with moderate health status (Group 2) using drugs with higher hypoglycemia risk, HbA1c target is 7.5–8.0%.
cards.population: older diabetes patients (Group 2, moderate health, high-risk drugs)

cards.title: Fasting and bedtime glucose targets for Group 2 older adults using high-risk drugs
cards.claim_zh: 使用低血糖风险较高的药物、健康状态中等（Group 2）的老年糖尿病患者，空腹或餐前血糖目标为5.6～8.3 mmol/L，睡前血糖目标为8.3～10.0 mmol/L。
cards.claim_en: For older diabetes patients with moderate health status (Group 2) using high-risk drugs, fasting/preprandial glucose target is 5.6–8.3 mmol/L and bedtime glucose target is 8.3–10.0 mmol/L.
cards.population: older diabetes patients (Group 2, moderate health, high-risk drugs)

cards.title: HbA1c target for Group 3 older adults using high-risk drugs
cards.claim_zh: 使用低血糖风险较高的药物、健康状态差（Group 3）的老年糖尿病患者，HbA1c目标为8.0～8.5%。
cards.claim_en: For older diabetes patients with poor health status (Group 3) using drugs with higher hypoglycemia risk, HbA1c target is 8.0–8.5%.
cards.population: older diabetes patients (Group 3, poor health, high-risk drugs)

cards.title: Fasting and bedtime glucose targets for Group 3 older adults using high-risk drugs
cards.claim_zh: 使用低血糖风险较高的药物、健康状态差（Group 3）的老年糖尿病患者，空腹或餐前血糖目标为5.6～10.0 mmol/L，睡前血糖目标为8.3～13.9 mmol/L。
cards.claim_en: For older diabetes patients with poor health status (Group 3) using high-risk drugs, fasting/preprandial glucose target is 5.6–10.0 mmol/L and bedtime glucose target is 8.3–13.9 mmol/L.
cards.population: older diabetes patients (Group 3, poor health, high-risk drugs)

cards.title: TIR target for older diabetes patients
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病患者葡萄糖在目标范围内时间（TIR，血糖范围3.9～10.0 mmol/L）目标为占全天时间>50%（>12小时）。
cards.claim_en: For older diabetes patients, time in range (TIR, glucose 3.9–10.0 mmol/L) target is >50% of the day (>12 hours).

cards.title: TBR target for older diabetes patients
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病患者葡萄糖低于目标范围时间（TBR，血糖<3.9 mmol/L）目标为占全天时间<1%（<15分钟）。
cards.claim_en: For older diabetes patients, time below range (TBR, glucose <3.9 mmol/L) target is <1% of the day (<15 minutes).

cards.title: TAR target for older diabetes patients
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病患者葡萄糖高于目标范围时间（TAR，血糖>13.9 mmol/L）目标为占全天时间<10%（<144分钟）。
cards.claim_en: For older diabetes patients, time above range (TAR, glucose >13.9 mmol/L) target is <10% of the day (<144 minutes).

cards.title: CV target for older diabetes patients
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病患者血糖变异系数（CV）目标为≤36%。
cards.claim_en: For older diabetes patients, coefficient of variation (CV) target is ≤36%.

cards.title: Group 3 glycemic control principles
cards.claim_zh: 健康状态差（Group 3）的老年糖尿病患者可适当放宽血糖控制目标，但应遵循以下原则：(1)不因血糖过高而出现明显的糖尿病症状；(2)不因血糖过高而增加感染风险；(3)不因血糖过高而出现高血糖危象。
cards.claim_en: For older diabetes patients with poor health status (Group 3), glycemic targets may be relaxed but must follow three principles: (1) no overt diabetic symptoms from hyperglycemia; (2) no increased infection risk from hyperglycemia; (3) no hyperglycemic crisis.

cards.title: Lifestyle intervention as basic treatment for all older diabetes patients
cards.claim_zh: 生活方式干预是老年糖尿病患者的基础治疗，所有老年糖尿病患者均应接受生活方式干预。
cards.claim_en: Lifestyle intervention is the basic treatment for older diabetes patients; all older diabetes patients should receive lifestyle intervention.

cards.title: Individualized lifestyle guidance based on health status stratification
cards.claim_zh: 根据老年糖尿病患者的健康状态分层结果给予个体化的生活方式指导。
cards.claim_en: Provide individualized lifestyle guidance for older diabetes patients based on stratified health status results.

cards.title: Nutritional assessment and increased protein/energy intake
cards.claim_zh: 评估老年糖尿病患者的营养状态并尽早发现营养不良，在制定营养治疗方案时应注意适度增加蛋白质和能量摄入。
cards.claim_en: Assess nutritional status of older diabetes patients and detect malnutrition early; nutrition plans should moderately increase protein and energy intake.

cards.title: Protein intake for healthy elderly diabetic patients
cards.claim_zh: 健康的老年糖尿病患者需每日摄入蛋白质1.0～1.3 g/kg。
cards.claim_en: Healthy elderly diabetic patients need daily protein intake of 1.0-1.3 g/kg body weight.

cards.title: Protein intake for elderly diabetic patients with acute/chronic disease
cards.claim_zh: 合并急慢性疾病的老年糖尿病患者需每日摄入蛋白质1.2～1.5 g/kg。
cards.claim_en: Elderly diabetic patients with acute or chronic disease need daily protein intake of 1.2-1.5 g/kg body weight.

cards.title: Protein intake for elderly diabetic patients with sarcopenia or severe malnutrition
cards.claim_zh: 合并肌少症或严重营养不良的老年人每日至少摄入蛋白质1.5 g/kg。
cards.claim_en: Elderly diabetic patients with sarcopenia or severe malnutrition need daily protein intake of at least 1.5 g/kg body weight.

cards.title: Recommended exercise frequency for elderly diabetic patients
cards.claim_zh: 每周运动5～7 d，最好每天都运动。
cards.claim_en: Elderly diabetic patients should exercise 5-7 days per week, preferably every day.

cards.title: Optimal exercise timing and duration after meals
cards.claim_zh: 运动的最佳时段是餐后1 h，每餐餐后运动20 min左右。
cards.claim_en: The best time to exercise is 1 hour after meals, with approximately 20 minutes of exercise per post-meal session.

cards.title: Preferred exercise type and intensity for elderly diabetic patients
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病患者首选的运动是中等强度的有氧运动，运动能力较差者可选用低强度有氧运动。具体形式包括快走、健身舞、韵律操、骑自行车、水中运动等。
cards.claim_en: Moderate-intensity aerobic exercise is the first choice for elderly diabetic patients; those with poor exercise capacity may use low-intensity aerobic exercise. Specific forms include brisk walking, fitness dance, cycling, and aquatic exercise.

cards.title: Nutritional screening tools for elderly diabetic patients
cards.claim_zh: 应对老年糖尿病患者的营养状态进行评估，采用营养风险筛查2002、微型营养评价简表等营养筛查工具确认患者营养风险。
cards.claim_en: Nutritional status of elderly diabetic patients should be assessed using tools such as Nutritional Risk Screening 2002 (NRS 2002) and Mini Nutritional Assessment Short Form (MNA-SF).

cards.title: Elevated malnutrition risk in elderly diabetic patients
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病患者与非糖尿病人群相比营养不良发生风险更高，更易发生肌少症和衰弱，应避免过度限制能量摄入，强调合理膳食、均衡营养。
cards.claim_en: Elderly diabetic patients have a higher risk of malnutrition compared to non-diabetic elderly populations, leading to sarcopenia and frailty; excessive energy restriction should be avoided and balanced nutrition emphasized.

cards.title: Lifestyle intervention sufficient for mild hyperglycemia in healthy elderly
cards.claim_zh: 对于一部分健康状态良好（Group 1）、血糖水平升高不明显的老年糖尿病患者，单纯的生活方式干预即可达到预期血糖控制目标。
cards.claim_en: For healthy elderly diabetic patients (Group 1) with mildly elevated blood glucose, lifestyle intervention alone can achieve the expected glycemic control target.

cards.title: Moderate-intensity exercise intensity definition for elderly
cards.claim_zh: 在中等强度运动中常感觉心跳加快、微微出汗、轻微疲劳感，也可以是运动中能说出完整句子但不能唱歌。
cards.claim_en: Moderate-intensity exercise is characterized by increased heart rate, mild sweating, mild fatigue, and the ability to speak full sentences but not sing.

cards.title: 磺脲类药物为老年T2DM三级推荐
cards.claim_zh: 磺脲类药物是老年T2DM患者的三级推荐降糖药物，该类药物在老年患者中不良反应更常见，应慎用。
cards.claim_en: Sulfonylureas are a third-line recommended glucose-lowering drug for elderly T2DM patients. They should be used cautiously due to higher adverse reaction risk in the elderly.

cards.title: 磺脲类与CYP2C9/CYP2C19代谢药物合用需警惕低血糖
cards.claim_zh: 磺脲类药物与经CYP2C9和CYP2C19等肝脏P450酶代谢药物（如他汀类、抗菌药物、部分心血管药物及质子泵抑制剂等）合用时，应警惕低血糖事件及其他不良反应。
cards.claim_en: Sulfonylureas interact with drugs metabolized by CYP2C9 and CYP2C19 hepatic enzymes (including statins, antimicrobials, some cardiovascular drugs, and proton pump inhibitors); hypoglycemia and other adverse events should be monitored when used concurrently.

cards.title: 格列喹酮适用于轻中度肾功能不全的老年T2DM
cards.claim_zh: 格列喹酮血浆半衰期为1.5 h，仅5%的代谢产物经肾脏排泄，轻中度肾功能不全的老年T2DM患者选择磺脲类药物时应选择格列喹酮。
cards.claim_en: Glimepiride (gliquidone) has a plasma half-life of 1.5 h with only 5% of metabolites excreted renally; it should be the sulfonylurea of choice for elderly T2DM patients with mild-to-moderate renal impairment.

cards.title: 格列奈类为老年T2DM二级推荐
cards.claim_zh: 格列奈类药物降糖效果与磺脲类药物相近，体质量增加的风险相似，而低血糖风险较低，是老年T2DM患者的二级推荐降糖药物。该类药物需餐前15 min内服用。
cards.claim_en: Glinides (repaglinide, nateglinide) have similar glucose-lowering efficacy to sulfonylureas, similar weight gain risk, but lower hypoglycemia risk; they are second-line recommended for elderly T2DM. They must be taken 15 min before meals.

cards.title: α-糖苷酶抑制剂为老年T2DM二级推荐
cards.claim_zh: α-糖苷酶抑制剂是老年T2DM患者的二级推荐降糖药物。常见不良反应包括腹胀、腹泻、排气增多等胃肠道反应，一定程度上影响了其在老年人群中的应用。应小剂量起始，逐渐增加剂量。
cards.claim_en: Alpha-glucosidase inhibitors (acarbose, voglibose, miglitol) are second-line recommended for elderly T2DM. They delay carbohydrate digestion and absorption, lowering postprandial glucose. Common GI adverse reactions (bloating, diarrhea, flatulence) limit use in elderly patients. Start with low doses and titrate upward.

cards.title: TZDs为老年T2DM三级推荐
cards.claim_zh: 噻唑烷二酮类（罗格列酮、吡格列酮）是老年T2DM患者的三级推荐降糖药物。单独使用时不易诱发低血糖，但与胰岛素或胰岛素促泌剂联用时可增加患者低血糖风险。
cards.claim_en: Thiazolidinediones (rosiglitazone, pioglitazone) are insulin sensitizers and third-line recommended for elderly T2DM. They have low hypoglycemia risk when used alone, but risk increases when combined with insulin or insulin secretagogues.

cards.title: 吡格列酮降低大血管事件风险
cards.claim_zh: 吡格列酮可以降低大血管事件高风险的T2DM患者的全因死亡率、非致死性心肌梗死和卒中的复合终点事件风险。Meta分析结果显示吡格列酮可降低合并胰岛素抵抗、糖尿病前期及糖尿病的缺血性卒中和短暂性脑缺血发作患者卒中复发风险。
cards.claim_en: Pioglitazone reduces the composite endpoint risk of all-cause mortality, non-fatal myocardial infarction, and stroke in high-risk T2DM patients. Meta-analysis shows pioglitazone reduces ischemic stroke and TIA recurrence in patients with insulin resistance, pre-diabetes, or diabetes.

cards.title: 吡格列酮降低老年T2DM心血管事件和痴呆风险
cards.claim_zh: 回顾性队列研究显示，使用吡格列酮可能降低老年T2DM患者主要心脑血管事件及痴呆的发生风险。
cards.claim_en: A retrospective cohort study shows that pioglitazone may reduce the risk of major cardiovascular events and dementia in elderly T2DM patients.

cards.title: TZDs安全性警告：心衰、骨折、水肿风险
cards.claim_zh: 噻唑烷二酮类药物可能导致体质量增加、水肿、骨折和HF的风险增加。使用胰岛素及有充血性HF、骨质疏松、跌倒或骨折风险的老年T2DM患者应谨慎使用该类药物。低剂量TZD联合其他降糖药物治疗可能会减弱其不良反应。
cards.claim_en: TZDs may cause weight gain, edema, fractures, and heart failure (HF). Elderly T2DM patients with HF, osteoporosis, or fall/fracture risk should use TZDs cautiously. Low-dose TZD combined with other hypoglycemics may reduce adverse effects.

cards.title: DPP-4i为老年T2DM一线推荐
cards.claim_zh: DPP-4i是近年来国内外指南和/或共识推荐的老年T2DM患者一线降糖药之一。该类药物通过抑制二肽基肽酶Ⅳ活性提高内源性GLP-1的水平，葡萄糖浓度依赖性地促进内源性胰岛素分泌，抑制胰高血糖素分泌，降低血糖。
cards.claim_en: DPP-4 inhibitors are first-line recommended glucose-lowering drugs for elderly T2DM. They inhibit DPP-4 to raise endogenous GLP-1 levels, promoting insulin secretion in a glucose-dependent manner and suppressing glucagon.

cards.title: DPP-4i单药低血糖风险低、胃肠反应少
cards.claim_zh: DPP-4i单独应用时一般不出现低血糖，对体质量影响中等，胃肠道反应少，较适用于老年患者。
cards.claim_en: DPP-4 inhibitors when used alone generally do not cause hypoglycemia, have moderate weight effect, and minimal gastrointestinal adverse reactions, making them suitable for elderly patients.

cards.title: 西格列汀/利格列汀/沙格列汀不增加老年患者MACE风险
cards.claim_zh: 西格列汀、利格列汀和沙格列汀的心血管结局试验老年亚组结果显示，不增加老年患者的3P或4P主要心血管不良事件（MACE）的发生风险。
cards.claim_en: CVOT elderly subgroup results for sitagliptin, linagliptin, and saxagliptin show no increased risk of 3-point or 4-point MACE in elderly patients.

cards.title: 利格列汀不增加老年患者肾脏复合结局
cards.claim_zh: 利格列汀不增加老年患者肾脏复合结局（因肾病死亡、进展为终末期肾病或持续eGFR下降≥40%）的风险。
cards.claim_en: Linagliptin does not increase renal composite outcomes in elderly patients, including nephropathy death, progression to end-stage renal disease, or sustained eGFR reduction of ≥40%.

cards.title: 沙格列汀增加心衰住院风险
cards.claim_zh: 沙格列汀会增加患者因心力衰竭（HF）住院的风险。
cards.claim_en: Saxagliptin increases the risk of heart failure (HF) hospitalization in elderly patients.

cards.title: DPP-4i肝肾功能不全用药调整汇总
cards.claim_zh: 利格列汀、替格列汀可用于任何肾功能状态的老年患者，无需调整药物剂量。沙格列汀在肝功能受损的患者中应用时无需调整药物剂量。西格列汀对轻中度肝功能不全的患者无需调整剂量。阿格列汀慎用于肝病患者。维格列汀禁用于肝功能异常（血清丙氨酸氨基转移酶或天冬氨酸氨基转移酶超过正常值上限3倍或持续升高）的患者。其余DPP-4i需根据肾功能调整剂量或停用。
cards.claim_en: Linagliptin and teneligliptin require no dose adjustment for any degree of hepatic or renal impairment. Saxagliptin needs no adjustment for mild-to-moderate hepatic impairment. Sitagliptin needs no adjustment for mild-to-moderate hepatic impairment. Alogliptin should be used cautiously in hepatic impairment. Vildagliptin is contraindicated if ALT or AST exceeds 3× upper limit of normal or is persistently elevated. Other DPP-4i require renal dose adjustment or discontinuation.

cards.title: 怀疑胰腺炎应停用DPP-4i
cards.claim_zh: 若怀疑患者出现胰腺炎，应停止使用DPP-4i此类药物。
cards.claim_en: If pancreatitis is suspected in a patient taking DPP-4 inhibitors, the drug should be discontinued immediately.

cards.title: DPP-4i国内上市药物列表及给药频次
cards.claim_zh: 目前在国内上市的DPP-4i有西格列汀、维格列汀、沙格列汀、阿格列汀、利格列汀、曲格列汀、瑞格列汀和替格列汀，其中多数为日制剂，维格列汀每日2次，曲格列汀为周制剂。
cards.claim_en: DPP-4i available in China include sitagliptin, vildagliptin (twice daily), saxagliptin, alogliptin, linagliptin, teneligliptin, retagliptin, and tigliptin. Most are once-daily; vildagliptin is twice-daily; teneligliptin is once-weekly.

cards.title: 中国批准使用的SGLT2i品种
cards.claim_zh: 我国目前批准临床使用的SGLT2i包括达格列净、恩格列净、卡格列净、艾托格列净和恒格列净。
cards.claim_en: Five SGLT2 inhibitors are approved for clinical use in China: dapagliflozin, empagliflozin, canagliflozin, ertugliflozin, and henagliflozin.
synonyms: 钠-葡萄糖共转运蛋白2抑制剂

cards.title: SGLT2i老年患者疗效与耐受性
cards.claim_zh: SGLT2i对老年患者有效且耐受性可，由于其降糖机制并不依赖胰岛素，因此极少发生低血糖，还有减重的作用，特别是减少内脏脂肪。
cards.claim_en: SGLT2 inhibitors are effective and tolerable in elderly patients. Their glucose-lowering mechanism does not depend on insulin, so hypoglycemia rarely occurs. They also reduce body weight, especially visceral fat.

cards.title: EMPA-ELDERLY：恩格列净降重不减肌
cards.claim_zh: EMPA-ELDERLY研究显示，恩格列净可在不影响老年患者肌肉量与体能的情况下降低体质量。
cards.claim_en: The EMPA-ELDERLY study showed empagliflozin can reduce body weight in elderly patients without affecting muscle mass or physical function.

cards.title: SGLT2i心血管及肾脏获益一致性
cards.claim_zh: Meta分析结果显示，SGLT2i能够降低患者3P-MACE、HF住院及肾脏结局风险，且在老年和非老年患者中均一致。
cards.claim_en: Meta-analyses show SGLT2 inhibitors reduce 3P-MACE, HF hospitalization, and renal outcome risk, with consistent effects in elderly and non-elderly populations.

cards.title: SGLT2i为老年T2DM合并ASCVD/HF/CKD首选用药
cards.claim_zh: SGLT2i是老年T2DM患者的一级推荐降糖药物，推荐作为合并ASCVD或高危因素、HF及CKD的老年患者首选用药。
cards.claim_en: SGLT2 inhibitors are first-line recommended glucose-lowering drugs for elderly T2DM patients, and are recommended as first-choice for those with ASCVD, HF, or CKD.
synonyms: 动脉粥样硬化性心血管疾病

cards.title: SGLT2i eGFR用药阈值
cards.claim_zh: SGLT2i eGFR阈值：eGFR<45 mL/[min·(1.73 m²)]不建议使用卡格列净、艾托格列净，以降糖为目的不建议起始达格列净；eGFR<30不建议使用恒格列净，禁用卡格列净和艾托格列净；eGFR<25不建议起始使用任何SGLT2i；eGFR<20不建议起始使用恩格列净；若已使用恩格列净、达格列净，除非无法耐受或需肾脏替代治疗，不建议停用。
cards.claim_en: SGLT2i eGFR thresholds: eGFR<45 mL/[min·(1.73 m²)] — do not use canagliflozin, ertugliflozin; do not initiate dapagliflozin for glucose lowering; eGFR<30 — do not use henagliflozin; do not recommend empagliflozin; eGFR<25 — do not initiate any SGLT2i; eGFR<20 — do not initiate empagliflozin; if already on empagliflozin or dapagliflozin, do not discontinue unless intolerant or on renal replacement therapy.

cards.title: SGLT2i不良反应及老年风险
cards.claim_zh: SGLT2i常见的不良反应为泌尿生殖系统感染、血容量减少等。上市后临床监测中发现有酮症酸中毒的报告，老年患者使用时风险有可能更高。SGLT2i具有降低血压、减轻体质量的作用，应用此类药物应关注患者的血压，避免出现低血压。衰弱患者应用此类药物应慎重。
cards.claim_en: Common adverse reactions of SGLT2i include urinary/genital infections and volume depletion. Post-marketing surveillance identified ketoacidosis reports, with potentially higher risk in elderly patients. SGLT2i lower blood pressure and reduce body weight; blood pressure should be monitored to avoid hypotension. Caution in frail patients.

cards.title: GLP-1RA作用机制
cards.claim_zh: GLP-1RA通过与GLP-1受体结合发挥作用，以葡萄糖浓度依赖的方式促进胰岛素分泌和抑制胰高血糖素分泌进行降低血糖，并能延缓胃排空、抑制食欲中枢、减少进食量，兼具减轻体质量、降低血压和调节血脂的作用，且单独应用GLP-1RA时低血糖发生风险低。
cards.claim_en: GLP-1RA works by binding to the GLP-1 receptor, promoting insulin secretion and suppressing glucagon in a glucose-dependent manner, delaying gastric emptying, suppressing appetite centrally, reducing food intake, and also reducing body weight, lowering blood pressure, and regulating blood lipids. When used alone, the risk of hypoglycemia is low.
synonyms: 胰高血糖素样肽-1受体激动剂

cards.title: GLP-1RA老年患者安全性与有效性
cards.claim_zh: GLP-1RA在老年人群（>65岁）中的安全性和有效性与成人相似。
cards.claim_en: The safety and effectiveness of GLP-1RA in elderly patients (>65 years) are similar to adults.

cards.title: 中国批准使用的GLP-1RA品种及给药方式
cards.claim_zh: 目前国内上市的GLP-1RA有艾塞那肽、利拉鲁肽、利司那肽、度拉糖肽、贝那鲁肽、洛塞那肽和司美格鲁肽，均需皮下注射。利拉鲁肽每日注射一次，可在任意时间注射。利司那肽每日注射一次，可在任意一餐前注射。艾塞那肽周制剂、洛塞那肽、度拉糖肽、司美格鲁肽每周注射一次，且无时间限制。周制剂的用药依从性更高。
cards.claim_en: GLP-1RAs approved in China: exenatide, liraglutide, lixisenatide, dulaglutide, benaglutide, loraglutide, and semaglutide — all require subcutaneous injection. Liraglutide: once daily, any time. Lixisenatide: once daily, before any meal. Exenatide weekly, loraglutide, dulaglutide, semaglutide: once weekly with no time restriction. Weekly dosing improves adherence in elderly patients.

cards.title: GLP-1RA心血管获益（Meta分析）
cards.claim_zh: Meta分析显示，GLP-1RA能够显著降低3P-MACE、心血管死亡、卒中风险，效应在老年和非老年人群中一致。GLP-1RA还能降低患者不良肾脏结局风险，其作用主要由减少尿白蛋白排泄量所驱动。
cards.claim_en: Meta-analyses show GLP-1RA can significantly reduce 3P-MACE, cardiovascular death, and stroke risk, with consistent effects in elderly and non-elderly populations. GLP-1RA can also reduce adverse renal outcomes, driven mainly by reducing urinary albumin excretion.

cards.title: GLP-1RA推荐级别与替代用药
cards.claim_zh: 推荐GLP-1RA作为合并ASCVD或高危因素的老年患者首选用药，是一般老年T2DM患者的二级推荐降糖药物，但对合并ASCVD或高危因素的患者是一级推荐降糖药物。度拉糖肽可显著降低既往有心血管事件或高风险因素的T2DM患者的3P-MACE。老年T2DM患者合并CKD若无法耐受SGLT2i也可优选GLP-1RA。
cards.claim_en: GLP-1RA is recommended as first-choice for elderly T2DM patients with ASCVD or high-risk factors, and as second-line glucose-lowering drug for general elderly T2DM patients. Dulaglutide can significantly reduce 3P-MACE in T2DM patients with prior cardiovascular events or high-risk factors. In elderly T2DM patients with CKD who cannot tolerate SGLT2i, GLP-1RA is also a preferred option.

cards.title: First-line non-insulin monotherapy for older T2DM without ASCVD/HF/CKD
cards.claim_zh: 不合并ASCVD或高危因素、HF或CKD的老年T2DM患者（Group 1和Group 2），首选单药包括MET（二甲双胍）、DPP-4i、SGLT2i。
cards.claim_en: For older T2DM patients without established/high risk of ASCVD, HF, or CKD (Group 1 and Group 2), first-line single-drug choices are MET (metformin), DPP-4i, or SGLT2i.

cards.title: Second-line non-insulin agents for older T2DM
cards.claim_zh: 二级推荐药物：GLP-1RA、AGI（糖苷酶抑制剂）或格列奈类。
cards.claim_en: For older T2DM patients without ASCVD/HF/CKD, second-line recommendation (二级推荐) when first-line combination is insufficient: GLP-1RA, AGI, or glinides.

cards.title: Third-line non-insulin agents for older T2DM
cards.claim_zh: 三级推荐药物：SU（磺脲类）或TZD（噻唑烷二酮类）。
cards.claim_en: For older T2DM patients without ASCVD/HF/CKD, third-line recommendation (三级推荐): SU or TZD.

cards.title: DPP-4i and GLP-1RA must not be combined
cards.claim_zh: DPP-4i与GLP-1RA均为肠促胰素类药物，应避免同类药物联合使用。
cards.claim_en: DPP-4i and GLP-1RA are both incretin-based drugs (均为肠促胰素类药物); they should not be combined with each other.

cards.title: Escalation to combination therapy after 3 months of monotherapy failure
cards.claim_zh: 当单药治疗3个月以上仍血糖控制不佳时，应联合不同机制的药物进行治疗。
cards.claim_en: When single-drug treatment for 3 months or more still results in poor glycemic control, combination therapy with drugs of different mechanisms should be used.

cards.title: Treatment pathway applies to Group 1 and Group 2 elderly patients only
cards.claim_zh: 此路径图适用于健康状态良好（Group 1）和中等（Group 2）的老年T2DM患者。
cards.claim_en: This non-insulin treatment pathway (Fig. 1) applies to older T2DM patients with good (Group 1) or moderate (Group 2) health status assessment.

cards.title: PPAR pan-agonists (chiglitazar sodium) mechanism and evidence gap in elderly
cards.claim_zh: PPAR泛激动剂代表药物西格列他钠是新一代非TZD类胰岛素增敏剂，能同时激活PPAR-α、γ和δ亚型受体；在老年糖尿病人群中的应用数据有限。
cards.claim_en: PPAR pan-agonist representative chiglitazar sodium is a next-generation non-TZD insulin sensitizer that simultaneously activates PPAR-α, γ, and δ subtypes; application data in elderly diabetic patients is limited.

cards.title: GKA (dorzagliatin) mechanism and evidence gap in elderly
cards.claim_zh: GKA代表药物多格列艾汀通过葡萄糖依赖的方式调节葡萄糖激酶活性，改善血糖调节稳态；在老年糖尿病人群中的应用数据有限。
cards.claim_en: GKA representative dorzagliatin regulates glucokinase activity in a glucose-dependent manner to improve glycemic homeostasis; application data in elderly diabetic patients is limited.

cards.title: FRC advantages in simplifying regimen and improving adherence
cards.claim_zh: FDC和FRC具有覆盖多种病理生理机制、简化治疗方案、减轻用药负担等优势，有助于提高老年患者治疗依从性与满意度。
cards.claim_en: Fixed-ratio combinations (FRC) and fixed-dose combinations (FDC) cover multiple pathophysiological mechanisms, simplify treatment regimens, reduce medication burden, and help improve treatment adherence and satisfaction in elderly patients.

cards.title: ASCVD or high-risk: first-line non-insulin therapy
cards.claim_zh: 合并ASCVD或高危因素的老年T2DM患者（Group 1和Group 2），非胰岛素首选药物为GLP-1RA*和/或SGLT2i#。
cards.claim_en: For elderly T2DM patients with established ASCVD or high-risk factors (Group 1 and Group 2), first-line non-insulin pharmacotherapy is GLP-1RA and/or SGLT2i (with proven benefit evidence).
cards.population: elderly T2DM with ASCVD or high-risk factors, Group 1 and Group 2

cards.title: ASCVD or high-risk: combination therapy when HbA1c not at target
cards.claim_zh: 合并ASCVD或高危因素的老年T2DM患者，HbA1c不达标时联合治疗：一级推荐MET或DPP-4i；二级推荐AGI或格列奈类；三级推荐SU或TZD。DPP-4i与GLP-1RA均为肠促胰素类药物，格列奈类与SU均为胰岛素促泌剂，应避免同类药物联合使用。
cards.claim_en: For elderly T2DM patients with ASCVD or high-risk factors, when HbA1c is not at target after first-line therapy, add combination therapy: Tier 1 (first-line) MET or DPP-4i; Tier 2 (second-line) AGI or glinides; Tier 3 (third-line) SU or TZD. DPP-4i and GLP-1RA must not be combined (both incretin-based). Glinides and SU must not be combined (both insulin secretagogues).
cards.population: elderly T2DM with ASCVD or high-risk factors, Group 1 and Group 2

cards.title: Heart failure: first-line non-insulin therapy
cards.claim_zh: 合并HF的老年T2DM患者，非胰岛素首选药物为SGLT2i#。
cards.claim_en: For elderly T2DM patients with heart failure (HF), first-line non-insulin pharmacotherapy is SGLT2i (with proven benefit evidence).
cards.population: elderly T2DM with HF, Group 1 and Group 2

cards.title: Heart failure: combination therapy when HbA1c not at target
cards.claim_zh: 合并HF的老年T2DM患者，HbA1c不达标时联合治疗：一级推荐MET或DPP-4i；二级推荐GLP-1RA或AGI或格列奈类；三级推荐SU或TZD。
cards.claim_en: For elderly T2DM patients with HF, when HbA1c is not at target after first-line therapy, add combination therapy: Tier 1 MET or DPP-4i; Tier 2 GLP-1RA or AGI or glinides; Tier 3 SU or TZD.
cards.population: elderly T2DM with HF, Group 1 and Group 2

cards.title: CKD: first-line non-insulin therapy
cards.claim_zh: 合并CKD的老年T2DM患者，非胰岛素首选药物为SGLT2i#和/或GLP-1RA*。
cards.claim_en: For elderly T2DM patients with chronic kidney disease (CKD), first-line non-insulin pharmacotherapy is SGLT2i and/or GLP-1RA (both with proven benefit evidence).
cards.population: elderly T2DM with CKD, Group 1 and Group 2

cards.title: CKD: combination therapy when HbA1c not at target
cards.claim_zh: 合并CKD的老年T2DM患者，HbA1c不达标时联合治疗：一级推荐MET或DPP-4i；二级推荐AGI或格列奈类；三级推荐SU或TZD。
cards.claim_en: For elderly T2DM patients with CKD, when HbA1c is not at target after first-line therapy, add combination therapy: Tier 1 MET or DPP-4i; Tier 2 AGI or glinides; Tier 3 SU or TZD.
cards.population: elderly T2DM with CKD, Group 1 and Group 2

cards.title: Insulin initiation criteria for elderly T2DM
cards.claim_zh: 老年T2DM患者（Group 1和Group 2），非胰岛素治疗不达标（≥3个月）时启用胰岛素治疗。
cards.claim_en: For elderly T2DM patients (Group 1 and Group 2), insulin therapy should be initiated when non-insulin therapy fails to achieve targets for 3 months or longer.

cards.title: First-line insulin options for elderly T2DM
cards.claim_zh: 老年T2DM患者启用胰岛素（Group 1和Group 2）：一级推荐为基础胰岛素、双胰岛素（1~2次/d）或基础胰岛素/GLP-1RA复方制剂；二级推荐为餐时胰岛素；三级推荐为预混胰岛素。
cards.claim_en: For elderly T2DM patients initiating insulin (Group 1 and Group 2), first-line options are: basal insulin, dual insulin (1-2 times/day), or basal insulin/GLP-1RA fixed-ratio combination. Second-line is prandial insulin. Third-line is premixed insulin.

cards.title: Insulin intensification: basal-prandial or CSII as final escalation
cards.claim_zh: 老年T2DM胰岛素治疗升级路径（Group 1和Group 2）：基础胰岛素或基础/GLP-1RA复方→预混胰岛素2~3次/d（二级）→基础-餐时胰岛素（餐时1~3次/d）或持续皮下胰岛素注射（三级）。
cards.claim_en: For elderly T2DM patients on insulin (Group 1 and Group 2), when intensification is needed: from basal insulin or basal/GLP-1RA combination → premixed insulin 2-3 times/day (second-line) → basal-prandial insulin (prandial 1-3 times/day) or continuous subcutaneous insulin infusion (CSII) as third-line escalation.

cards.title: Do not continue SU or glinides when starting insulin
cards.claim_zh: 启用胰岛素治疗可联合非胰岛素治疗，但不建议继续使用磺脲类（SU）或格列奈类药物。
cards.claim_en: When initiating insulin therapy in elderly T2DM patients, non-insulin therapies may be continued, but sulfonylureas (SU) and glinides must NOT be continued.

cards.title: Insulin analogs preferred over human insulin for elderly T2DM
cards.claim_zh: 胰岛素包括人胰岛素和胰岛素类似物，优选胰岛素类似物。预混胰岛素注射3次/d时需选用胰岛素类似物；预混人胰岛素、双胰岛素不能3次/d注射。
cards.claim_en: For elderly T2DM patients on insulin, both human insulin and insulin analogs may be used, but insulin analogs are preferred. When premixed insulin is injected 3 times/day, only insulin analogs may be used (premixed human insulin cannot be injected 3 times/day). Dual insulin cannot be injected 3 times/day.

cards.title: Frail or end-of-life elderly T2DM: relaxed glucose targets, avoid hypoglycemia
cards.claim_zh: 虚弱或临终前老年T2DM患者，不建议依据上述路径进行方案选择，应基于重要脏器功能、药物治疗反应、低血糖风险等，制定相对宽松的血糖控制目标，以不发生低血糖和严重高血糖为基本原则。应尊重患者及家属的意愿。
cards.claim_en: For frail or end-of-life elderly T2DM patients (including pre-terminal status), do not follow the standard treatment pathways. Base decisions on organ function, drug response, and hypoglycemia risk. Set relatively relaxed blood glucose control targets with the core principle of avoiding hypoglycemia and severe hyperglycemia. Respect the wishes of patients and their families.

cards.title: Frail or end-of-life elderly T2DM: prefer long-acting basal insulin, avoid high-hypoglycemia-risk drugs
cards.claim_zh: 虚弱或临终前老年T2DM患者，应用不易引起低血糖的口服药和/或长效（超长效）基础胰岛素（如甘精胰岛素U100、德谷胰岛素、甘精胰岛素U300等），较使用一日多次速效胰岛素或预混胰岛素更为安全，剂量也更容易调整，不推荐使用低血糖风险高、减轻体质量的药物。
cards.claim_en: For frail or end-of-life elderly T2DM patients, use oral drugs unlikely to cause hypoglycemia and/or long-acting (ultra-long-acting) basal insulin such as insulin glargine U100, insulin degludec, or insulin glargine U300. These are safer and easier to dose-adjust than multiple daily rapid-acting insulin or premixed insulin. Do not use drugs with high hypoglycemia risk or that reduce body weight.

cards.title: ASCVD/高危老年糖尿病患者优选GLP-1RA或SGLT2i
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病合并ASCVD或高危因素时，降糖药物应优选具有心血管保护作用的GLP-1RA或SGLT2i。（A）
cards.claim_en: For older diabetic patients with ASCVD or high cardiovascular risk factors, hypoglycemic therapy should preferentially select GLP-1RA or SGLT2i with cardiovascular protective effects. (Recommendation A)
synonyms: 钠-葡萄糖共转运蛋白2抑制剂

cards.title: 老年糖尿病患者收缩压控制目标<130 mmHg
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病患者收缩压控制目标为130 mmHg（1 mmHg=0.133 kPa）以下，以降低心血管疾病风险，但应警惕低血压风险。（B）
cards.claim_en: The systolic blood pressure control target for older diabetic patients is <130 mm Hg (1 mm Hg=0.133 kPa) to reduce cardiovascular disease risk, but hypotension risk should be monitored. (Recommendation B)

cards.title: 降压药物首选ACEI或ARB，不建议二者联合
cards.claim_zh: 降压药物首选血管紧张素转化酶抑制剂（ACEI）或血管紧张素Ⅱ受体拮抗剂（ARB）类，不建议二者联合用药，钙通道阻滞剂、利尿剂、β受体阻滞剂可作为与ACEI或ARB类联用的备选药物。（A）
cards.claim_en: First-line antihypertensives are ACEI or ARB; combined use of ACEI and ARB is not recommended. Calcium channel blockers, diuretics, and beta-blockers may serve as add-on options in combination with ACEI or ARB. (Recommendation A)
synonyms: 血管紧张素转化酶抑制剂
血管紧张素Ⅱ受体拮抗剂

cards.title: 低剂量阿司匹林用于ASCVD二级预防而非一级预防
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病患者不建议常规应用阿司匹林进行ASCVD的一级预防，建议低剂量（75~150 mg/d）阿司匹林用于ASCVD的二级预防。（A）
cards.claim_en: Routine aspirin for primary prevention of ASCVD is not recommended for older diabetic patients. Low-dose aspirin (75–150 mg/d) is recommended for secondary prevention of ASCVD. (Recommendation A)

cards.title: 鼓励老年糖尿病患者戒烟以降低ASCVD风险
cards.claim_zh: 鼓励老年糖尿病患者积极戒烟以降低ASCVD风险。（A）
cards.claim_en: Older diabetic patients are encouraged to actively quit smoking to reduce ASCVD risk. (Recommendation A)

cards.title: 老年糖尿病患者体质量管理应兼顾BMI和身体成分
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病患者的体质量管理应兼顾体质指数和身体成分。（B）
cards.claim_en: Weight management for older diabetic patients should account for both body mass index (BMI) and body composition. (Recommendation B)

cards.title: T2DM患者心血管疾病风险为非糖尿病患者2倍以上
cards.claim_zh: T2DM患者心血管疾病的风险是非糖尿病患者的2倍以上。
cards.claim_en: T2DM patients have a cardiovascular disease risk more than 2-fold higher than non-diabetic patients.

cards.title: 收缩压每升高10 mmHg，缺血性心脏病和脑卒中风险增加30%
cards.claim_zh: 收缩压每升高10 mmHg，缺血性心脏病和缺血性脑卒中的相对发病风险增加30%。
cards.claim_en: Each 10 mmHg rise in systolic blood pressure increases the relative risk of ischemic heart disease and ischemic stroke by 30%.

cards.title: 老年T2DM短期胰岛素治疗：基础-餐时方案为一级推荐
cards.claim_zh: 老年T2DM患者HbA1c>10.0%或伴有高血糖症状或有分解代谢证据或严重高血糖（空腹血糖>16.7 mmol/L）时：基础-餐时胰岛素治疗（餐时1~3次/d）为一级推荐；预混胰岛素（2~3次/d）为二级推荐；持续皮下胰岛素注射为三级推荐。优选胰岛素类似物。
cards.claim_en: For older T2DM patients with HbA1c >10.0%, hyperglycemic symptoms, catabolic evidence, or severe hyperglycemia (fasting glucose >16.7 mmol/L), basal-bolus insulin (1–3 bolus doses/d) is the 1st-level recommendation, premixed insulin (2–3 doses/d) is 2nd-level, and continuous subcutaneous insulin infusion (CSII) is 3rd-level.

cards.title: BP target <140 mmHg does not reduce primary composite endpoints in elderly DM
cards.claim_zh: 收缩压目标<140 mmHg并不能降低主要复合终点（非致死性心肌梗死、非致死性卒中和心血管死亡），却增加低血压、高钾血症等不良反应风险。
cards.claim_en: A systolic blood pressure target of <140 mmHg does not reduce the primary composite endpoint (non-fatal myocardial infarction, non-fatal stroke, cardiovascular death) in elderly diabetic patients, but increases the risk of hypotension and hyperkalemia.

cards.title: STEP study: intensive SBP 110-130 reduces MACE by 26%
cards.claim_zh: 2021年中国STEP研究：强化降压（收缩压目标110-130 mmHg）与标准降压（130-150 mmHg）相比，使老年患者MACE风险降低26%，除低血压风险增加以外，未增加头晕、骨折等不良反应风险。
cards.claim_en: In the 2021 Chinese STEP study, intensive systolic blood pressure control (110-130 mmHg) vs standard control (130-150 mmHg) reduced MACE risk by 26% in elderly diabetic patients aged 60-80 years, without increasing dizziness or fracture risk, only hypotension risk.

cards.title: Healthy elderly DM <80y: SBP target <130 mmHg
cards.claim_zh: 建议健康状态良好同时年龄<80岁的老年糖尿病患者收缩压控制目标为<130 mmHg以下，以降低心血管疾病风险，但需密切监测血压，以防出现体位性低血压、餐后低血压、舒张压过低等情况。
cards.claim_en: For healthy elderly diabetic patients aged <80 years, the recommended systolic blood pressure target is <130 mmHg to reduce cardiovascular disease risk. Monitor for orthostatic hypotension, postprandial hypotension, and excessive diastolic pressure drop.

cards.title: SBP <120 mmHg NOT recommended for elderly DM
cards.claim_zh: 不建议将收缩压<120 mmHg作为老年糖尿病患者的控制目标。
cards.claim_en: A systolic blood pressure target of <120 mmHg is NOT recommended as a control target for elderly diabetic patients.

cards.title: Aged ≥80 Group 3: SBP target relaxed to <150 mmHg
cards.claim_zh: 对于年龄≥80岁、预期寿命短或健康状态差（Group 3）的患者可适当放宽收缩压控制目标至<150 mmHg。
cards.claim_en: For elderly diabetic patients aged ≥80 years with short life expectancy or poor health status (Group 3), the systolic blood pressure target can be relaxed to <150 mmHg.

cards.title: ACEI/ARB first-line for BP control in elderly DM
cards.claim_zh: ACEI可显著减少老年糖尿病患者的MACE、心血管死亡和全因死亡；ARB具有相似效果，在老年人中显著减少脑卒中。推荐将ACEI或ARB作为老年糖尿病患者控制血压的一线用药，但不建议两类药物联合应用，以避免高钾血症和急性肾损伤。
cards.claim_en: ACEI can reduce MACE, cardiovascular death, and all-cause death in elderly diabetic patients. ARB has equivalent effects and reduces stroke in the elderly. ACEI or ARB is recommended as first-line antihypertensive agents for elderly diabetic patients, but combination of ACEI and ARB is NOT advised to avoid hyperkalemia and acute kidney injury.
synonyms: 血管紧张素受体拮抗剂

cards.title: Add CCB/thiazide/beta-blocker if ACEI/ARB monotherapy insufficient
cards.claim_zh: 如使用ACEI或ARB单药血压控制不佳，可考虑加用钙通道阻滞剂、噻嗪类利尿剂或β受体阻滞剂协同降压。
cards.claim_en: If blood pressure remains inadequately controlled with ACEI or ARB monotherapy, calcium channel blockers, thiazide diuretics, or beta-blockers may be added for synergistic blood pressure lowering.

cards.title: LDL-C targets for elderly DM: <2.6 general, <1.8 with ASCVD
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病患者LDL-C应控制在2.6 mmol/L以下；合并ASCVD的老年糖尿病患者，应控制在1.8 mmol/L以下；对于年龄≥80岁、预期寿命短或健康状态差（Group 3）的患者建议适当放宽LDL-C目标。
cards.claim_en: For elderly diabetic patients, LDL-C should be controlled below 2.6 mmol/L. For those with comorbid ASCVD, LDL-C should be controlled below 1.8 mmol/L. For patients aged ≥80 years with short life expectancy or poor health status (Group 3), LDL-C targets may be appropriately relaxed.

cards.title: Statin reduces CV events and all-cause death in elderly DM
cards.claim_zh: 他汀类药物治疗有助于降低老年患者心血管事件和全因死亡风险。HPS-DIM研究、CARDS研究等均提示他汀类药物可降低老年糖尿病患者的心血管事件风险，但针对80岁以上老年糖尿病患者的证据缺乏。
cards.claim_en: Statin therapy reduces cardiovascular events and all-cause death risk in elderly diabetic patients. HPS-DIM and CARDS studies demonstrate statins reduce cardiovascular event risk in elderly diabetic patients, though evidence for patients aged ≥80 years is lacking.

cards.title: IMPROVE-IT: ezetimibe+simvastatin reduces ischemic stroke by 24%
cards.claim_zh: IMPROVE-IT研究显示，依折麦布联合辛伐他汀可使急性冠脉综合征患者的缺血性脑卒中风险降低24%，合并糖尿病或其他高危因素时获益更显著。
cards.claim_en: The IMPROVE-IT study showed that ezetimibe combined with simvastatin reduced ischemic stroke risk by 24% in acute coronary syndrome patients, with greater benefit in those with diabetes or other high-risk factors.

cards.title: Statin insufficient: add ezetimibe or PCSK9i; TG >5.65: fibrates
cards.claim_zh: 如果单用他汀类药物效果欠佳，可考虑谨慎加用依折麦布或PCSK9抑制剂作为联合用药。老年糖尿病患者甘油三酯>5.65 mmol/L时，可应用非诺贝特以降低胰腺炎风险，但需警惕与他汀类药物联用时增加不良反应的风险。监测肝功能和肌酸激酶变化。
cards.claim_en: If statin monotherapy is insufficient, consider adding ezetimibe or PCSK9 inhibitors. For elderly diabetic patients with triglycerides >5.65 mmol/L, fibrates may be used to reduce pancreatitis risk, but caution is needed regarding combination with statins due to increased adverse effect risk. Monitor liver function and creatine kinase.

cards.title: Aspirin NOT recommended for primary CV prevention in elderly DM
cards.claim_zh: ASPREE研究显示，在年龄≥70岁具有一定心血管疾病风险的人群中，应用阿司匹林不降低心血管疾病发生率，但却增加出血风险。目前尚无充足的证据支持在老年糖尿病患者中应用阿司匹林进行一级预防利大于弊。不建议老年糖尿病患者常规应用阿司匹林进行心血管疾病事件的一级预防。
cards.claim_en: The ASPREE study showed that aspirin does NOT reduce cardiovascular disease incidence in people aged ≥70 years with cardiovascular risk, but increases bleeding risk. There is insufficient evidence that aspirin primary prevention benefits outweigh risks in elderly diabetic patients. Routine aspirin is NOT recommended for primary cardiovascular prevention in elderly diabetic patients.

cards.title: Low-dose aspirin 75-150 mg/d for secondary prevention with ASCVD
cards.claim_zh: 推荐合并ASCVD的老年糖尿病患者应用低剂量阿司匹林（75-150 mg/d）作为二级预防。但在年龄≥80岁、预期寿命短和健康状态差（Group 3）的患者中需个体化考虑。
cards.claim_en: For elderly diabetic patients with comorbid ASCVD, low-dose aspirin 75-150 mg/d is recommended for secondary cardiovascular prevention. For patients aged ≥80 years with short life expectancy or poor health status (Group 3), individualized decision-making is required.

cards.title: GI bleeding risk factors for aspirin in elderly DM
cards.claim_zh: 阿司匹林最常见的不良事件为消化道出血。出血风险因素包括：阿司匹林剂量大、应用时间长、严重肝功能不全、肾功能不全、消化道溃疡、出血性疾病、血小板减少、应用非甾体类抗炎药、血压控制不佳等。联合应用质子泵抑制剂可能有助于降低消化道出血风险。
cards.claim_en: The most common adverse event of aspirin is gastrointestinal bleeding. Risk factors include: high dose, long-term use, severe hepatic insufficiency, renal insufficiency, GI ulcer, hemorrhagic disease, thrombocytopenia, NSAID use, and poor blood pressure control. Proton pump inhibitor co-administration may help reduce GI bleeding risk.

cards.title: Smoking cessation benefits all elderly diabetic patients
cards.claim_zh: 吸烟增加冠心病、脑卒中等疾病的发病和死亡风险，并呈剂量反应关系；被动吸烟也可增加心血管疾病风险。在老年人中，吸烟仍是心血管疾病重要的独立危险因素之一，戒烟有利于降低心血管疾病风险，任何年龄的老年人戒烟均可获益。应积极鼓励老年糖尿病患者戒烟。
cards.claim_en: Smoking increases coronary heart disease and stroke risk with a dose-response relationship; secondhand smoke also increases cardiovascular risk. Smoking remains an independent cardiovascular risk factor in the elderly. Cessation reduces cardiovascular risk and benefits elderly smokers at any age. Actively encourage all elderly diabetic patients to quit smoking.

cards.title: 老年糖尿病肾功能年度评估
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病在诊断时及诊断后每年均应对肾脏功能进行评估。（A）
cards.claim_en: Elderly diabetic patients should have kidney function assessed at diagnosis and annually thereafter (Grade A).

cards.title: UACR联合eGFR筛查肾脏病变
cards.claim_zh: 联合采用尿白蛋白/尿肌酐比值（UACR）和eGFR两种方法筛查及评估肾脏病变程度。（A）
cards.claim_en: Use both UACR (urine albumin/creatinine ratio) and eGFR to screen and assess kidney damage in elderly diabetic patients (Grade A).

cards.title: SGLT2i优先用于CKD老年糖尿病患者
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病合并CKD患者优先选用SGLT2i，如不耐受或有禁忌，应用有肾脏保护作用证据的GLP-1RA。（B）
cards.claim_en: For elderly diabetic patients with CKD, SGLT2i is preferred; if not tolerated or contraindicated, GLP-1RA with renal protective evidence should be used (Grade B).
synonyms: 钠-葡萄糖共转运蛋白2抑制剂
胰高血糖素样肽-1受体激动剂

cards.title: ACEi/ARB用于老年糖尿病降压
cards.claim_zh: 推荐采用ACEI类或ARB类药物进行降压治疗。（B）
cards.claim_en: ACEi or ARB is recommended for blood pressure control in elderly diabetic patients with CKD (Grade B).
synonyms: 血管紧张素转化酶抑制剂
血管紧张素Ⅱ受体拮抗剂

cards.title: 非奈利酮延缓CKD伴蛋白尿进展
cards.claim_zh: 推荐合并CKD伴蛋白尿的老年糖尿病患者应用非甾体盐皮质受体阻滞剂非奈利酮，以延缓肾病进展。（A）
cards.claim_en: For elderly diabetic patients with CKD and albuminuria, the non-steroidal mineralocorticoid receptor antagonist finerenone is recommended to slow kidney disease progression (Grade A).
cards.population: elderly diabetic with CKD and albuminuria

cards.title: CKD需以降糖为基础的综合管理
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病中的CKD常由多种因素导致，应进行降糖治疗为基础的综合管理。（A）
cards.claim_en: CKD in elderly diabetic patients is often caused by multiple factors; management should be comprehensive and based on glucose control (Grade A).

cards.title: UACR≥30 mg/g为异常升高阈值
cards.claim_zh: UACR＞30 mg/g即被认为升高，但剧烈运动、感染、发热、充血性心衰、血糖或血压明显升高等均可能导致UACR升高。
cards.claim_en: UACR ≥30 mg/g is considered elevated; however, exercise, infection, fever, heart failure, and significant blood glucose or blood pressure elevations may cause false elevations.

cards.title: 非透析CKD蛋白质摄入0.8 g/kg/d
cards.claim_zh: 对于非透析患者，推荐每日优质蛋白质摄入量0.8 g/kg。
cards.claim_en: For non-dialysis CKD patients, recommended daily high-quality protein intake is 0.8 g/kg.

cards.title: CKD患者钠盐限制目标
cards.claim_zh: 限制钠盐摄入，氯化钠＜5 g/d或钠＜2 g/d，有助于降低血压及心血管疾病风险。
cards.claim_en: For CKD patients, sodium restriction is recommended: NaCl <5 g/d or sodium <2 g/d to help lower blood pressure and cardiovascular disease risk.

cards.title: 仅1/3肾损伤由糖尿病单独导致
cards.claim_zh: 存在肾损伤的老年糖尿病患者中，仅1/3患者的肾损伤是单纯因糖尿病所致。
cards.claim_en: Among elderly diabetic patients with kidney injury, only approximately 1/3 have kidney injury solely caused by diabetes.

cards.title: T1DM与T2DM肾病发病时间差异
cards.claim_zh: 部分T1DM患者病程超过5～10年后出现糖尿病肾病，T2DM可能在诊断时即已经出现肾脏病变。
cards.claim_en: T1DM patients typically develop diabetic nephropathy 5-10 years after onset; T2DM patients may already have kidney disease at diagnosis.

cards.title: FIDELIO-DKD: 非奈利酮降低肾脏复合终点
cards.claim_zh: FIDELIO-DKD研究显示，非奈利酮显著降低T2DM伴CKD患者的肾脏复合终点事件风险，中国亚组数据结果与总体人群相似。
cards.claim_en: FIDELIO-DKD study showed finerenone significantly reduced the risk of composite renal endpoint events in T2DM patients with CKD; Chinese subgroup data were consistent with the overall population.

cards.title: Finerenone for elderly T2DM with CKD and proteinuria
cards.claim_zh: 对于eGFR≥25 mL/[min·(1.73 m²)]的老年糖尿病合并CKD的蛋白尿患者，推荐在使用最大耐受剂量ACEI或ARB治疗的基础上加用非甾体盐皮质受体阻滞剂非奈利酮，以降低尿蛋白并延缓CKD进展。使用过程中注意需监测血钾、肾功能。此外，使用该药物尚存在偶发严重贫血的报道。
cards.claim_en: For elderly patients with T2DM, CKD, proteinuria, and eGFR ≥25 mL/[min·(1.73 m²)], add non-steroidal mineralocorticoid receptor antagonist (finerenone) on top of maximally tolerated ACEI/ARB to reduce albuminuria and delay CKD progression. Monitor potassium and renal function. Risk of serious anemia reported.
cards.population: elderly T2DM with CKD and proteinuria

cards.title: DR screening at diagnosis then annually
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病患者确诊时应进行糖尿病眼底病变筛查，此后每年复查，如存在眼底病变，增加复查频次。（A）
cards.claim_en: Elderly diabetes patients should undergo diabetic retinopathy (DR) screening at diagnosis, then at least once per year thereafter. If DR is present, increase screening frequency. (Grade A recommendation)
synonyms: 糖尿病视网膜病变筛查

cards.title: DR screening frequency by severity stage
cards.claim_zh: 如无DR或为轻度非增殖期DR，应每年复查1次；如为中度非增殖期DR，建议每6个月复查1次；重度非增殖期DR和增殖期DR，每3个月复查1次。
cards.claim_en: DR screening frequency by severity: mild non-proliferative DR (NPDR) — once per year; moderate NPDR — every 6 months; severe NPDR and proliferative DR (PDR) — every 3 months.

cards.title: CKD visit frequency: G1+A1/A2 — 1×/yr
cards.claim_zh: CKD 1期（eGFR≥90）：A1（UACR<30 mg/g）和A2（UACR 30~300 mg/g）建议每年复查1次（如有CKD）。
cards.claim_en: CKD Stage G1 (eGFR ≥90 mL/[min·(1.73 m²)]): with UACR <30 mg/g (A1) or UACR 30–300 mg/g (A2), recommended visit frequency is 1 time per year (if CKD exists for A1).

cards.title: CKD visit frequency: G1+A3 — 2×/yr
cards.claim_zh: CKD 1期（eGFR≥90）：A3（UACR>300 mg/g）建议每年复查2次。
cards.claim_en: CKD Stage G1 (eGFR ≥90) with UACR >300 mg/g (A3): recommended visit frequency is 2 times per year.
cards.population: elderly diabetes with CKD G1 + A3

cards.title: CKD visit frequency: G2+A1/A2 — 1×/yr, G2+A3 — 2×/yr
cards.claim_zh: CKD 2期（eGFR 60~89）：A1和A2建议每年复查1次，A3建议每年复查2次。
cards.claim_en: CKD Stage G2 (eGFR 60–89 mL/[min·(1.73 m²)]): with UACR <30 mg/g (A1) or UACR 30–300 mg/g (A2), visit 1 time/year; with UACR >300 mg/g (A3), visit 2 times/year.

cards.title: CKD visit frequency: G3a — 1 to 3×/yr by UACR
cards.claim_zh: CKD 3a期（eGFR 45~59）：A1建议每年复查1次，A2建议每年复查2次，A3建议每年复查3次。
cards.claim_en: CKD Stage G3a (eGFR 45–59 mL/[min·(1.73 m²)]): UACR <30 mg/g (A1) → 1 time/year; UACR 30–300 mg/g (A2) → 2 times/year; UACR >300 mg/g (A3) → 3 times/year.

cards.title: CKD visit frequency: G3b — 2 to 3×/yr by UACR
cards.claim_zh: CKD 3b期（eGFR 30~44）：A1建议每年复查2次，A2和A3建议每年复查3次。
cards.claim_en: CKD Stage G3b (eGFR 30–44 mL/[min·(1.73 m²)]): UACR <30 mg/g (A1) → 2 times/year; UACR 30–300 mg/g (A2) → 3 times/year; UACR >300 mg/g (A3) → 3 times/year.

cards.title: CKD visit frequency: G4 — 3 to 4×/yr by UACR
cards.claim_zh: CKD 4期（eGFR 15~29）：A1和A2建议每年复查3次，A3建议每年复查4次。
cards.claim_en: CKD Stage G4 (eGFR 15–29 mL/[min·(1.73 m²)]): UACR <30 mg/g (A1) → 3 times/year; UACR 30–300 mg/g (A2) → 3 times/year; UACR >300 mg/g (A3) → 4 times/year.

cards.title: CKD visit frequency: G5 — 4×/yr regardless of UACR
cards.claim_zh: CKD 5期（eGFR<15）：无论A1、A2还是A3，均建议每年复查4次。
cards.claim_en: CKD Stage G5 (eGFR <15 mL/[min·(1.73 m²)]): visit 4 times/year regardless of UACR category (A1, A2, or A3).

cards.title: GLP-1RA and diabetic retinopathy relationship
cards.claim_zh: Meta分析显示，与安慰剂相比，GLP-1RA与早期DR风险增加明显相关，但与胰岛素相比，GLP-1RA能保护晚期DR。基于CVOT研究数据的Meta分析未发现GLP-1RA与DR本身有关，但与HbA1c下降有关。目前GLP-1RA与DR的关系尚缺乏针对老年糖尿病人群的数据。
cards.claim_en: Meta-analysis shows GLP-1RA is associated with increased early DR risk compared to placebo, but protects against late-stage DR compared to insulin. GLP-1RA-related DR risk is associated with HbA1c reduction. Data on elderly diabetes patients is currently lacking.

cards.title: Proliferative DR treatment options
cards.claim_zh: 全视网膜激光光凝术是增殖期DR的主要治疗方法，玻璃腔内抗血管内皮生长因子（VEGF）也是有效的治疗方法之一。
cards.claim_en: Panretinal laser photocoagulation is the primary treatment for proliferative DR (PDR). Intravitreal anti-vascular endothelial growth factor (anti-VEGF, e.g., bevacizumab) is also an effective treatment.

cards.title: Elderly T2DM DSPN screening at diagnosis and annually
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病患者诊断时应进行远端对称性多发性神经病变筛查，此后每年进行筛查。（A）
cards.claim_en: Elderly diabetic patients should be screened for distal symmetrical multiple neuropathy (DSPN) at diagnosis, and annually thereafter. Evidence level A.
synonyms: 远端对称性多发性神经病变

cards.title: Elderly T2DM autonomic neuropathy screening emphasis
cards.claim_zh: 应重视老年糖尿病患者糖尿病自主神经病变的筛查和治疗，尤其是心脏自主神经病变。（B）
cards.claim_en: Screening and treatment of diabetic autonomic neuropathy, especially cardiac autonomic neuropathy (CAN), should be emphasized in elderly diabetic patients. Evidence level B.

cards.title: Painful diabetic neuropathy impacts quality of life
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病痛性神经病变严重影响老年糖尿病患者的生活质量，应予以重视。（B）
cards.claim_en: Painful diabetic neuropathy severely impacts the quality of life of elderly diabetic patients and deserves attention. Evidence level B.

cards.title: DSPN proportion among diabetic neuropathies
cards.claim_zh: DSPN是最常见的类型，约占糖尿病神经病变的75%，是糖尿病足溃疡的重要危险因素，也是跌倒及骨折的重要原因。
cards.claim_en: DSPN is the most common type of diabetic neuropathy, accounting for approximately 75% of diabetic neuropathy cases, and is an important risk factor for diabetic foot ulcers, falls, and fractures.
synonyms: 远端对称性多发性神经病变

cards.title: DSPN prevalence in elderly T2DM (Beijing data)
cards.claim_zh: 北京地区的数据显示，老年T2DM中DSPN患病率为42.6%，疑似DSPN患病率为26.2%。
cards.claim_en: Beijing regional data show that among elderly T2DM patients, confirmed DSPN prevalence is 42.6% and suspected DSPN prevalence is 26.2%.
synonyms: 远端对称性多发性神经病变

cards.title: DSPN clinical evaluation components
cards.claim_zh: 对于新诊断的老年糖尿病患者，应进行DSPN评估，具体包括详细的病史、小纤维功能（温度觉、针刺痛觉）和大纤维功能（压力觉、踝反射和振动觉）评估，此后每年进行筛查，此外每年均应进行10g尼龙丝测试。
cards.claim_en: For newly diagnosed elderly T2DM patients, DSPN evaluation should include detailed history, small-fiber function (temperature sensation, pinprick pain), and large-fiber function (pressure sense, ankle reflex, vibration sense), with annual 10g monofilament testing thereafter.

cards.title: Age as independent risk factor for DSPN
cards.claim_zh: 年龄是DSPN的独立危险因素。
cards.claim_en: Age is an independent risk factor for DSPN.

cards.title: CAN prevalence in T2DM (Beijing data)
cards.claim_zh: 北京地区的数据显示，T2DM中CAN的患病率高达62.6%，其中≥60岁的T2DM患者中CAN的患病率为67.5%，略高于总体人群。CAN发生的T2DM中55.7%为老年患者。
cards.claim_en: Beijing regional data show CAN prevalence in T2DM is 62.6%, and CAN prevalence in T2DM patients aged ≥60 years is 67.5%. Among T2DM patients with CAN, 55.7% are elderly patients.

cards.title: CAN independent risk factor and clinical significance
cards.claim_zh: 多因素Logistic回归分析显示，年龄是CAN的独立危险因素。CAN独立于其他心血管危险因素，与死亡风险相关。对已有微血管和神经并发症、低血糖感知缺乏的老年T2DM患者应评估是否存在CAN症状或体征。
cards.claim_en: Logistic regression analysis shows age is an independent risk factor for CAN. CAN is independent of other cardiovascular risk factors and is associated with mortality risk. Elderly T2DM patients with existing microvascular/neurological complications or hypoglycemia unawareness should be evaluated for CAN.

cards.title: DSPN treatment: no reversal, delay progression
cards.claim_zh: 目前尚无有效治疗手段逆转DSPN，一旦考虑DSPN诊断时，应尽早开始治疗以延缓DSPN进展。血糖控制是预防DSPN发生和延缓其进展的主要手段。针对血压、血脂等多种危险因素的综合管理同样也有助于延缓DSPN进展。
cards.claim_en: There is currently no effective treatment to reverse DSPN. Once DSPN diagnosis is considered, treatment should begin early to delay progression. Blood glucose control is the primary means to prevent DSPN occurrence and delay its progression. Comprehensive management of blood pressure, lipids, and other risk factors also helps delay DSPN progression.

cards.title: OCT as gold standard for DME diagnosis and screening
cards.claim_zh: 光学相干断层扫描是诊断DME的金标准，也可用于DME的筛查、分类、监测以及治疗效果的评估。建议老年糖尿病患者诊断时即进行光学相干断层扫描筛查DME，此后每年复查。
cards.claim_en: Optical coherence tomography (OCT) is the gold standard for diagnosing diabetic macular edema (DME) and can be used for DME screening, classification, monitoring, and treatment evaluation. Elderly diabetic patients should undergo OCT screening at diagnosis and annual review thereafter.

cards.title: CSME review frequency: every 3 months
cards.claim_zh: 如已存在有临床意义的黄斑水肿（即位于黄斑中心或威胁黄斑中心的视网膜水肿），应每3个月进行复查。
cards.claim_en: For clinically significant macular edema (located at or threatening the macular center), review every 3 months.
synonyms: 有临床意义的黄斑水肿

cards.title: VEGF as first-line treatment for center-involving DME
cards.claim_zh: 2017年欧洲视网膜专家协会指南推荐累及中心凹的黄斑水肿首选VEGF治疗。
cards.claim_en: The 2017 European Retina Expert Association guideline recommends VEGF therapy as first-line treatment for center-involving macular edema.

cards.title: Dry eye disease prevalence in elderly T2DM (Shanghai data)
cards.claim_zh: 上海一项基于社区的调查显示，平均年龄为69岁的T2DM患者中干眼症患病率为17.5%。
cards.claim_en: A Shanghai community-based survey of T2DM patients with a mean age of 69 years showed dry eye disease prevalence of 17.5%.

cards.title: CGM可能降低老年T1DM患者低血糖风险
cards.claim_zh: 老年T1DM患者佩戴持续葡萄糖监测（CGM）系统可能有助于降低低血糖风险。（A）
cards.claim_en: Elderly type 1 diabetic patients wearing continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) systems may have reduced hypoglycemia risk. (Evidence grade A)

cards.title: 老年糖尿病高血糖危象以HHS更多见且病死率高于DKA
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病患者高血糖危象以高血糖高渗状态（HHS）更为多见，病死率远高于糖尿病酮症酸中毒（DKA）。补液是重要的治疗手段，同时应使用胰岛素降低血糖，并注意补钾。（B）
cards.claim_en: In elderly diabetic patients, hyperglycemic hyperosmolar state (HHS) is more common than diabetic ketoacidosis (DKA), and its mortality is much higher than DKA. Fluid resuscitation is a key treatment; insulin should be used to lower blood glucose, and potassium supplementation should be noted. (Evidence grade B)

cards.title: 乳酸酸中毒发生率低但死亡率高
cards.claim_zh: 乳酸酸中毒发生率低，但死亡率高，应予重视。（B）
cards.claim_en: Lactic acidosis has a low incidence but high mortality and should be taken seriously. (Evidence grade B)

cards.title: 低血糖定义和分级标准
cards.claim_zh: 接受药物治疗的糖尿病患者只要血糖<3.9 mmol/L就属于低血糖。（1）1级低血糖：<3.9 mmol/L且≥3.0 mmol/L；（2）2级低血糖：<3.0 mmol/L；（3）3级低血糖：需要他人帮助治疗的严重事件，伴有意识和/或躯体改变，但无特定血糖界限。
cards.claim_en: For patients receiving glucose-lowering medication, blood glucose <3.9 mmol/L defines hypoglycemia. Grade 1: <3.9 mmol/L and ≥3.0 mmol/L; Grade 2: <3.0 mmol/L; Grade 3: severe event requiring assistance from others, with altered consciousness or physical function, but no specific blood glucose threshold.

cards.title: CGM可能降低老年T1DM患者低血糖风险
cards.claim_zh: 随机对照试验研究结果显示，佩戴CGM系统可能有助于降低老年T1DM患者低血糖发生风险，有条件的患者需要时可考虑使用。
cards.claim_en: Randomized controlled trial results show that wearing a CGM system may help reduce the risk of hypoglycemia in elderly T1DM patients. CGM should be considered when conditions permit.

cards.title: HHS诊断标准：血糖≥33.3 mmol/L，渗透压≥320 mOsm/L
cards.claim_zh: HHS的诊断标准包括：血浆葡萄糖水平≥33.3 mmol/L，有效血浆渗透压≥320 mOsm/L，无明显的代谢性酸中毒和无严重酮症。
cards.claim_en: HHS diagnostic criteria: plasma glucose ≥33.3 mmol/L, effective plasma osmolality ≥320 mOsm/L, and no significant metabolic acidosis or severe ketosis.

cards.title: HHS病死率约为DKA的10倍
cards.claim_zh: HHS比DKA的病死率更高，约为DKA病死率的10倍。
cards.claim_en: HHS has a higher mortality rate than DKA, approximately 10 times the mortality rate of DKA.

cards.title: 30%~40%的HHS患者此前未诊断糖尿病
cards.claim_zh: 30%~40%的HHS患者此前未诊断为糖尿病。
cards.claim_en: 30%–40% of HHS patients were not previously diagnosed with diabetes.

cards.title: 老年糖尿病患者HF患病率高达22.3%
cards.claim_zh: 年龄和糖尿病均是HF的危险因素，老年糖尿病患者中HF患病率高达22.3%。
cards.claim_en: Age and diabetes are both risk factors for heart failure (HF). The prevalence of HF in elderly diabetic patients is as high as 22.3%.

cards.title: 老年糖尿病HF漏诊率高达27.7%
cards.claim_zh: 由于老年糖尿病患者中射血分数保留的HF较常见，老年糖尿病患者的HF易被漏诊，漏诊率高达27.7%。
cards.claim_en: Heart failure is easily missed in elderly diabetic patients due to the common occurrence of HFpEF. The missed diagnosis rate of HF in elderly diabetic patients is as high as 27.7%.

cards.title: 合并HF的老年糖尿病患者优先选择SGLT2i（A级证据）
cards.claim_zh: SGLT2i可降低HF患者HF住院风险，合并HF的老年糖尿病患者优先选择该类降糖药物。（A级证据）
cards.claim_en: SGLT2i can reduce HF hospitalization risk in HF patients. Elderly diabetic patients with HF should preferably choose SGLT2i as their glucose-lowering medication. (Grade A evidence)
synonyms: 钠-葡萄糖共转运蛋白2抑制剂

cards.title: 具有HF风险的药物在合并HF的老年糖尿病患者中应慎用或禁用（B级证据）
cards.claim_zh: 具有HF风险的药物在HF高风险或合并HF的老年糖尿病患者中应慎用或禁用。（B级证据）
cards.claim_en: Drugs with HF risk should be used cautiously or avoided in elderly diabetic patients with high HF risk or with existing HF. (Grade B evidence)

cards.title: DXA和FRAX评估老年糖尿病骨折风险可能低估
cards.claim_zh: 双能X线骨密度仪测定骨密度和骨折风险评估工具FRAX可提示老年糖尿病患者的骨折风险，但可能低估骨折风险。(B)
cards.claim_en: DXA bone mineral density measurement and the FRAX fracture risk assessment tool can indicate fracture risk in elderly diabetic patients, but may underestimate fracture risk. (B)

cards.title: 合并骨质疏松的老年糖尿病患者应慎用增加骨折风险的药物
cards.claim_zh: 合并骨质疏松的老年糖尿病患者应慎重使用可能增加骨质疏松或骨折风险的药物。(B)
cards.claim_en: Elderly diabetic patients with osteoporosis should use with caution medications that may increase the risk of osteoporosis or fractures. (B)

cards.title: 80岁以上女性椎体骨折患病率高达36.6%
cards.claim_zh: 60岁以上人群骨质疏松患病率明显增高，80岁以上女性椎体骨折患病率可高达36.6%。[234]
cards.claim_en: Osteoporosis prevalence increases significantly in people aged 60 and above. Vertebral fracture prevalence in women aged 80 and above can reach as high as 36.6%. [234]

cards.title: 糖尿病患者骨折风险明显超过非糖尿病人群
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病患者的骨折风险明显超过非糖尿病人群。[235]
cards.claim_en: Fracture risk in diabetic patients significantly exceeds that in non-diabetic populations. [235]

cards.title: 北京地区糖尿病合并骨质疏松患病率13.4%-14.8%
cards.claim_zh: 北京地区2016至2018年糖尿病合并骨质疏松的患病率为13.4%～14.8%。[236]
cards.claim_en: Data from Beijing (2016-2018) show the prevalence of diabetes combined with osteoporosis was 13.4%-14.8%. [236]

cards.title: 老年T2DM骨折危险因素：跌倒史、骨折史、握力低、HbA1c升高
cards.claim_zh: 跌倒史、骨折史、握力低和HbA1c升高是老年T2DM患者骨折的危险因素。[237]
cards.claim_en: History of falls, history of fractures, low grip strength, and elevated HbA1c are risk factors for fractures in elderly T2DM patients. [237]

cards.title: 相同骨密度下T2DM较非糖尿病人群更易骨折
cards.claim_zh: 相同骨密度下，T2DM较非糖尿病人群更易发生骨折。FRAX也同样会低估糖尿病患者的骨折风险。[238][239]
cards.claim_en: At the same bone mineral density, T2DM patients are more prone to fractures than non-diabetic populations. The FRAX tool also underestimates fracture risk in diabetic patients. [238-239]

cards.title: 磺脲类药物可能增加老年T2DM骨折风险
cards.claim_zh: Meta分析发现，老年T2DM患者使用磺脲类药物可能增加骨折风险，与其引发低血糖可能相关。[240]
cards.claim_en: Meta-analysis found that sulfonylurea use in elderly T2DM patients may increase fracture risk, possibly related to hypoglycemia induction. [240]

cards.title: 糖尿病合并骨质疏松治疗参照非糖尿病患者，个体化用药
cards.claim_zh: 中国专家共识建议，糖尿病合并骨质疏松的治疗参照非糖尿病患者，在骨质疏松药物选择上需考虑多病共存、多重用药等情况，全面评估、权衡利弊后进行个体化用药并进行监测。[241]
cards.claim_en: Chinese expert consensus recommends that treatment of diabetes combined with osteoporosis should follow guidelines for non-diabetic patients, with individualized medication considering multimorbidity and polypharmacy. [241]

cards.title: 老年糖尿病患者中应积极评估老年综合征
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病患者中应积极评估老年综合征。(B)
cards.claim_en: Geriatric syndromes should be actively assessed in elderly diabetic patients. (B)

cards.title: 老年糖尿病患者肌少症患病率高，是衰弱的重要原因
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病患者肌少症患病率高，是引起老年糖尿病患者衰弱的重要原因。(A)
cards.claim_en: Sarcopenia is highly prevalent in elderly diabetic patients and is a key cause of frailty in this population. (A)

cards.title: 所有老年糖尿病患者均应评估肌少症和衰弱
cards.claim_zh: 对所有老年糖尿病患者均应进行肌少症和衰弱的评估，以早期干预、改善预后。(B)
cards.claim_en: All elderly diabetic patients should be assessed for sarcopenia and frailty to enable early intervention and improve prognosis. (B)

cards.title: 中国老年糖尿病患者肌少症患病率为14.8%
cards.claim_zh: 中国老年糖尿病患者肌少症患病率为14.8%。[243]
cards.claim_en: The prevalence of sarcopenia in Chinese elderly diabetic patients is 14.8%. [243]

cards.title: 肌少症导致老年糖尿病患者血糖难控、功能下降、死亡率增加
cards.claim_zh: 肌少症使老年糖尿病患者的血糖更加难以控制，日常生活活动能力下降，并增加死亡率。[248]
cards.claim_en: Sarcopenia makes blood glucose more difficult to control in elderly diabetic patients, reduces daily activity capacity, and increases mortality. [248]

cards.title: 80岁以上肌少性肥胖患病率：女性48.0%，男性27.5%
cards.claim_zh: 80岁以上的人群中，女性和男性肌少性肥胖患病率分别达到48.0%和27.5%。[250]
cards.claim_en: In people aged 80 and above, the prevalence of sarcopenic obesity is 48.0% in women and 27.5% in men. [250]

cards.title: SARC-F问卷或SARC-F+小腿围用于社区肌少症筛查
cards.claim_zh: 对于社区基层医疗机构，可以通过量表（简易五项评分问卷量表或简易五项评分问卷＋小腿围量表）进行筛查，并对肌肉力量和躯体功能进行评估。[251]
cards.claim_en: For community primary care settings, sarcopenia screening can be performed using the SARC-F questionnaire or SARC-F combined with calf circumference, with further assessment of muscle strength and physical function. [251]

cards.title: 糖尿病使老年人衰弱风险增加5倍
cards.claim_zh: 在老年人中，糖尿病使衰弱的风险增加5倍。[252]
cards.claim_en: In elderly people, diabetes increases the risk of frailty by 5-fold. [252]

cards.title: 衰弱是可逆转的残疾前状态，早期识别干预改善预后
cards.claim_zh: 衰弱是一种残疾前状态，导致衰弱的病因在一定程度上尚可逆转。早期识别并干预衰弱的老年人有助于改善预后。
cards.claim_en: Frailty is a pre-disability state that is partially reversible to a certain extent. Early identification and intervention in frail elderly people helps improve prognosis.

cards.title: 合并HF的老年糖尿病患者应优先选择SGLT2i
cards.claim_zh: SGLT2i能降低HF住院风险，合并HF的老年糖尿病患者应优先选择该类药物。[232]
cards.claim_en: SGLT2 inhibitors can reduce heart failure hospitalization risk. Elderly diabetic patients with heart failure should preferentially choose SGLT2 inhibitors. [232]
cards.population: elderly diabetic patients with heart failure
synonyms: 钠-葡萄糖共转运蛋白2抑制剂

cards.title: 老年糖尿病患者禁用TZD类降糖药（合并HF时）
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病患者禁用TZD类降糖药。
cards.claim_en: TZD (thiazolidinedione) hypoglycemic drugs are contraindicated in elderly diabetic patients with heart failure.
cards.population: elderly diabetic patients with heart failure

cards.title: Frailty and pre-frailty prevalence in elderly
cards.claim_zh: 老年人中衰弱和衰弱前期的患病率分别为20.1%和49.1%。
cards.claim_en: In the general elderly population, prevalence of frailty is 20.1% and prevalence of pre-frailty is 49.1%.

cards.title: Insulin-using elderly diabetic patients have 94% higher fall risk
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病增加老年人的跌倒风险，尤其是使用胰岛素的老年糖尿病患者，跌倒风险较非糖尿病老年人增加94%。
cards.claim_en: Diabetes increases fall risk in elderly patients; elderly diabetic patients using insulin have a 94% higher fall risk than non-diabetic elderly.

cards.title: Cognitive impairment prevalence in Chinese elderly diabetic patients is 48%
cards.claim_zh: 中国老年糖尿病患者中认知障碍的发生率为48%，在女性、年龄较大、教育水平较低、收入较低、无配偶和独居的人群中发生率更高。
cards.claim_en: The prevalence of cognitive impairment in Chinese elderly diabetic patients is 48%, with higher rates in women, older age, lower education, lower income, and those living alone or widowed.

cards.title: Metformin associated with reduced dementia risk in dose-dependent manner
cards.claim_zh: 回顾性研究显示，老年T2DM患者使用二甲双胍与痴呆风险降低显著相关，且呈现出剂量依赖效应。
cards.claim_en: A retrospective study showed that elderly T2DM patients using metformin have significantly reduced dementia risk, with a dose-dependent effect.

cards.title: GLP-1RA use linked to reduced Alzheimer's disease incidence
cards.claim_zh: GLP-1RA的使用与老年患者阿尔茨海默病发病率降低有关。
cards.claim_en: GLP-1RA use is associated with reduced Alzheimer's disease incidence in elderly patients.

cards.title: Tai Chi more effective than walking for cognition in elderly T2DM
cards.claim_zh: 一项随机临床试验发现太极拳比健身步行可更有效改善我国老年T2DM患者的认知功能。
cards.claim_en: A randomized clinical trial found that Tai Chi is more effective than fitness walking in improving cognitive function in Chinese elderly T2DM patients.

cards.title: 老年糖尿病患者肿瘤筛查
cards.claim_zh: 建议老年糖尿病患者接受与其年龄和性别匹配的肿瘤筛查。(B)
cards.claim_en: Elderly patients with diabetes should undergo cancer screening matched to their age and sex. (B)

cards.title: 新发老年糖尿病患者警惕胰腺癌
cards.claim_zh: 新发的老年糖尿病患者需警惕胰腺癌的可能。(B)
cards.claim_en: New-onset diabetes in elderly patients should raise suspicion for pancreatic cancer. (B)

cards.title: OSAS与血糖波动及并发症相关
cards.claim_zh: 阻塞性睡眠呼吸暂停综合征（OSAS）与血糖波动、糖尿病并发症发生相关。(A)
cards.claim_en: Obstructive sleep apnea syndrome (OSAS) is associated with glycemic variability and the occurrence of diabetic complications. (A)
synonyms: 阻塞性睡眠呼吸暂停综合征

cards.title: 肥胖老年糖尿病患者OSAS筛查
cards.claim_zh: 建议肥胖的老年糖尿病患者常规进行OSAS筛查。(B)
cards.claim_en: Obese elderly patients with diabetes should routinely be screened for OSAS. (B)

cards.title: OSAS治疗改善血糖控制
cards.claim_zh: 减重、持续气道正压是治疗OSAS的有效方法，且可改善血糖控制。(B)
cards.claim_en: Weight loss and continuous positive airway pressure (CPAP) are effective treatments for OSAS and can improve glycemic control. (B)

cards.title: 老年糖尿病患者睡眠障碍高危因素
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病患者存在多种可导致睡眠障碍的因素，应关注患者的睡眠情况。(B)
cards.claim_en: Elderly patients with diabetes have multiple factors that can lead to sleep disorders; attention should be paid to their sleep status. (B)

cards.title: 睡眠障碍干预改善生活质量及血糖
cards.claim_zh: 对睡眠障碍进行干预有助于提高老年糖尿病患者的睡眠及生活质量，同时改善血糖。(C)
cards.claim_en: Intervention for sleep disorders helps improve sleep quality, quality of life, and glycemic control in elderly patients with diabetes. (C)

cards.title: 老年糖尿病患者牙周炎高发
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病患者牙周炎高发，加剧了血糖控制难度。(B)
cards.claim_en: Periodontitis is highly prevalent in elderly patients with diabetes, which increases the difficulty of glycemic control. (B)

cards.title: 老年糖尿病患者口腔卫生与定期检查
cards.claim_zh: 鼓励老年糖尿病患者养成良好的卫生习惯，定期进行口腔检查。(B)
cards.claim_en: Elderly patients with diabetes are encouraged to develop good oral hygiene habits and undergo regular oral examinations. (B)

cards.title: 血糖控制与口腔病变双向关系
cards.claim_zh: 良好的血糖控制有利于治疗口腔病变，控制口腔病变也有利于改善血糖。(B)
cards.claim_en: Good glycemic control is beneficial for treating oral lesions, and controlling oral lesions is also beneficial for improving glycemic control. (B)

cards.title: 皮肤病变与血糖双向关系
cards.claim_zh: 血糖控制不佳可加重皮肤病变，而皮肤病变可导致血糖升高。证据等级 C。
cards.claim_en: Poor glycemic control can worsen skin lesions, and skin lesions can lead to elevated blood glucose in elderly diabetic patients. Evidence level C.

cards.title: 多重用药普遍性
cards.claim_zh: 多重用药（同时使用≥5种药物）在老年糖尿病患者中较为普遍且难以避免。证据等级 B。
cards.claim_en: Polypharmacy (concurrent use of ≥5 drugs) is common and unavoidable in elderly diabetic patients. Evidence level B.

cards.title: 降糖药物相互作用
cards.claim_zh: 在选择降糖药物时需充分考虑药物之间的相互作用，避免不良反应。磺脲类（CYP2C9）与氟康唑、西咪替丁合用增加低血糖风险；阿卡波糖与华法林合用增加出血风险；瑞格列奈（CYP2C8/CYP3A4）与氯吡格雷、酮康唑合用；吡格列酮（CYP2C8）与吉非罗齐合用可升高血药浓度。证据等级 B。
cards.claim_en: When selecting hypoglycemic drugs for elderly diabetic patients, drug interactions must be fully considered to avoid adverse reactions. Sulfonylureas (CYP2C9) interact with fluconazole and cimetidine increasing hypoglycemia risk. Acarbose combined with warfarin increases bleeding risk. Repaglinide (CYP2C8/CYP3A4) interacts with clopidogrel and ketoconazole. Pioglitazone (CYP2C8) interacts with gemfibrozil. Evidence level B.

cards.title: 住院老年患者血糖目标
cards.claim_zh: 健康状态分级为良好（Group 1）和中等（Group 2）的住院老年糖尿病患者空腹血糖控制目标为 6.1～7.8 mmol/L，餐后 2h 血糖或随机血糖控制在 7.8～10.0 mmol/L，健康状态分级为差（Group 3）的患者适当放宽目标。证据等级 B。
cards.claim_en: For hospitalized elderly diabetic patients with Health Status Group 1 (good) and Group 2 (moderate): fasting blood glucose target 6.1-7.8 mmol/L, postprandial 2h or random blood glucose target 7.8-10.0 mmol/L. For Health Status Group 3 (poor): targets should be appropriately relaxed. Evidence level B.

cards.title: 围术期血糖目标
cards.claim_zh: 择期手术的老年糖尿病患者在围术期将血糖控制在 7.8～10.0 mmol/L，急诊手术的老年糖尿病患者不建议在术前设定过于严格的血糖控制目标。证据等级 B。
cards.claim_en: For elderly diabetic patients undergoing elective surgery, perioperative blood glucose target is 7.8-10.0 mmol/L. For emergency surgery, overly strict preoperative blood glucose targets are not recommended. Evidence level B.

cards.title: 感染与高血糖危象
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病患者易出现感染，感染可导致血糖难以控制，甚至出现高血糖危象。证据等级 B。
cards.claim_en: Elderly diabetic patients are prone to infection, and infection can lead to difficult-to-control blood glucose and even hyperglycemic crisis. Evidence level B.

cards.title: 住院老年糖尿病血糖目标(健康状态良好/中等)
cards.claim_zh: 健康状态良好(Group1)或中等(Group2)的住院老年糖尿病患者：空腹血糖6.1～7.8 mmol/L，餐后2h血糖或随机血糖7.8～10.0 mmol/L。
cards.claim_en: For hospitalized elderly diabetic patients with good (Group 1) or moderate (Group 2) health status: fasting blood glucose 6.1–7.8 mmol/L, postprandial 2h or random blood glucose 7.8–10.0 mmol/L.

cards.title: 住院老年糖尿病血糖目标(健康状态差/高风险)
cards.claim_zh: 健康状态差(Group3)、低血糖风险高或预期寿命短的老年糖尿病患者：空腹血糖7.8～10.0 mmol/L，餐后2h血糖或随机血糖7.8～13.9 mmol/L，同时应避免高血糖危象发生。
cards.claim_en: For hospitalized elderly diabetic patients with poor health status (Group 3), high hypoglycemia risk, or short life expectancy: fasting blood glucose 7.8–10.0 mmol/L, postprandial 2h or random blood glucose 7.8–13.9 mmol/L. Avoid hyperglycemic crisis.
cards.population: hospitalized elderly type 2 diabetes, Group 3 / high hypoglycemia risk

cards.title: 老年糖尿病围术期血糖控制目标
cards.claim_zh: 老年糖尿病患者围术期血糖控制目标为7.8～10.0 mmol/L[108,307]。
cards.claim_en: Perioperative blood glucose target for elderly diabetic patients: 7.8–10.0 mmol/L [108,307].

cards.title: 围术期严重合并症或频繁低血糖者的血糖上限
cards.claim_zh: 对于有严重合并症和频繁低血糖发作的老年患者，围术期控制目标最高可为13.9 mmol/L[307]。
cards.claim_en: For elderly diabetic patients with severe comorbidities or frequent hypoglycemic episodes undergoing surgery, the perioperative blood glucose target can be relaxed up to 13.9 mmol/L [307].
cards.population: elderly type 2 diabetes with severe comorbidities or frequent hypoglycemia, perioperative

cards.title: 心脏手术或精细手术围术期更严格血糖目标
cards.claim_zh: 对于拟行心脏手术或其他精细手术的患者，在权衡低血糖风险的基础上，建议可考虑更为严格的血糖控制目标，即6.1～7.8 mmol/L[308]。
cards.claim_en: For elderly diabetic patients undergoing cardiac surgery or other precision surgery, a stricter perioperative blood glucose target of 6.1–7.8 mmol/L may be considered after weighing hypoglycemia risk [308].
cards.population: elderly type 2 diabetes, cardiac/precision surgery, perioperative

cards.title: 围术期禁食期间血糖监测频率
cards.claim_zh: 手术当日早上停用所有口服降糖药物，禁食期间每4～6小时进行1次血糖监测。
cards.claim_en: During perioperative fasting, blood glucose should be monitored every 4–6 hours. All oral hypoglycemic agents should be stopped on the morning of surgery.

cards.title: 围术期停用SGLT2i以防DKA
cards.claim_zh: 手术时应暂停使用SGLT2i，以避免DKA风险[309]。
cards.claim_en: SGLT2 inhibitors should be temporarily discontinued during surgery to avoid the risk of diabetic ketoacidosis (DKA) [309].
cards.population: elderly type 2 diabetes on SGLT2i, perioperative

cards.title: 80-89岁糖尿病患者感染相关住院风险
cards.claim_zh: 一项回顾性队列研究显示，相较于40～49岁的糖尿病患者，80～89岁患者住院风险高3～4倍，其中与感染有关的住院比例很高[313]。
cards.claim_en: A retrospective cohort study showed that diabetic patients aged 80–89 have 3–4 times higher hospitalization risk compared to those aged 40–49, with a high proportion of infection-related admissions [313].

cards.title: Prevalence of pre-existing and newly diagnosed diabetes in hospitalized elderly COVID-19 patients
cards.claim_zh: 武汉一项针对住院患者（主要是老年COVID-19）的研究显示，21.6%的患者有糖尿病病史，20.8%新诊断为糖尿病，28.4%新诊断为血糖异常。
cards.claim_en: In a Wuhan study of hospitalized mainly elderly COVID-19 patients, 21.6% had a pre-existing diabetes history, 20.8% were newly diagnosed with diabetes, and 28.4% were newly diagnosed with abnormal blood sugar on admission.

cards.title: Admission blood glucose and all-cause mortality in COVID-19 diabetes patients
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病患者入院时的血糖水平与全因死亡风险增加有关。新诊断的糖尿病患者更可能进入重症监护病房，并需要有创机械通气、急性呼吸窘迫综合征、急性肾损伤或休克的患病率高，住院时间延长。
cards.claim_en: In hospitalized elderly COVID-19 patients, admission blood glucose level is associated with increased all-cause mortality risk. Newly diagnosed diabetes patients have higher ICU admission rates, need for invasive mechanical ventilation, higher prevalence of acute respiratory distress syndrome, acute kidney injury or shock, and prolonged hospital stay.

cards.title: COVID-19 new-onset diabetes mechanisms
cards.claim_zh: COVID-19患者新发糖尿病的确切机制尚不明确，可能的原因包括：既往未诊断的糖尿病、应激性高血糖、病毒感染或类固醇相关糖尿病。
cards.claim_en: The exact mechanism of new-onset diabetes in COVID-19 is unclear. Possible causes include: previously undiagnosed diabetes, stress hyperglycemia, viral infection or steroid-related diabetes.

cards.title: Recommended glucose-lowering drugs for post-COVID-19 diabetes management
cards.claim_zh: 对于急性COVID-19感染和持续症状（即长新冠）后糖尿病患者的长期管理，推荐使用不增加体质量且改善心肾结局的降糖药物（如SGLT2i和GLP-1RA），但是尚无长期随访的证据。
cards.claim_en: For long-term management of diabetes after acute or long COVID-19 infection, SGLT2 inhibitors and GLP-1 receptor agonists are recommended — drugs that do not increase body weight and improve cardiovascular/renal outcomes. No long-term follow-up evidence is yet available.

cards.title: Vaccination recommendations for elderly diabetic patients
cards.claim_zh: 良好的血糖控制、加强个人卫生、进行必要的免疫接种（流感、肺炎链球菌等疫苗）可减少老年糖尿病患者住院和死亡风险，但流感疫苗接种中需注意避免接种减毒活疫苗。
cards.claim_en: Good glycemic control, personal hygiene, and necessary vaccinations (influenza, pneumococcal) can reduce severe infection risk in elderly diabetic patients. Avoid live-attenuated influenza vaccines.

cards.title: Palliative care goals for late-life elderly diabetic patients
cards.claim_zh: 当老年糖尿病患者进入生命的晚期时，主要目标并非严格的血糖、血压、血脂管理，应采取姑息治疗，减少血糖监测的频率，预防低血糖和高血糖危象，解除患者疼痛等不适症状，有助于提高患者的生活质量。
cards.claim_en: When elderly diabetic patients enter the end of life, the primary goal shifts away from strict glycemic, blood pressure, and lipid management. Palliative care should reduce monitoring frequency, prevent hypo- and hyperglycemic crises, and relieve pain and discomfort to improve quality of life.

cards.title: Palliative care medication guidance for elderly T2DM with organ damage
cards.claim_zh: 有器官损害的T2DM患者应减量使用低血糖风险高的药物，允许血糖处于正常高限或不出现急性代谢异常的可接受范围，根据进食量必要时可停用药物治疗。
cards.claim_en: For elderly T2DM patients with organ damage receiving palliative care: reduce doses of glucose-lowering drugs with high hypoglycemia risk, allow blood sugar at the upper limit of normal or at an acceptable range without acute metabolic abnormalities; medication may be stopped if needed based on food intake.

cards.title: Elderly T1DM prevalence and LADA characteristics
cards.claim_zh: 老年T1DM患病率较低，但老年期LADA并不少见。与年轻起病的患者相比，老年起病的LADA患者残余的胰岛β细胞功能相对较好，胰岛素抵抗更显著，代谢综合征的特征更明显，胰岛自身抗体阳性的比例和年轻起病的LADA相似，但HLA-DQ遗传背景与年轻起病的LADA有显著差异。
cards.claim_en: Elderly T1DM prevalence is low, but latent autoimmune diabetes in adults (LADA) is not uncommon in the elderly. Compared to young-onset LADA, elderly LADA patients have relatively better residual β-cell function, more pronounced insulin resistance, more prominent metabolic syndrome features, similar rates of islet autoantibody positivity, but significantly different HLA-DQ genetic background.
synonyms: 成人隐匿性自身免疫糖尿病

cards.title: Severe hypoglycemia rate in long-duration elderly T1DM
cards.claim_zh: 长病程是老年T1DM患者发生低血糖的危险因素，病程超过40年的老年T1DM患者严重低血糖发生率达18.6%。
cards.claim_en: Long disease duration is a risk factor for hypoglycemia in elderly T1DM patients. Elderly T1DM patients with disease duration exceeding 40 years have a severe hypoglycemia rate of 18.6%.

cards.title: CGM and insulin pump improve glycemic control in elderly T1DM (grade B)
cards.claim_zh: 对于老年T1DM患者，可使用持续葡萄糖监测（CGM）或胰岛素泵改善血糖控制、减少低血糖发生。使用CGM或胰岛素泵的患者HbA1c水平更低，低血糖事件和血糖波动较少。（证据等级B）
cards.claim_en: For elderly T1DM patients, use of continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) or insulin pumps improves glycemic control and reduces hypoglycemia. Studies show that patients using CGM or insulin pumps have lower HbA1c levels, fewer hypoglycemic events, and less glycemic variability. (Evidence grade B)

cards.title: WISDM trial: CGM reduces hypoglycemia vs fingerstick in elderly T1DM
cards.claim_zh: WISDM随机对照临床试验显示，与指尖血糖监测相比，老年T1DM患者使用CGM可降低低血糖发生率，改善总体血糖控制情况。
cards.claim_en: The WISDM randomized controlled clinical trial showed that compared to fingerstick blood glucose monitoring, CGM use in elderly T1DM patients reduces hypoglycemia incidence and improves overall glycemic control.

cards.title: Hybrid closed-loop insulin pump safety and TIR superiority in elderly T1DM
cards.claim_zh: 混合闭环胰岛素泵在老年T1DM患者中的安全性得到证实，与实时动态胰岛素泵组比较，混合闭环胰岛素泵组患者的TIR更优。
cards.claim_en: Hybrid closed-loop insulin pumps have been confirmed safe in elderly T1DM patients. Compared to real-time CGM insulin pump systems, hybrid closed-loop insulin pump patients achieve better time-in-range (TIR).

cards.title: Simplified treatment for elderly T1DM with cognitive/functional decline (grade C)
cards.claim_zh: 认知能力或身体机能下降的老年T1DM患者的治疗策略应力求简便，同时应加强护理支持。（证据等级C）
cards.claim_en: For elderly T1DM patients with cognitive decline or reduced physical function, treatment strategies should be simplified while strengthening care support. (Evidence grade C)

cards.title: HbA1c testing frequency
cards.claim_zh: 未达标前每3个月检测1次，达标后每6～12个月检测1次。
cards.claim_en: For patients not meeting HbA1c targets, test every 3 months; once targets are met, test every 6–12 months.

cards.title: SMBG and CGM recommendation for insulin-treated or high hypoglycemia risk patients
cards.claim_zh: 胰岛素治疗或低血糖风险高的患者需进行自我血糖监测，条件允许的患者（尤其是T1DM）可佩戴CGM系统。
cards.claim_en: Patients on insulin therapy or with high hypoglycemia risk should perform self-monitoring of blood glucose (SMBG). Eligible patients (especially T1DM) may use CGM systems.

cards.title: Insulin pump improves glucose control with education requirement
cards.claim_zh: 应用胰岛素泵可以改善血糖控制，但需对患者及家属进行胰岛素泵知识教育，以避免胰岛素泵相关并发症。
cards.claim_en: Insulin pump therapy can improve blood glucose control, but patients and family members must be educated on pump management to avoid pump-related complications.

cards.title: CGM improves HbA1c and reduces glycemic variability in elderly without increasing hypoglycemia risk
cards.claim_zh: 在老年糖尿病患者中，佩戴CGM系统能进一步改善HbA1c，同时降低血糖变异性，而不增加低血糖风险。
cards.claim_en: In elderly diabetic patients, CGM use can further improve HbA1c and reduce glycemic variability without increasing hypoglycemia risk.

cards.title: TIR target range for adult diabetes patients
cards.claim_zh: TIR是指24h内葡萄糖在目标范围的时长或所占百分比，成人糖尿病患者中TIR的血糖范围一般界定为3.9～10.0 mmol/L。
cards.claim_en: TIR refers to the percentage of time glucose is within target range over 24 hours; for adult diabetic patients the TIR target range is generally defined as 3.9–10.0 mmol/L.

cards.title: TIR independently associated with microvascular complications and mortality in T2DM
cards.claim_zh: 在T2DM中，TIR独立于HbA1c与糖尿病微血管并发症相关（患者平均年龄60.4岁），与心血管死亡、全因死亡相关（患者平均年龄61.7岁）。
cards.claim_en: In T2DM, TIR is independently associated with diabetic microvascular complications (patient mean age 60.4 years) and with cardiovascular death and all-cause mortality (patient mean age 61.7 years), independent of HbA1c.

cards.title: ITIMPROVE study: needle reuse increases lipohypertrophy risk 3.15x
cards.claim_zh: 中国ITIMPROVE研究显示34.7%的患者出现注射部位脂肪增生，针头重复使用以及注射部位轮换不当可分别使脂肪增生风险增加3.15倍和1.27倍，同时也增加HbA1c不达标的风险。
cards.claim_en: The Chinese ITIMPROVE study found 34.7% of patients develop injection-site lipohypertrophy; needle reuse increases lipohypertrophy risk by 3.15-fold and poor site rotation by 1.27-fold, also increasing HbA1c non-target risk.

cards.title: Elderly T1DM self-management depends on cognitive function
