cards.claim_zh: 老年T1DM的自我管理过程依赖于患者良好的认知能力，有严重低血糖的老年T1DM患者更易出现认知功能下降，应简化胰岛素治疗方案。
cards.claim_en: Elderly T1DM patients' self-management depends on good cognitive function; those with severe hypoglycemia are more prone to cognitive decline and should have simplified insulin regimens.

cards.title: AGP is the standardised one-page CGM report
cards.claim_zh: 动态血糖图谱（AGP）现已被确立为标准化、实用的单页报告，用于以图形方式呈现使用连续血糖监测（CGM）系统的糖尿病患者的血糖控制状态摘要。
cards.claim_en: The ambulatory glucose profile (AGP) is now established as the standardised, practical one-page report for graphically presenting a summary of glycaemic control status in patients with diabetes who use continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) systems.

cards.title: AGP provides visual and statistical glucose summary
cards.claim_zh: AGP报告既提供血糖指标的可视化摘要，也提供统计摘要；根据2019年国际共识，所有使用CGM系统的糖尿病患者均应分析这些指标。
cards.claim_en: The AGP report provides both a visual and a statistical summary of the glucose metrics that, as agreed in the 2019 international consensus for assessing glycaemic control, should be analysed in all people with diabetes who are using CGM systems.

cards.title: AGP enables systematic monitoring of therapy adjustments in T1D and T2D
cards.claim_zh: AGP报告可以系统地分析，以了解当前的血糖控制情况，并实时监测治疗调整对1型糖尿病和2型糖尿病的影响。
cards.claim_en: The AGP report can be analysed in a systematic fashion to understand current glycaemic control and to monitor, in real time, the impact of adjustments to therapy in both type 1 diabetes and type 2 diabetes.

cards.title: CGM reduces HbA1c in T1D and T2D
cards.claim_zh: CGM系统的使用已被证实可以降低接受强化胰岛素治疗的1型糖尿病或2型糖尿病患者的HbA1c。
cards.claim_en: The use of CGM systems is proven to reduce HbA1c in people with type 1 diabetes or type 2 diabetes on intensive insulin therapy.

cards.title: CGM effective for T2D on basal insulin only
cards.claim_zh: CGM系统对仅接受基础胰岛素治疗的2型糖尿病患者同样有效。
cards.claim_en: CGM systems are equally effective for people with type 2 diabetes on basal insulin therapy only.

cards.title: HbA1c and infrequent SMBG inadequate for glucose variability
cards.claim_zh: HbA1c测量和不频繁的自我血糖监测可能不足以预测或解释血糖水平的潜在有害变化，包括低血糖感知受损、夜间低血糖、反复不明原因低血糖，以及不明原因的空腹高血糖或血糖变异性（包括黎明现象）。
cards.claim_en: Measurement of HbA1c and infrequent SMBG testing may be inadequate to either predict or explain potentially harmful changes in glucose levels, including impaired awareness of hypoglycaemia, nocturnal hypoglycaemia, recurrent unexplained hypoglycaemia, and unexplained fasting hyperglycaemia or glucose variability, including the dawn phenomenon.

cards.title: 2019 consensus identified 10 CGM metrics
cards.claim_zh: 2019年发表的国际共识确定了10个评估血糖控制的指标，所有使用CGM系统的糖尿病患者均应由医疗专业人员进行分析。
cards.claim_en: An international consensus published in 2019 identified 10 metrics for assessing glycaemic control that should be analysed by healthcare professionals in all people with diabetes using CGM systems.

cards.title: TIR ≥70% corresponds to HbA1c ~7.0%
cards.claim_zh: 推荐的TIR目标（≥70%时间处于70-180 mg/dL范围内）约对应糖化血红蛋白A1c(HbA1c)水平接近7.0%（53 mmol/mol），该结论已在不同患者群体、使用多种CGM设备的研究中得到证实。
cards.claim_en: A recommended target of ≥70% time in the 70–180 mg/dL range (TIR) corresponds approximately to a glycated haemoglobin A1c (HbA1c) level of close to 7.0% (53 mmol/mol), confirmed using data from studies reporting both %TIR and HbA1c in different patient populations using a variety of CGM devices.

cards.title: Each 10% TIR increase reduces HbA1c by ~0.8%
cards.claim_zh: %TIR每增加10个百分点，HbA1c百分比约降低0.8%。
cards.claim_en: Each 10 percentage point increase in %TIR correlates with a reduction in HbA1c percentage of approximately 0.8%.

cards.title: 10% TIR reduction increases retinopathy risk by 64%
cards.claim_zh: TIR降低10%与视网膜病变进展风险增加64%相关。
cards.claim_en: A 10% reduction in TIR is associated with a 64% increase in the risk of retinopathy progression.

cards.title: 10% TIR reduction increases albuminuria risk by 40%
cards.claim_zh: TIR降低10%与白蛋白尿发生风险增加40%相关。
cards.claim_en: A 10% reduction in TIR is associated with a 40% increase in the development of albuminuria.

cards.title: TIR allows faster therapy adjustment than HbA1c
cards.claim_zh: 通过AGP报告评估%TIR变化，可比评估HbA1c水平更快速、更准确地调整治疗方案和建议，因为TIR可持续分析，而HbA1c通常每3-4个月测量一次。
cards.claim_en: Assessment of changes in %TIR in the AGP report allows for faster and more-accurate adjustments of therapy and treatment recommendations than the evaluation of HbA1c levels, as the analysis can be carried out on an ongoing basis while HbA1c is usually measured every 3–4 months.

cards.title: AGP uses 5th-95th and 25th-75th percentile distribution curves
cards.claim_zh: AGP图使用分布曲线汇总CGM数据：中位数线、第25至第75百分位数范围（四分位距IQR，显示为较深蓝色内带）以及第5至第95百分位数范围（显示为较浅外带）。这些范围随血糖变异性增加而加宽。
cards.claim_en: The AGP graph summarises CGM data using distribution curves: the median line, the 25th to 75th percentile range (interquartile range, IQR, shown as a darker-blue inner band), and the 5th to 95th percentile range (shown as a lighter outer band). These ranges widen with increasing glucose variability.

cards.title: Time in Range target for Type 1/2 diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型或2型糖尿病患者，70–180 mg/dL目标范围内时间应>70%的读数，即每天>16小时48分钟。
cards.claim_en: For people with Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes, the target range of 70–180 mg/dL should be maintained for >70% of readings, corresponding to >16 hours 48 minutes per day.

cards.title: Time below 70 mg/dL target
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型或2型糖尿病患者，低于70 mg/dL的时间应<4%的读数，即每天<58分钟。
cards.claim_en: For people with Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes, time below 70 mg/dL should be <4% of readings, corresponding to <58 minutes per day.

cards.title: Time below 54 mg/dL target
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型或2型糖尿病患者，低于54 mg/dL的时间应<1%的读数，即每天<14分钟。
cards.claim_en: For people with Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes, time below 54 mg/dL should be <1% of readings, corresponding to <14 minutes per day.

cards.title: Time above 180 mg/dL target
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型或2型糖尿病患者，高于180 mg/dL的时间应<25%的读数，即每天<6小时。
cards.claim_en: For people with Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes, time above 180 mg/dL should be <25% of readings, corresponding to <6 hours per day.

cards.title: Time above 250 mg/dL target
cards.claim_zh: 对于1型或2型糖尿病患者，高于250 mg/dL的时间应<5%的读数，即每天<1小时12分钟。
cards.claim_en: For people with Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes, time above 250 mg/dL should be <5% of readings, corresponding to <1 hour 12 minutes per day.

cards.title: Each 5% TIR increase is clinically beneficial
cards.claim_zh: 目标范围内时间（70–180 mg/dL）每增加5%均具有临床获益。
cards.claim_en: Each 5% increase in time in range (70–180 mg/dL) is clinically beneficial.

cards.title: Glucose variability target (CV)
cards.claim_zh: 以变异系数（CV）衡量的血糖变异性应≤36%。
cards.claim_en: Glucose variability measured by coefficient of variation (CV) should be ≤36%.

cards.title: GMI estimation from average glucose
cards.claim_zh: 葡萄糖管理指标（GMI）由平均血糖估算HbA1c；平均血糖156 mg/dL对应GMI 7.0%（54 mmol/mol）。
cards.claim_en: Glucose Management Indicator (GMI) estimates HbA1c from average glucose; an average glucose of 156 mg/dL corresponds to a GMI of 7.0% (54 mmol/mol).

cards.title: AGP graph uses 5th/25th/50th/75th/95th percentile bands
cards.claim_zh: 动态葡萄糖谱（AGP）图使用五个百分位带来展示14天血糖变异性：第5、25、50（中位数）、75和95百分位，目标范围为70–180 mg/dL。
cards.claim_en: The Ambulatory Glucose Profile (AGP) graph displays glucose variability across 14 days using five percentile bands: 5th, 25th, 50th (median), 75th, and 95th, with a target range of 70–180 mg/dL.

cards.title: Daily glucose profile shading conventions
cards.claim_zh: 每日血糖图（午夜到午夜）中，高于180 mg/dL的区域用黄色阴影标记，低于70 mg/dL的区域用灰色阴影标记，参考线设在70和180 mg/dL。
cards.claim_en: Each daily glucose profile (midnight to midnight) uses yellow shading for glucose above 180 mg/dL and gray shading for glucose below 70 mg/dL, with reference lines at 70 and 180 mg/dL.

cards.title: Sensor activity recommendation
cards.claim_zh: 该14天监测期间传感器佩戴活跃度为88%；更高的传感器佩戴时间可提高AGP解读的数据可靠性。
cards.claim_en: Sensor activity of 88% was reported for this 14-day monitoring period; higher sensor wear time improves data reliability for AGP interpretation.

cards.title: TBR Level 1 target for general diabetes population
cards.claim_zh: 低于目标血糖范围时间（TBR）1级定义为血糖 < 70 mg/dL（< 3.9 mmol/L）的时间百分比。一般1型或2型糖尿病人群推荐目标：< 4%（即 < 58分钟/天）。
cards.claim_en: Time below target glucose range (TBR) level 1 is defined as percentage of time with glycaemia < 70 mg/dL (< 3.9 mmol/L). Recommended target for general type 1 or 2 diabetes population: < 4% (< 58 min per day).

cards.title: TBR Level 1 target for older/high-risk patients
cards.claim_zh: TBR 1级（< 70 mg/dL，< 3.9 mmol/L）对老年患者和/或低血糖高风险人群的推荐目标：< 1%（即 < 15分钟/天）。
cards.claim_en: TBR level 1 (< 70 mg/dL, < 3.9 mmol/L) recommended target for older patients and/or those at high risk of hypoglycaemia: < 1% (< 15 min per day).

cards.title: TBR Level 1 target for type 1 diabetes pregnancy
cards.claim_zh: 妊娠期1型糖尿病女性TBR 1级定义为血糖 < 63 mg/dL（3.5 mmol/L），推荐目标 < 4%（即 < 58分钟/天）。
cards.claim_en: TBR level 1 for women with type 1 diabetes in pregnancy is defined as glycaemia < 63 mg/dL (3.5 mmol/L), with recommended target < 4% (< 58 min per day).

cards.title: TBR Level 2 target for general diabetes population
cards.claim_zh: 低于目标血糖范围时间（TBR）2级定义为血糖 < 54 mg/dL（< 3 mmol/L）的时间百分比。一般1型或2型糖尿病人群推荐目标：< 1%（即 < 14分钟/天）。
cards.claim_en: Time below target glucose range (TBR) level 2 is defined as percentage of time with glycaemia < 54 mg/dL (< 3 mmol/L). Recommended target for general type 1 or 2 diabetes population: < 1% (< 14 min per day).

cards.title: TBR Level 2 target for older/high-risk patients
cards.claim_zh: TBR 2级（< 54 mg/dL，< 3 mmol/L）对老年患者和/或低血糖高风险人群的推荐目标：0%。
cards.claim_en: TBR level 2 (< 54 mg/dL, < 3 mmol/L) recommended target for older patients and/or those at high risk of hypoglycaemia: 0%.

cards.title: TIR/TAR/TBR ranges for gestational diabetes
cards.claim_zh: 妊娠期2型糖尿病或妊娠糖尿病女性的TIR/TAR/TBR范围与妊娠期1型糖尿病女性相同。由于证据有限，这些人群的具体目标尚未确定。
cards.claim_en: The TIR/TAR/TBR ranges for women with type 2 diabetes in pregnancy or gestational diabetes are the same as those for women with type 1 diabetes in pregnancy. Specific targets for these groups have not yet been defined because of limited evidence.

cards.title: AGP IQR band interpretation
cards.claim_zh: 在AGP中，25至75百分位之间的IQR带包含最接近中位线的50%血糖读数。5至95百分位之间的带包含90%的血糖读数，其中5%较低、5%较高。
cards.claim_en: In the AGP, the IQR band between the 25th to 75th percentile boundaries contains the 50% of glucose readings that are closest to the median line. The band between the 5th and 95th percentiles contains 90% of the glucose readings, with 5% lower and 5% higher.

cards.title: AGP covers last 14 days of glucose data
cards.claim_zh: AGP报告第3节（每日血糖概况）提供报告生成前最近14天内每天血糖变化的分析，可用于评估患者行为对各天的影响。
cards.claim_en: An analysis of glucose changes across each of the last 14 days before the generation of the AGP report is available in Section 3 (Daily Glucose Profiles), allowing assessment of the impact of patient behaviour on individual days.

cards.title: AGP median line (50th percentile) definition
cards.claim_zh: 深蓝色中位线追踪24小时内的第50百分位值。50%的血糖读数在此线之上，50%在此线之下。理想图形：中位线在24小时内尽可能平坦，且处于目标血糖范围内。
cards.claim_en: The dark-blue median line traces the 50th percentile value across the 24 h period. 50% of all glucose readings recorded will be above this line and 50% will be below. Recommended image: the median line should be as flat as possible over the entire 24 h and within the target glucose range.

cards.title: AGP interquartile range (IQR, 25th–75th percentile) definition
cards.claim_zh: 四分位距（IQR；第25–75百分位带）是50%血糖读数所落入的范围——中位线上方25%，下方25%。IQR带宽大表示血糖变异性高。当第25百分位曲线低于目标范围时，提示低血糖频发。当第75百分位曲线超出目标范围时，提示高血糖频发。理想图形：窄的IQR蓝色带处于目标血糖范围内。
cards.claim_en: The interquartile range (IQR; 25th–75th percentile band) is the range within which 50% of all glucose readings fall—25% above and 25% below the median. A wide IQR band is the result of high glucose variability. When the 25th percentile curve falls below the target range, this indicates frequent hypoglycaemia. When the 75th percentile curve extends above the target range, this indicates frequent hyperglycaemia. Recommended image: a narrow IQR blue band that is within the target glucose range.

cards.title: AGP 5th–95th percentile band definition
cards.claim_zh: 第5–95百分位带是90%血糖读数所落入的范围。带宽大表示血糖变异性高。当第5百分位曲线低于目标范围时，提示低血糖发生率较高。当第95百分位曲线高于目标范围时，提示高血糖发生率较高。理想图形：窄的、颜色较浅的第5–95百分位带尽可能贴近目标血糖范围。
cards.claim_en: The 5th–95th percentile band is the range within which 90% of all glucose readings fall. A wide band is the result of high variability in glucose. When the 5th percentile curve falls below the target range, this indicates a higher incidence of hypoglycaemia. When the 95th percentile curve rises above the target range, this indicates a higher incidence of hyperglycaemia. Recommended image: a narrow, lighter-coloured 5th–95th percentile band that is as close as possible to the target glucose range.

cards.title: Factors contributing to glucose variability patterns
cards.claim_zh: 评估血糖变异性模式时应考虑的因素包括：不规律的进餐时间、禁食（如宗教节日期间）、胰岛素校正因子（ICF）或胰岛素碳水化合物比（ICR）计算不正确、胰岛素注射部位脂肪增生、急性并发疾病（如胃肠炎）、吸收不良综合征（如乳糜泻）以及肾或肝功能障碍。
cards.claim_en: Factors that should be taken into consideration when reviewing patterns of glucose variability include: irregular meal timings, fasting (such as during religious festivals), incorrect calculation of the insulin correction factor (ICF) or insulin-to-carbohydrate ratio (ICR), insulin injection-site lipohypertrophy, acute intercurrent illness (such as gastroenteritis), malabsorption syndromes (such as celiac disease), and renal or hepatic dysfunction.

cards.title: CGM and AGP interpretation requires user education and lifestyle logging
cards.claim_zh: CGM系统和AGP解读在用户接受过教育并有动力记录饮食、体力活动、疾病和用药依从性变化时效果最佳，这些记录有助于理解AGP报告中揭示的模式。
cards.claim_en: CGM systems and interpretation of the AGP work best when users are educated and motivated to maintain a record of changes in diet, physical activity, illness and medication adherence that can aid understanding of the patterns revealed in the AGP report.

cards.title: AGP glycaemic variability metrics: CV and percentiles
cards.claim_zh: AGP血糖变异性评估应包括变异系数（CV）、第25–75百分位数范围和第5–95百分位数范围。
cards.claim_en: AGP assessment of glycaemic variability should include coefficient of variation (CV), 25th–75th percentile range, and 5th–95th percentile range.

cards.title: Gradual therapy modification based on AGP
cards.claim_zh: 应针对每个病例确定主要血糖控制问题并相应调整治疗方案，逐步改变患者管理以实现其个体化目标。
cards.claim_en: The main glycaemic control problem should be defined in each case and therapy modified accordingly, introducing gradual changes to the patient's management to achieve their individualised goals.

cards.title: Patient education for independent AGP interpretation
cards.claim_zh: 医生定期进行的AGP分析不应取代糖尿病医疗团队对患者或其照护者进行教育的必要性。医生和糖尿病教育者的职责是教会患者如何独立解读AGP并根据报告数据做出治疗决策。
cards.claim_en: Periodic AGP analysis by the physician should not replace the need for the diabetes healthcare team to educate the patient or their caregivers. The role of the physician and diabetes educators is to teach the patient how to independently interpret the AGP and make therapeutic decisions based on the report data.

cards.title: Patients should evaluate 14-day AGP period and daily logs
cards.claim_zh: 应鼓励患者独立评估整个14天的AGP数据周期，同时检查每日血糖记录以识别好决策和坏决策的结果。
cards.claim_en: Patients should be encouraged to independently evaluate the whole 14-day period of AGP data, and also examine the glucose logs of individual days to identify results of both good and bad decisions.

cards.title: Minimum CGM system activity time for valid AGP analysis
cards.claim_zh: CGM推荐分析周期为14天。CGM系统活跃时间占比推荐>70%。对于血糖变异性高的患者，建议延长观察期。
cards.claim_en: The recommended CGM analysis period is 14 days. Recommended percentage of CGM system activity time is >70%. For patients with high glycaemic variability, a longer period of observation is recommended.

cards.title: GMI differs from laboratory HbA1c due to non-glycaemic factors
cards.claim_zh: 即使GMI目标值与HbA1c相同，GMI值也可能与实验室检测的HbA1c值不同。GMI未考虑影响HbA1c的非血糖因素，如红细胞存活时间变化、血红蛋白、化学修饰、贫血和肾脏疾病。
cards.claim_en: Even when the target GMI value is the same as for HbA1c, the GMI value can be different to the laboratory-tested HbA1c value. GMI does not account for non-glycaemic factors that affect HbA1c, such as changes in erythrocyte survival time, haemoglobin, chemical modifications, anaemias, and renal disease.

cards.title: CV and percentile bands for glycaemic variability assessment
cards.claim_zh: %CV描述一天内连续高低血糖波动的强度。达到TIR目标的患者可能未达到血糖变异性目标（如TIR=75%且CV=40%）。IQR带宽（第25-75百分位）较宽提示需纠正治疗相关因素（如胰岛素剂量不足、胰岛素校正因子或碳水化合物比不正确、运动效果预测不准确）。
cards.claim_en: The %CV describes the intensity of fluctuations between successive high and low glucose levels during the day. Patients meeting the TIR target may not meet the target for glycaemic variability (e.g. TIR=75% and CV=40%). A wide IQR band (25th–75th percentile) indicates the need for correction of therapy-dependent factors (e.g. inadequate insulin dose, incorrect insulin correction factor or insulin/carbohydrate ratio, incorrectly predicted effects of exercise).

cards.title: Wide 5th–95th percentile band indicates need for patient education
cards.claim_zh: 第5-95百分位带宽较宽提示需验证或加强关于胰岛素治疗、饮食、体力活动或其他行为因素的教育，以及患者遵从治疗建议的动机。血糖变异性高的最常见原因是胰岛素剂量或时间与进餐、体力活动不匹配、无法准确计算碳水化合物、或因低血糖反应而过度纠正。
cards.claim_en: A wide 5th–95th percentile band indicates the need to verify or reinforce education regarding insulin therapy, diet, physical activity, or other behavioural factors, as well as the motivation of the patient to comply with treatment recommendations. The most common causes of high glycaemic variability are a mismatch of insulin dosing or timing with meals, physical activity, inability to accurately carbohydrate count, or chasing glucose in response to hypoglycaemia.

cards.title: Hypoglycaemia events lasting ≥15 minutes require attention
cards.claim_zh: 应关注持续≥15分钟的低血糖事件。评估低血糖症状出现时的血糖值。个体化评估和目标，尤其是孕妇、老年人和/或其他低血糖高风险人群。
cards.claim_en: Pay attention to low-glucose events with periods of hypoglycaemia lasting ≥15 min. Assess the glucose values at which the symptoms of hypoglycaemia occur. Individualise assessment and targets, especially for pregnant women, the elderly, and/or others with a high risk of hypoglycaemia.

cards.title: Hyperglycaemia identification using AGP and daily profiles
cards.claim_zh: 使用动态血糖谱（AGP）和每日血糖图，识别：一天中反复出现的高血糖模式、患者行为和活动的模式和趋势，以及高血糖的持续原因。
cards.claim_en: Using the ambulatory glucose profile (AGP) and daily glucose profiles, identify: recurrent patterns of hyperglycaemia during the day, patterns and trends in patient behaviour and activity, and consistent causes of hyperglycaemia.

cards.title: AGP clearer than HbA1c and SMBG for glycaemic control
cards.claim_zh: 与HbA1c和传统的血糖仪自我监测相比，AGP报告能够提供更清晰的血糖控制图景。
cards.claim_en: The AGP report provides a clearer picture of glycaemic control compared to HbA1c and traditional self-monitoring with blood glucose meters.

cards.title: HbA1c target with advanced technology (CGM/AID)
cards.claim_zh: ISPAD 2024建议，对于能够使用连续血糖监测（CGM）和自动胰岛素输注（AID）等先进技术的糖尿病患儿和青少年，HbA1c目标为≤6.5%（48 mmol/mol）。在安全可实现的情况下，应鼓励所有患儿争取该目标。
cards.claim_en: ISPAD 2024 recommends a target HbA1c of ≤6.5% (48 mmol/mol) for children and adolescents with diabetes who have access to advanced diabetes technologies like continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) and automated insulin delivery (AID). This target should be encouraged for all when safely achievable.

source.section: Summary of What Is New or Different, point 1

cards.title: HbA1c target without advanced technology
cards.claim_zh: 对于无法使用先进技术（CGM、AID）的糖尿病患儿和青少年，ISPAD 2024的HbA1c目标为≤7.0%（53 mmol/mol）。
cards.claim_en: For children and adolescents with diabetes in settings without access to advanced diabetes technologies (CGM, AID), the ISPAD 2024 HbA1c target is ≤7.0% (53 mmol/mol).

source.section: Summary of What Is New or Different, point 1

cards.title: Lower HbA1c reduces complications without increasing hypoglycemia
cards.claim_zh: 越来越多的证据表明，将HbA1c降至既往目标以下可显著降低糖尿病并发症风险。在有足够技术和医疗专业人员支持的情况下，这些更低的血糖目标可以安全实现，而不会增加低血糖风险或增加护理负担。
cards.claim_en: Growing evidence shows that achieving HbA1c levels below previous targets can significantly reduce the risk of developing diabetes complications. When adequate technology and healthcare professional support are available, these lower glycemic targets can be safely achieved without increasing the risk of hypoglycemia or adding to care burdens.

source.section: Summary of What Is New or Different, point 1

cards.title: New ISPAD HbA1c target with advanced technology
cards.claim_zh: 对于能够使用先进糖尿病技术（如持续葡萄糖监测和自动胰岛素输注）的患儿，推荐新的糖化血红蛋白（HbA1c）目标为≤6.5%（48 mmol/mol）。
cards.claim_en: A new target for hemoglobin A1c (HbA1c) of ≤6.5% (48 mmol/mol) is recommended for those who have access to advanced diabetes technologies like continuous glucose monitoring and automated insulin delivery.

cards.title: ISPAD HbA1c target for other care settings
cards.claim_zh: 在其他诊疗环境中，HbA1c目标为≤7.0%（53 mmol/mol）。
cards.claim_en: In other settings, the HbA1c target is ≤7.0% (53 mmol/mol).

cards.title: ISPAD 2022 HbA1c target
cards.claim_zh: 2022年，ISPAD将HbA1c目标设定为7.0%（53 mmol/mol），并在可行时允许更低目标，特别是在能够使用AID等金标准治疗时。
cards.claim_en: In 2022, ISPAD set the HbA1c target at 7.0% (53 mmol/mol), with a provision for lower targets where feasible, particularly when there is access to gold standard treatments like AID.

cards.title: Sweden and NICE HbA1c target
cards.claim_zh: 瑞典和NICE已将其HbA1c目标降低至6.5%（48 mmol/mol）。
cards.claim_en: Sweden and NICE have lowered their targets to 6.5% (48 mmol/mol).

cards.title: HbA1c 6.5% achievable for pre-school children
cards.claim_zh: 2022年，ISPAD指出学龄前儿童可安全达到HbA1c 6.5%的目标。
cards.claim_en: In 2022, ISPAD communicated that an HbA1c of 6.5% could be safely achieved for pre-school children.

cards.title: ADA HbA1c recommendation
cards.claim_zh: ADA推荐HbA1c <6.5%作为合理目标（前提是没有低血糖风险、不影响健康或不造成过度负担），同时允许个体化目标，<7.0%为适当目标。
cards.claim_en: The ADA recommends an HbA1c of <6.5% as a reasonable goal if it can be achieved without significant risk of hypoglycemia, or negatively impacts on well-being or undue burden of care, but also allows flexibility with <7.0% as the appropriate target.

cards.title: Glycemic monitoring tools
cards.claim_zh: 医疗专业人员和糖尿病患者有多种血糖监测工具，包括使用血糖仪的自我血糖监测（SMBG）、持续葡萄糖监测（CGM）和HbA1c。HbA1c虽然是传统标准指标，但存在局限性，CGM可以弥补这些不足。
cards.claim_en: Healthcare professionals and persons with diabetes have various tools for monitoring glycemia, including self-monitored blood glucose (SMBG) using a glucose meter, CGM and HbA1c. While HbA1c has traditionally been the standard measure, it also has limitations that CGM can address.

cards.title: Pediatric CGM Level 2 Hypoglycemia Target
cards.claim_zh: ISPAD建议儿童患者2级低血糖时间（TBR Level 2）<1%，即低于3 mmol/L（<54 mg/dL）的时间应<1%。
cards.claim_en: ISPAD recommends Level 2 Time Below Range (TBR) should be <1% time spent below 3 mmol/L (<54 mg/dL) for pediatric patients.

cards.title: HbA1c Target ≤6.5% with Advanced Technologies
cards.claim_zh: ISPAD建议，在先进技术（CGM和AID）支持下能安全达到该目标，且追求更低目标不会增加负担影响生活质量的患者，HbA1c目标为≤6.5%（48 mmol/mol）。[C类证据]
cards.claim_en: ISPAD recommends an HbA1c target of ≤6.5% (48 mmol/mol) for those who can safely reach that target with the support of advanced technologies (CGM and AID) and/or where the pursuit of the lower target does not add burden such that quality of life is impacted. [Category C evidence]

cards.title: HbA1c Target ≤7% General
cards.claim_zh: ISPAD建议在所有其他情况下，儿童患者的HbA1c目标为≤7%（53 mmol/mol）。[A类证据]
cards.claim_en: ISPAD recommends an HbA1c target of ≤7% (53 mmol/mol) in all other scenarios for pediatric patients. [Category A evidence]

cards.title: HbA1c Measurement Frequency
cards.claim_zh: 定期检测HbA1c是临床护理的重要基础，公认的惯例为每3个月评估一次，因为HbA1c反映约90天的血糖水平。
cards.claim_en: Regular measuring of HbA1c is an important foundation of clinical care, with an accepted convention of 3 monthly assessments, given that HbA1c reflects approximately 90 days of glycemia.

cards.title: Lowest retinopathy rates at transition with HbA1c ≤6.5%
cards.claim_zh: 从儿科向成人服务过渡时，糖尿病视网膜病变发生率最低的情况出现在HbA1c≤6.5%（48 mmol/mol）时。
cards.claim_en: The lowest rates of diabetic retinopathy at the time of transition to adult services are seen where HbA1c is ≤6.5% (48 mmol/mol).

cards.title: No clear albuminuria relationship at HbA1c 6.5% threshold
cards.claim_zh: 瑞典注册数据显示，在HbA1c 6.5%（48 mmol/mol）阈值下，未发现与白蛋白尿发生之间的明确关系。
cards.claim_en: Swedish registry data did not find a clear relationship for the development of increased albuminuria at the 6.5% (48 mmol/mol) HbA1c threshold.

cards.title: Higher albuminuria and retinopathy in Native Americans at prediabetes HbA1c
cards.claim_zh: 有2型糖尿病风险的美国原住民，HbA1c处于糖尿病前期范围（5.7–6.4% [39–47 mmol/mol]）时，白蛋白尿和视网膜病变的发生率高于HbA1c最佳水平的儿童。
cards.claim_en: Native Americans at risk of developing type 2 diabetes with HbA1c in a prediabetes range (5.7–6.4% [39–47 mmol/mol]) had higher incidence of albuminuria and retinopathy than children with optimal HbA1c levels.

cards.title: Limited evidence for kidney disease reduction below HbA1c 7% in T1D
cards.claim_zh: 在1型糖尿病中，HbA1c低于7%可减少糖尿病肾病发生和进展的证据有限。
cards.claim_en: There is limited evidence supporting reductions in diabetic kidney disease onset and progression at HbA1c levels below 7% in type 1 diabetes.

cards.title: HbA1c >7% associated with higher neuropathy risk in adolescents with T1D
cards.claim_zh: HbA1c >7%（53 mmol/mol）与病程超过5年的青少年1型糖尿病患者发生糖尿病神经病变的风险增高相关。
cards.claim_en: An HbA1c >7% (53 mmol/mol) was associated with a higher risk of developing diabetic neuropathy in adolescents with type 1 diabetes for >5 years.

cards.title: Neuropathy risk at HbA1c 6.5% threshold not assessed
cards.claim_zh: 6.5%（48 mmol/mol）较低阈值相关的神经病变风险尚未评估；需要更多数据或建模来确认使用6.5%目标对预防糖尿病神经病变的额外益处。
cards.claim_en: The neuropathy risk associated with a lower threshold of 6.5% (48 mmol/mol) was not assessed; further data or modeling are needed to confirm the additional benefit of using a 6.5% target for protecting against diabetic neuropathy.

cards.title: HbA1c 6.5% cognition target requires individual guidance
cards.claim_zh: 6.5%的较低目标应在个体化基础上谨慎指导，特别是在缺乏血糖监测和低血糖时暂停胰岛素的技术的环境中。
cards.claim_en: A lower target of 6.5% should be carefully guided on an individual basis, particularly in situations with limited access to glucose monitoring and technologies that suspend insulin when glucose is low.

cards.title: U-shaped curve between HbA1c and BMI with highest HbA1c in unhealthy weight groups
cards.claim_zh: 存在独立于HbA1c的BMI外部影响因素，表现为U型曲线——最高HbA1c出现在体重不健康的人群中。
cards.claim_en: There are external influences on BMI independent of HbA1c, as apparent with the U-shaped curve with the highest HbA1c observed in groups with unhealthy weight.

cards.title: International registries show improving HbA1c but increasing BMI-SDS
cards.claim_zh: 国际注册数据显示HbA1c总体改善，但BMI标准差评分（SDS）升高的人群比例也在增加。
cards.claim_en: International registries are demonstrating an overall improvement in HbA1c but also an increasing prevalence of higher BMI-standard deviation scores (SDS).

cards.title: CGM Time in Range (TIR) target for children and adolescents
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病儿童和青少年应努力使血糖在3.9–10 mmol/L（70–180 mg/dL）范围内的时间>70% [B]。
cards.claim_en: Children and adolescents with diabetes should strive for >70% time between 3.9 and 10 mmol/L (70–180 mg/dL) [B].

cards.title: CGM Time Below Range (TBR) level 1 target
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病儿童和青少年血糖低于3.9 mmol/L（70 mg/dL）的时间应<4% [B]。
cards.claim_en: Children and adolescents should spend <4% of time below 3.9 mmol/L (70 mg/dL) [B].

cards.title: CGM Time Below Range (TBR) level 2 target
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病儿童和青少年血糖低于3.0 mmol/L（54 mg/dL）的时间应<1% [B]。
cards.claim_en: Children and adolescents should spend <1% of time below 3.0 mmol/L (54 mg/dL) [B].

cards.title: CGM Time Above Range (TAR) level 1 target
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病儿童和青少年血糖高于10 mmol/L（180 mg/dL）的时间应<25% [B]。
cards.claim_en: Children and adolescents should spend <25% of time above 10 mmol/L (180 mg/dL) [B].

cards.title: CGM Time Above Range (TAR) level 2 target
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病儿童和青少年血糖高于13.9 mmol/L（250 mg/dL）的时间应<5% [B]。
cards.claim_en: Children and adolescents should spend <5% of time above 13.9 mmol/L (250 mg/dL) [B].

cards.title: TIR >80% needed for optimal HbA1c ≤6.5%
cards.claim_zh: 为达到最佳HbA1c目标≤6.5%（48 mmol/mol），血糖目标范围内时间（TIR）可能需要>80% [E]。
cards.claim_en: Time in range (TIR) may need to be >80% to achieve an optimal HbA1c target of ≤6.5% (48 mmol/mol) [E].

cards.title: TITR emerging metric for optimal glycemia
cards.claim_zh: 严格目标范围内时间（TITR）>50%（3.9–8 mmol/L 或 70–144 mg/dL）是评估平均血糖变化和血糖变异性的新兴指标 [C]。
cards.claim_en: Time in tight range (TITR) of >50% between 3.9–8 mmol/L (70–144 mg/dL) is an emerging metric for assessing changes in mean glucose and glucose variability [C].

cards.title: TITR >55% needed for HbA1c ≤6.5%
cards.claim_zh: 为达到较低的HbA1c目标≤6.5%（48 mmol/mol），TITR可能需要>55%。
cards.claim_en: To reach the lower HbA1c target of ≤6.5% (48 mmol/mol), a TITR of >55% may be needed.

cards.title: SMBG pre-prandial target
cards.claim_zh: 在无CGM的情况下，餐前自我血糖监测（SMBG）目标应为4.0–8.0 mmol/L（70–144 mg/dL）[B]。
cards.claim_en: In the absence of CGM, pre-prandial SMBG targets should be 4.0–8.0 mmol/L (70–144 mg/dL) [B].

cards.title: SMBG post-prandial target
cards.claim_zh: 在无CGM的情况下，餐后自我血糖监测（SMBG）目标应为4.0–10 mmol/L（70–180 mg/dL）[B]。
cards.claim_en: In the absence of CGM, post-prandial SMBG targets should be 4.0–10 mmol/L (70–180 mg/dL) [B].

cards.title: SMBG minimum daily frequency with insulin
cards.claim_zh: 在无CGM的情况下，使用胰岛素的糖尿病患者每天应至少进行6次自我血糖监测（SMBG）[B]。
cards.claim_en: In the absence of CGM, SMBG should be undertaken at least 6 times a day in persons with diabetes taking insulin [B].

cards.title: SMBG meter values HbA1c correspondence target
cards.claim_zh: SMBG血糖仪数值应以对应HbA1c ≤7%（≤53 mmol/mol）为目标，与CGM TIR >70%（4–10 mmol/L，70–180 mg/dL）的目标一致。
cards.claim_en: SMBG meter values should be targeted to correspond to an HbA1c ≤7% (≤53 mmol/mol), to align with the CGM TIR target of >70% between 4 and 10 mmol/L (70–180 mg/dL).

cards.title: SMBG fasting target range
cards.claim_zh: 推荐空腹血糖目标范围为4.0–8 mmol/L（70–144 mg/dL），以达到HbA1c ≤7%的目标。
cards.claim_en: Fasting target range glucose of 4.0–8 mmol/L (70–144 mg/dL) is recommended to achieve an HbA1c ≤7% target.

cards.title: SMBG pre-bed target range
cards.claim_zh: 睡前SMBG血糖水平4.0–8 mmol/L（70–144 mg/dL）为适宜目标，但在某些情况下（如先前低血糖、运动或低血糖感知障碍），照护者可能更倾向于4.0–10 mmol/L（70–180 mg/dL）范围内的较高水平。
cards.claim_en: SMBG glucose levels prior to bed of 4.0–8 mmol/L (70–144 mg/dL) are appropriate, though caregivers may prefer higher levels within 4.0–10 mmol/L (70–180 mg/dL) in certain scenarios such as preceding hypoglycemia, exercise, or hypoglycemic unawareness.

cards.title: HbA1c target range: 6.5% vs 7.0%
cards.claim_zh: ISPAD当前推荐的HbA1c目标为6.5%（48 mmol/mol），此前目标为7.0%（53 mmol/mol）。需要进一步研究评估这两个目标之间在并发症风险和照护负担感知方面的差异。
cards.claim_en: The currently proposed ISPAD HbA1c target is 6.5% (48 mmol/mol), versus the former target of 7.0% (53 mmol/mol). Future research is needed to evaluate differences in risk of complications and perceived care burdens between these two targets.

cards.title: SMBG requires >6 daily tests to guide management
cards.claim_zh: 维持每天>6次自我血糖监测（SMBG）以指导管理，一直被认为是改善整体血糖状况的重大障碍。
cards.claim_en: Maintaining >6 self-tests per day with SMBG to guide management has long been recognized as a significant barrier to improving overall glycemia.

cards.title: Modern CGM accuracy is very high despite intermittent inaccuracy
cards.claim_zh: CGM可能间歇性不准确，并可能受多种药物影响；然而现代CGM技术的总体准确性非常高。
cards.claim_en: CGM can be intermittently inaccurate and may be impacted by various pharmaceutical agents; however, overall accuracy in modern CGM technology is very high.

cards.title: HbA1c limitation: wide glucose variance at same HbA1c
cards.claim_zh: 对于给定的HbA1c值，平均血糖浓度存在较大变异范围；对于给定的平均血糖值，HbA1c也存在较大变异范围。
cards.claim_en: For a given HbA1c value, there is a wide range of mean glucose concentration values, and for any given mean glucose value there is a wide range of HbA1c values.

cards.title: HbA1c unreliable in certain conditions
cards.claim_zh: HbA1c检测在某些疾病状态下不可靠，包括贫血、血红蛋白病和肝脏疾病。种族差异也会影响HbA1c水平。
cards.claim_en: HbA1c measurement is unreliable in certain conditions including anemia, hemoglobinopathies, and liver disease. Racial differences also affect HbA1c levels.

cards.title: ADA evidence grading system for recommendations
cards.claim_zh: 推荐意见按照ADA糖尿病医疗标准证据分级系统进行评级。该A-E分级系统中A级为最高证据水平，E级为最低。
cards.claim_en: Recommendations were graded as per the ADA evidence grading system for Standards of Medical Care in Diabetes. This hierarchical A-E grading system sets A as having the highest level of evidence, and E having the lowest.

cards.title: Minimum CGM wear duration
cards.claim_zh: CGM佩戴天数：≥14天
cards.claim_en: Number of days CGM should be worn: ≥14 days

cards.title: Minimum CGM active percentage
cards.claim_zh: CGM有效使用时间占比：≥70%（14天中）
cards.claim_en: Percentage of time CGM is active: ≥70% of 14 days

cards.title: Glycemic variability target (%CV)
cards.claim_zh: 血糖变异系数(%CV)目标：≤36%。部分研究表明，对于使用胰岛素或磺脲类药物的患者，更低的%CV目标(<33%)可提供额外的低血糖保护。
cards.claim_en: Glycemic variability (%CV) target: ≤36%. Some studies suggest lower %CV targets (<33%) provide additional protection against hypoglycemia for those receiving insulin or sulfonylureas.

cards.title: Time above range very high (>250 mg/dL)
cards.claim_zh: 超高范围时间(TAR) (>250 mg/dL)：<5%。血糖控制评估目标适用于1型或2型糖尿病成人。
cards.claim_en: Time above range (TAR) Very High (>250 mg/dL): <5%. Guidance on targets for assessment of glycemic control is for adults with type 1 or type 2 diabetes.
cards.population: adults with type 1 or type 2 diabetes

cards.title: Time above range high (>180 mg/dL)
cards.claim_zh: 高范围时间(TAR) (>180 mg/dL)：<25%。血糖控制评估目标适用于1型或2型糖尿病成人。
cards.claim_en: Time above range (TAR) High (>180 mg/dL): <25%. Guidance on targets for assessment of glycemic control is for adults with type 1 or type 2 diabetes.
cards.population: adults with type 1 or type 2 diabetes

cards.title: Time in range (70-180 mg/dL)
cards.claim_zh: 目标范围内时间(TIR, 70-180 mg/dL)：>70%。血糖控制评估目标适用于1型或2型糖尿病成人。
cards.claim_en: Time in range (TIR, 70-180 mg/dL): >70%. Guidance on targets for assessment of glycemic control is for adults with type 1 or type 2 diabetes.
cards.population: adults with type 1 or type 2 diabetes

cards.title: Time below range low (<70 mg/dL)
cards.claim_zh: 低范围时间(TBR) (<70 mg/dL)：<4%。血糖控制评估目标适用于1型或2型糖尿病成人。
cards.claim_en: Time below range (TBR) Low (<70 mg/dL): <4%. Guidance on targets for assessment of glycemic control is for adults with type 1 or type 2 diabetes.
cards.population: adults with type 1 or type 2 diabetes

cards.title: Time below range very low (<54 mg/dL)
cards.claim_zh: 极低范围时间(TBR) (<54 mg/dL)：<1%。血糖控制评估目标适用于1型或2型糖尿病成人。
cards.claim_en: Time below range (TBR) Very Low (<54 mg/dL): <1%. Guidance on targets for assessment of glycemic control is for adults with type 1 or type 2 diabetes.
cards.population: adults with type 1 or type 2 diabetes

cards.title: A1C limitation vs CGM
cards.claim_zh: 虽然HbA1c反映过去2-3个月的平均血糖，但它无法识别血糖波动以及日内和日间血糖变异的幅度和频率。
cards.claim_en: While A1C reflects average glucose over the last 2-3 months, it fails to identify glycemic excursions and the magnitude and frequency of intra- and interday glucose variation.

cards.title: CV Stability Threshold
cards.claim_zh: 稳定血糖水平定义为 CV <36%，不稳定血糖水平定义为 CV ≥36%。
cards.claim_en: Stable glucose levels are defined as a CV <36%, and unstable glucose levels are defined as CV ≥36%.

cards.title: CV Target for Insulin/Sulfonylurea Patients
cards.claim_zh: 部分研究建议使用胰岛素或磺脲类药物的患者目标应低于33%。
cards.claim_en: Some studies might suggest a target of less than 33% for patients on insulin or sulfonylureas.

cards.title: Same A1C with Different Variability
cards.claim_zh: 两名假设患者A1C均为6.7%，但血糖变异性差异显著：CV 26%（稳定，波动小）对比 CV 53%（不稳定，波动大）。
cards.claim_en: Two hypothetical patients with the same A1C of 6.7% can have markedly different glucose variability: CV 26% (stable, low fluctuations) versus CV 53% (unstable, large spikes and dips).
